TIMtalk will keep you updated on the important issues and goings-on in our campaign, in Tennessee, and in our country.| | | [](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=e6e2880943bd490e92ec7ba558217c42&_e=Vhx6_6SzFWK0DUOKmxXhF8-YqNlLyqB2K9A4OjNMqm14mkjJUUgdQpSdG-%3D)

---
| | **A New Beginning 🐘**
---
---
| | By now, I’m sure you’ve heard all about the historic vote that removed Kevin McCarthy from his position as speaker of the House. Yes, I was one of eight Republicans who ousted him. I didn’t jump on the [bandwagon](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=e6e2880943bd490e92ec7ba558217c42&_e=Vhx6_6SzFWK0DUOKmxXhF5-MROK2Q5w53dv7_YE6H1EH6tJI-Y7487kFlUhl2UobOMBpA27N1gmGC3YKO_zcPHASyRPTZS_e-HTVrj0eQxPgDtLv6N_8Dtk2MUlNfakx1ifj-iqEcKCIZyMJwGW-4A0aUsYWCO87tmV6m4fENrxaeD-JfxVhMJvhTOGP5ovpNDOiqNSW2k_xKOkHrksuEAccg8WWfL_fqakELG3iimq0UPiEVewuO-_yXgw3fIWqjPahXkQYp2iHczd7klyk8Cst91M8TIpOXxuvI5GuEBY%3D) or follow a so-called ringleader; I [voted](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=e6e2880943bd490e92ec7ba558217c42&_e=Vhx6_6SzFWK0DUOKmxXhF4_1spRkhqnnK6j4AfTxBiCw8R3bdtt7p3oxdOa6gg1HNU5xRSU6BOlAHN_wr1LMwTFaFZxc26j1yC4sJBh2kkJFsILkKAn_az9IyFuyFprYXaQNxTNRdGz9m2xB9fyqvmJKQSc-fUEh01AZaRwCiCkK3dNvc_SYFAYmURqr1wbfMD5iG1iEwT2R9b4cPsIC5QlsgixlNJYQDCQjxq9bDsArBCi15mVg09VdIImojdB0fqGHqZo_WLFE7aHp3AOXaQ%3D%3D) my conscience after a lot of prayer and reflection. What’s done is done. Now, it’s time to look ahead and think about what this means for Republicans. While I hate to speak badly about a friend, Kevin McCarthy was severely [lacking](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=e6e2880943bd490e92ec7ba558217c42&_e=Vhx6_6SzFWK0DUOKmxXhF0QJUaX2bQ3BCKzyHOF7fKTiog9VXJs4yZJwdUQnyi4fltSQ4U2P3Pbvm9hvo9CFKTC0RHo4YhKDYduGDuRKt-ROEADIql3UMqVHLYhZ8JOZsWQc5ICfk8_v4bq8PKOecOPooW1jFDrYCpfDCLT1-FipNNwZgm3Ew9aVS5mDywxmMM25J2iNpFr4G9_g4iw9I4EWrwApnW8RwDQ6kqwMDTY%3D) in leadership skills and continued to pass the buck. We have crippling debt that hovers around [$33 trillion](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=e6e2880943bd490e92ec7ba558217c42&_e=Vhx6_6SzFWK0DUOKmxXhF2IIad61NKKK77J62bRqlB_rb-wY7a88pE-cwQCWx_BF1v4LNJOR7pfysGpMPxvCK76NLriuZnATVwDOnZ4HoHeOoycNyc1Cd_QogYjb11Bd126Ax6V2QyZkwx2LatUAnXraC3iVNplaUG43iEcEkUe2r0hXi76MqQ1rjcW7G_vf0yCR9e6Lx9AqZEGSeAGQWA%3D%3D), folks. This warrants an all-out fire drill—not extended vacations and early dismissals. If you ask me, a fresh [new era](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=e6e2880943bd490e92ec7ba558217c42&_e=Vhx6_6SzFWK0DUOKmxXhF3mYiIgl-7zdXOzxYG4PjjQo4i-3_rIrvXDbblCOXUyXx-dUmSZKZoLJq7T7QCItiUX2c_grfa8OK2J0KPPat1ylpUUkgoPlhfquG7keaYK1EdXe5k7mrGCDuCwhCq3lujSHX0yTEZkmIpeAZ9JKq10W_K0vlxolpR1198IoaoCbCuzo0uax10hfqS6tCMYA_U37crFtTmfDd71ySg6FazEh1uhYD80esIZNeBJ42jIZS1qBN_1QdS7aTeWwvSmEv_LzelqCrr496cCy5zskAatTHbbO8nDKc3phRk9eR781iaEFrGp8wLuQHVy5QuF2Rg%3D%3D) of leadership is long overdue. Many pundits keep asking who will be at the helm, and I don’t have the answer to that right now. From Steve Scalise to Roger Williams, there are a lot of names being thrown around, and many of them are great options. What I do know is this: It’s always darkest before dawn. This week has not been easy, but we now have a [real shot](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=e6e2880943bd490e92ec7ba558217c42&_e=Vhx6_6SzFWK0DUOKmxXhF1mKOHdB0uuV3nCPEYJeP2k50Bzh_w7Kympr5g9RnpYqJByszbdJZoHxLzMj8Jktb3aG1aA8Q_4vb02oniRaARyNhJHIyu97NwgajjynJnHZPtQZFITSydzhgLY6HAibfNaLU6LiAG7sKgt7bXRZC9CKP-2wf2ER2Mk8xKfOSiQmjmC9cuSkdiLTCi2rcQL_lyl51EQCMyXjLCCRuAeAqZRh2LVffiWgNlzWXY19wqpXivIgCfMmGGTMD5w2dWsxtn05CZSVX_lv9wvbIpcd_cR4TOqReEYdZ4DnQqV3sH2W) at creating a more cohesive and united party after ripping the Band-Aid off. Sure, it stings. But the American people are desperate for a body of public servants who are ready and willing to work for them, no matter how messy it gets. It has been [decades](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=e6e2880943bd490e92ec7ba558217c42&_e=Vhx6_6SzFWK0DUOKmxXhF278zgfUvke4xanFMubKTdkcONgXwAXW-MXZjkI7PUsVrIt1MZ1E8jBnw78lnbU0tSc2uQD8BTMF3iQJB8og8AQSPVHDioIZZqTDYKm_gzuLl1NIjII1jLF9oiOYNybe1OL8qtrq9qtCFyDl17UrNg1tTihwvl4qH4ZgF9sHmF6uVZWVIMJ-lPwtz6EwGFawBCK_scNKffgJVgKZDzyizWs9eI0YK9ZtK6JEG1h45eRjLBWB4nDGOavTVkjwnQxhPjQiIcqVxoghSBAYd74JIeksK8exRBIq1Lzb7RRwguHW) since this country passed a dadgum budget, and now there’s a fighting chance that someone will come in here with a clear mind and clean slate—ready to hit the ground running and get the job done. There’s no doubt that this is a defining moment in American [history](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=e6e2880943bd490e92ec7ba558217c42&_e=Vhx6_6SzFWK0DUOKmxXhF9LJsOly8sBrhvO9e1t-qyPpQ3Y0KsZFfFRoeJhVsYO24esx9FQJqbPDUcGNoAMGgEtcOywlEZ3ym9dnml65aQF_XfkxnoQ0CGQ63cGtprlDm0Evc8XXch_h0FI9vIQ349O28GVQsEV0KMCCmENJ0xV_8SNbuICNmgXvDqg7OResm3CUT8AYmV777XZNKPY52vwvv2FulBMG-AL8QxoGWNARK681ltXQPZ9_zUbDf37-EB-qO2mytRk4WeKS9MVGLi89_L5Sbge7vzpcFep4zfe9xus8aoO715D_9bzPn2e8). But just like a new quarterback thrown in during the second half after your team has been getting beat up on, I’m confident that we will rally around the new speaker—whomever that may be. My dedication and commitment to the conservative movement is stronger than ever before, and I see victory up ahead.

| | **Fall In Love With Autumn 🍁**
---
[](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=e6e2880943bd490e92ec7ba558217c42&_e=Vhx6_6SzFWK0DUOKmxXhFz_EX8kQorfI50qms5I-DhOR-PqzrNKC_d7dhLXv8HERQ8mi8D_TAxKYYct08lQYLSHlJzYa7c3NqFUkHknR0_G8ak9EmITshmqJRyw03LmpF1GdTMnw3QJoeC1MNLy8JGj97EUfVfY-A4aSeFbSA4emfbcNEuK-Y91-TbEf_FoYWkY9TPkeKCENlWP4XoB-WdiNRvziHn_iKQ5gPMpu9CnEg5t2j2IpLPVeuAytiQ-u35vp11Md3b7R2zgJYiuykw%3D%3D)

| | Photo Courtesy of Tennessee State Parks This is my favorite time of year in the Volunteer State. Red, orange, and gold leaves make for a scene straight out of a painting, and let me tell ya, I'm always struck by how naturally beautiful Tennessee can be. East Tennessee in particular is considered one of the best places in the country for [leaf peeping](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=e6e2880943bd490e92ec7ba558217c42&_e=Vhx6_6SzFWK0DUOKmxXhFz_EX8kQorfI50qms5I-DhOR-PqzrNKC_d7dhLXv8HERQ8mi8D_TAxKYYct08lQYLSHlJzYa7c3NqFUkHknR0_G8ak9EmITshmqJRyw03LmpKAFKTvefgwDifYnT2P5a6PHCmjK8Yed-7ZjXT3-S3RltH9rQo5ORMhfNNF2XytLPsurehzeSMULqwyQZYgVgWt2ltjwaE-d5ewDCsfC489By0ETu_4wG9_qS4Fw8AgHmawKCZXxc588lxA-r9eiiKg%3D%3D). From now until mid-October, the Great Smoky Mountains National Park will welcome visitors from across America who want to take in the peak autumnal sights. I'd recommend folks discover a hiking trail or visit one of our fine state parks to truly savor this special time. Looking for other activities to enjoy with the family? From hayrides to pumpkin picking, Tennessee’s charming towns come alive when the weather cools off. So grab a cup of fresh apple cider and find [your next adventure](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=e6e2880943bd490e92ec7ba558217c42&_e=Vhx6_6SzFWK0DUOKmxXhF8AshdvX1t_ra3lt2pzOJ_RuOBoY40mK6UXEJYf_p23d_jkiFAvkb22yLGremZ9QUL5jq-JDFl7zzsbLDIna1je8T7JoW8BuQeD_Y8VmKkx2crBq47aqh2DSvx5ZpH-vztaVFgULphee8EAviedG4qIsBaTcU1I6jVP3NFebmSW5Tx2yQIlK80_RdBZAUhmsXefIDm-7SWjo2bfz3pXvESYnCgI2gyndxjnPYoG6cbstjFodV9e4eQlZwrWl_AjgLtrzRW-pJ8Sow26rPMfk0WD_FRaWNVJandP_Io62xEPsNNJwVTYr7ZIR543noa6z-g%3D%3D).

👋 Hi there, friend!
My name is Emily, and I just joined Team Debbie as our digital director. It's my job to build out a digital strategy that will send Debbie to the Senate and Rick Scott packing! **As I get settled into this new role, reaching out to you is the number one item on my to-do list.**
As one of Debbie's earliest online supporters, you have incredibly valuable insights about this race, Debbie's campaign, and our digital strategy. Your feedback will be absolutely critical to my work from now all the way through to Election Day. That's why I've put together a special _Fourth Quarter Priorities Survey_ exclusively for top supporters like you.
**Please, will you take a moment to submit your responses before midnight tonight? Here's a personal survey link that I created for you:[surveys.signforgood.com/DMP-Oct-2023-Q4-Priorities-Survey-Email](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71127660/431229805/-1186917683?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk172-su-nd&refcode=jtk172-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOGE3NjRjMjctYTU2NC1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=bn2c2cU9nH7PlOyw1fayIcJjOAbYgYRuGHX10mSusC8=&emci=3ce84d38-0b62-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=8a764c27-a564-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=3969733)**

None of our victories in 2022 would have happened without your donations, survey responses, advocacy, and relentless belief in our candidates. Now, as we head into 2024, we'll need your help again.
All of us at Team Debbie understand just how critical you are to this campaign. That's why they hired me, and it's why I'm reaching out to you so early on. We can't do this without you, friend.**So please, will you help me build out a solid digital strategy by responding to our new survey before midnight tonight?****Here's that link again:[surveys.signforgood.com/DMP-Oct-2023-Q4-Priorities-Survey-Email](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71127661/431229806/-1186917683?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk172-su-nd&refcode=jtk172-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOGE3NjRjMjctYTU2NC1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=bn2c2cU9nH7PlOyw1fayIcJjOAbYgYRuGHX10mSusC8=&emci=3ce84d38-0b62-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=8a764c27-a564-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=3969733)**
_I'm reviewing responses first thing tomorrow morning, so please be sure to get yours in ASAP!_

Thanks so much. I'll be in touch again soon.

Emily W.

name: Matt Gaetz
subject: Keep Gaetz Fighting
body:
Mike Lawler loves the Swamp
| | [ ](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=c2f3ce88f64e4a3f9305516595e079a8&_e=Z20ld_xQmW0JjTP6WfekHmqM0tV2p7wBPygtpdiu9ZdLEIdWY7Gr33j0vKP1ndBaiEukPA0vUBxMi9yizJM8KUNn3a-5TYaOAE1idXPNit-zYpcxsNYiEVYpV8TB8tmXoqFZXo4_01q7KR2qlgA-tD86bGbY10X3Po1sFs_56s7euBONiTKvXAsSlISv9SdaEGia6k7K5mFbmfNTdVaVotglEOxxEIbzrfPwYynXrLVpOrkxin2_3tR5nX0sad07DwvchsGQ2IPBJiJKKFLcm6FatuE6X9YQEgPQbBxLlpr7bbpK22J9LK2A5v_Shn6sn76d4YrpSrQm-LMPkwVhkVlMlT7C7W0G51PlWtUise0%3D)
---
Friend - Joe Biden's favorite Republican is now demanding the House Republicans EXPEL me.
I need to tell you about a guy I work with in Congress named Mike Lawler, but first, you should know what Joe Biden had to say about him...
_**" Mike is the kind of guy that when I was in the Congress, the kind of Republican I used to deal with. But he's not one of these MAGA Republicans." **_ _**\- President Joe Biden**_
I can't believe it, but Joe Biden is exactly right about Mike Lawler, he's not MAGA and he's exactly the kind of Republican who will cut deals with Democrats to sell out his voters and our country. His political experience comes entirely from the notoriously corrupt halls of the New York Assembly in Albany, and it really shows.
**Lawler is _very, very mad_ that I took a stand against the Lobbyists and Special Interests that fund his campaign,** and now he's threatening to offer a motion to expel me from the House Republican Conference.
I've got some news for Mike Lawler, I'm not afraid of him or his Lobbyist pals.
| [ **DEFEND GAETZ** ](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=c2f3ce88f64e4a3f9305516595e079a8&_e=Z20ld_xQmW0JjTP6WfekHmqM0tV2p7wBPygtpdiu9ZdLEIdWY7Gr33j0vKP1ndBaiEukPA0vUBxMi9yizJM8KUNn3a-5TYaOAE1idXPNit-zYpcxsNYiEVYpV8TB8tmXoqFZXo4_01q7KR2qlgA-tD86bGbY10X3Po1sFs_56s7euBONiTKvXAsSlISv9SdazKLmpxyiNqKJofqiAEUWaZaaCmjHg3LftkJ4IdNd_v_FXZnve3Y7cr6HRud6tn8zEAE5BWSC5pXiAHfiwLZzPF96uUh87-YtH3BsKGlb2kp62rUWEclrKBZTIwyJ_H0OsOMnCmZxu3i6_Gnps1CEgC3J1ky4j_XvVyiq-4QyS7Q%3D)
---
Unlike Lawler, I don't take a penny from PACs or Lobbyists and I never will, which is why it's so important I have the resources to fight back against his plot to remove me from Committees and expel me from the Conference.
**What Mike doesn 't know is that there is an army of patriots that have stepped up to stand with me in this fight to change Washington, and we're not backing down.**
**[I 'm asking you to help me show Mike Lawler that we're going to fight him and his Swamp buddies tooth and nail to save this country.](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=c2f3ce88f64e4a3f9305516595e079a8&_e=Z20ld_xQmW0JjTP6WfekHmqM0tV2p7wBPygtpdiu9ZdLEIdWY7Gr33j0vKP1ndBaiEukPA0vUBxMi9yizJM8KUNn3a-5TYaOAE1idXPNit-zYpcxsNYiEVYpV8TB8tmXoqFZXo4_01q7KR2qlgA-tD86bGbY10X3Po1sFs_56s7euBONiTKvXAsSlISv9SdaXG9F3NE_HEvK78UAcHvbAenfCtKiBGTbbEqOUidj4YYUq3pC-X3WY6Q_4bcDti1Osx2XVIjuRQ2xjkQYqDoi9LOjdpaSCQHnIPp9O0qDydkMyat2UKd2gBVteTXJtQmNK8SfL3iE_-3a3o76lynlPqvosoFHbUTb1CHcu8hB4XU%3D)**
I'm proud to have you on my team. Without the support of patriots like you, our mission to save this country would be over already. Thanks, Matt Gaetz
| [ ](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=c2f3ce88f64e4a3f9305516595e079a8&_e=Z20ld_xQmW0JjTP6WfekHmqM0tV2p7wBPygtpdiu9ZdLEIdWY7Gr33j0vKP1ndBaiEukPA0vUBxMi9yizJM8KUNn3a-5TYaOAE1idXPNit-zYpcxsNYiEVYpV8TB8tmXoqFZXo4_01q7KR2qlgA-tD86bGbY10X3Po1sFs_56s7euBONiTKvXAsSlISv9Sdah0oP1--t3Tuv1vj1SW3KnkR7oAEtfolzNmU_PCKNnrjnkgemJ8GL3b8jbZWinoZ-jf-u3H9B24eaTdFZuLAy53aMM5k4dpUM-S9N_mh22XAou21P17G-GEj2oedznZ5Dvmt67gtoF3ZfbGsPoREYiVstrbME80vTYqge5wTc8GI%3D)
---
P.S. Lawler is going to be begging like a dog for money from Lobbyists and PACs leading up to his re-election campaign in 2024, and he'll even have the audacity to try to trick YOU into giving him money. **I hope you 'll examine all your fundraising appeals with a discerning eye and make sure to never give this turncoat a DIME of your hard earned cash.** He knows he can't raise it using his name, so make sure to look carefully to see where your money is going, guys like this lie for a living!
| | |
---
| | This Email was Sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com If you would like to stop recieving our emails [CLICK HERE](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_s=c2f3ce88f64e4a3f9305516595e079a8&_t=8L33U6NuiyrWbfXGajmGDUYaORH2731GCIFPt-ISWh35bmqu0Yh_Kz1tUuKGKhqHA8SvxhoL3I5Xki7eT7W5Nph-kU5I9lCKSHqUYbfd4lc%3D)

This is our best chance to flip a GOP-held Senate seat in 2024. Please let us explain:
#
Here’s the truth about Missouri’s U.S. Senate race, Peter.
This is our best chance to flip a GOP-held Senate seat in 2024 — and Lucas Kunce is the only candidate who can do it. **Please let us explain:**
**[ELECT LUCAS KUNCE: CHIP IN NOW →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38315?refcode=em20231006-3933&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3933%2E614464%2EOq_dZV)**
Over the last nine months, Lucas has worked hard to build a historic grassroots campaign with the help of Missouri’s labor movement — an enormous coalition of working people who already know how to fight for power in our state.
They’ve fought and won major battles for everyday Missourians over the last six years when our politicians failed to do the right thing, like rejecting an anti-union “Right-to-Work” scam, raising the minimum wage well above the federal level, and finally passing Medicaid expansion.
So between that coalition, our campaign’s record-breaking grassroots fundraising, and new polling that shows Lucas in a statistical tie with Hawley more than a year out from Election Day, we have a real path to victory. **But here’s the tricky part:**
DC Republicans and shady corporate mega-donors have already made BIG investments into Josh Hawley. They know he’s the most vulnerable GOP senator up for re-election this cycle — and they’re prepared to spend whatever it takes to make him look strong and keep this Senate seat under their thumb.
They know that Hawley will spend six more years upholding their corrupt status quo. He’ll continue using his power to benefit himself, not working people. He’ll continue trying to strip away abortion rights from everyday Americans. And he’ll continue letting massive corporations gut communities across our state.
**That’s what we’re up against in this race.** Now here’s why we need your help:
Lucas is committed to building his campaign with $0 from corporate PACs, which means he’s relying on real people like you to power this movement. We know it may not seem like a lot, but small donations of $15, $5, or even just $1 add up fast.
**So we’re asking:[Can you chip in whatever works best for you today so we can stand up to the GOP insiders and corporate elites trying to buy this race and finally elect a real warrior for working people to Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38315?refcode=em20231006-3933&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3933%2E614464%2EOq_dZV)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $5](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38316?refcode=em20231006-3933&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=5&t=3&akid=3933%2E614464%2EOq_dZV) [Contribute $15](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38316?refcode=em20231006-3933&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=15&t=4&akid=3933%2E614464%2EOq_dZV) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38316?refcode=em20231006-3933&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=5&akid=3933%2E614464%2EOq_dZV) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38316?refcode=em20231006-3933&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=6&akid=3933%2E614464%2EOq_dZV) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38316?refcode=em20231006-3933&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=7&akid=3933%2E614464%2EOq_dZV) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38316?refcode=em20231006-3933&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=8&akid=3933%2E614464%2EOq_dZV) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38315?refcode=em20231006-3933&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=9&akid=3933%2E614464%2EOq_dZV)

clean_body: While I was forced to stand trial as an innocent man, these “Republicans”...| | | | | Patriot, This week, while the Radical Democrats forced me to stand trial as an innocent man to defend my livelihood, my family, and my properties from what many are calling the “corporate death penalty,” our RINO opponents continued to dishonestly attack yours truly. Crooked Joe and his accomplices are using every dirty trick imaginable to INTERFERE in this election and keep me off the campaign trail, and what do the RINOs see? A pipe dream of an opportunity to benefit their own political ambitions. Just think of it... We’re LEADING the Republican field by 62 points and are up on Crooked Joe by 10 points! These RINOs will NEVER stop us because the PEOPLE are behind us. But rather than spend their time, energy, and combined resources going after Crooked Joe when he forces me off the campaign trail, they instead decide to attack the ONLY movement that can and will DEFEAT Biden in 2024! Patriot, this is exactly why I promised you that we’d WRAP UP the primary as quickly as humanly possible. And just as I always have, I will make good on my promise. TOMORROW marks just 100 days out from the FIRST contest of the primary in the great state of Iowa. So, let’s show these disloyal RINOs just how much LARGER our lead can still grow with an ambitious NEW goal of 100,000 grassroots donations of ANY amount over this final stretch. | | Thank you, Donald J. body:
This is my promise... | | | [](https://link.donaldjtrump.com/u/click?_t=c26d591425684a3289b90149d613a03c&_m=00dea059d238475a9279e97c3eb3f1bf&_e=iW1RsLlSI_h6Ebr-6U1Tj2zIErfEyQBznk4blUKhdpqBzfI5bz6tv21cM6K4W1Zr-h3BgnciicofCVR-iMyokfZFb6JMz5ELNwKESqsfH4XOGin9vD2aPDQyE1w1C3YWKP3VXQZuPqesVAD9uNzaIfRmYovLXGSHyrKoPUU-Inyno9UHNZAMxZRvu0XK95ImGhDIpHNv2lDVX5GcKu0aVu8kVrFbR6m8eAYydaSnZG69KT5sfWF8PENJqEzy0X1XlARwsUn_JQLj8X43pe7GH8cl72iOFFxjGHpIR38YeOf8NWPXFeFGnl70SZ22cQR2ekI1hwSvV9Bry1aVzGZAKUBMAvlm_bkfjzNJ8uFK-SJJ7SgPLmy54Se7Vp3zsg0O2MWQLIm3A3LwYV5DKjMh_rZuRgy2FXErMzC0V8TG2FCPQlJK8hCFc9eHwnAF_9rMik8ZiYtzDQORbcT50Xb1CzeeL5rdWOWJ3eAdC0k7rCwSsjwnCfJSN-kycUfXyZJr)
---
| | Patriot,

---
This week, as you watched yours truly stand trial as a completely innocent man, you’ve seen exactly what the Radical Democrats' endgame really is...
---
A pursuit of _absolute_ power at the expense of our free Republic, our Constitution, and not just my civil liberties, but _YOUR_ _freedom_ as well.
---
The power-drunk Democrats, TERRIFIED by the latest polls that show us LEADING Crooked Joe by 10 POINTS, will do anything – _truly, anything_ – to destroy the one man who can and will defeat Biden in 2024.
---
**_They wrongfully impeach me and raid my home. They indict me, unlawfully arrest me, and even force me to take a mugshot. They’re attempting to strip me of my livelihood and take away my incredible business. They want to harass my family and take away my home, Trump Tower. And now, they’re trying to GAG me for the rest of the election to prevent me from even criticizing Crooked Joe._**
---
**... _All of this to CANCEL OUT YOUR VOTE!_ **

---
Our Founding Fathers would be rolling in their graves if they could see what is happening to the America they left us – _once the freest country in the world_.
---
But these Deep State thugs truly are monsters...
---
They would trade our Republic for a tin-pot dictatorship in a heartbeat if it meant an everlasting grip on power.
---
And mark my words, if they succeed at INTERFERING in this election, in the FINAL BATTLE for our country, America will never be the same.
---
**But I promise you this: The one thing these crooks, thugs, and fools can**** _NEVER_****contend with is a movement of more than 74 MILLION patriots peacefully declaring that they will****NEVER,****_EVER_****SURRENDER****our country to Third World Marxist tyranny!**
---
_If you’re struggling right now due to Biden’s disastrous policies, believe me, I completely understand. In that case, please don’t even think about donating. I mean it!_
---
_But if you can contribute even just $1 alongside your fellow patriots to show that you too will NEVER SURRENDER, then God knows our country needs YOU now more than ever. _
---
**[Please contribute just $1 to SAVE AMERICA – for 1,500% impact.](https://link.donaldjtrump.com/u/click?_t=c26d591425684a3289b90149d613a03c&_m=00dea059d238475a9279e97c3eb3f1bf&_e=iW1RsLlSI_h6Ebr-6U1Tj2zIErfEyQBznk4blUKhdpqBzfI5bz6tv21cM6K4W1Zr-h3BgnciicofCVR-iMyokfZFb6JMz5ELNwKESqsfH4XOGin9vD2aPDQyE1w1C3YWKP3VXQZuPqesVAD9uNzaIfRmYovLXGSHyrKoPUU-Inyno9UHNZAMxZRvu0XK95ImGhDIpHNv2lDVX5GcKu0aVu8kVrFbR6m8eAYydaSnZG69KT5sfWF8PENJqEzy0X1XlARwsUn_JQLj8X43pe7GH8cl72iOFFxjGHpIR38YeOf8NWPXFeFGnl70SZ22cQR2ekI1hwSvV9Bry1aVzGZAKYvHe14IjJ0s1_FCqs_SlcUl_wY24WrJQs_qWnTP6eTtrgTYso7-fwOntI19AkWGh13JOq7sPHKh6dKAao4_gQ9GV83AulptequWQKn5fSRSroCEc3Klq79BpVlAASq4gjhYgz0Fj3Dx07Bx2BB4GdqrssKW11qfYgTAwjL8byc9)**

clean_body: This is my promise... | | | | | Patriot, This week, as you watched yours truly stand trial as a completely innocent man, you’ve seen exactly what the Radical Democrats' endgame really is... A pursuit of absolute power at the expense of our free Republic, our Constitution, and not just my civil liberties, but YOUR freedom as well. The power-drunk Democrats, TERRIFIED by the latest polls that show us LEADING Crooked Joe by 10 POINTS, will do anything – truly, anything – to destroy the one man who can and will defeat Biden in 2024. They wrongfully impeach me and raid my home. They indict me, unlawfully arrest me, and even force me to take a mugshot. They’re attempting to strip me of my livelihood and take away my incredible business. They want to harass my family and take away my home, Trump Tower. And now, they’re trying to GAG me for the rest of the election to prevent me from even criticizing Crooked Joe. ... All of this to CANCEL OUT YOUR VOTE! Our Founding Fathers would be rolling in their graves if they could see what is happening to the America they left us – once the freest country in the world. But these Deep State thugs truly are monsters... They would trade our Republic for a tin-pot dictatorship in a heartbeat if it meant an everlasting grip on power. And mark my words, if they succeed at INTERFERING in this election, in the FINAL BATTLE for our country, America will never be the same. But I promise you this: The one thing these crooks, thugs, and fools can NEVERcontend with is a movement of more than 74 MILLION patriots peacefully declaring that they willNEVER,EVERSURRENDERour country to Third World Marxist tyranny! If you’re struggling right now due to Biden’s disastrous policies, believe me, I completely understand. In that case, please don’t even think about donating. I mean it! But if you can contribute even just $1 alongside your fellow patriots to show that you too will NEVER SURRENDER, then God knows our country needs YOU now more than ever. | | Thank you and God bless you, Donald J. Trump | | Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. | Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J. Trump for President 2024, Inc. and Save America.

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Can I explain something?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| Friend,

In a moment, I’m going to ask if you can [pitch in to support the Voter Protection Project and my campaign for U.S. Senate](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/54595?t=6&akid=11048%2E878179%2Ero9eC4) ahead of our midnight fundraising deadline. But first, can I explain why this deadline is so important?

Just hours before I announced my campaign, Kevin McCarthy removed me from the Intelligence Committee, where I’ve served as Chairman and top Democrat for years. All because I held Trump and MAGA Republicans accountable.

As it turned out, that was just the beginning. Ever since I started running to serve Californians in the Senate, McCarthy, Matt Gaetz, and the entire Fox News machine have attacked me nearly every day.

McCarthy claimed that a Republican could win this Senate race in California and also said they needed to make sure I didn’t win.

[It’s clear that Republicans are going to do everything they can to prevent me from becoming California’s next Senator. That’s why it’s so important we hit our fundraising goal and send a powerful message: I’m not going anywhere.

Pitch in now to help:](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/54595?t=7&akid=11048%2E878179%2Ero9eC4) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Adam Schiff and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/54596?t=8&akid=11048%2E878179%2Ero9eC4)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/54597?t=9&akid=11048%2E878179%2Ero9eC4)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/54598?t=10&akid=11048%2E878179%2Ero9eC4)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/54599?t=11&akid=11048%2E878179%2Ero9eC4)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/54595?t=12&akid=11048%2E878179%2Ero9eC4)
Investing _now_ and building the campaign infrastructure to break through the Republicans’ noise and reach voters across California is going to be the key to success in this race. Thanks for anything you can contribute to help.

— Adam
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=11048%2E878179%2Ero9eC4). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=11048%2E878179%2Ero9eC4).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=11048%2E878179%2Ero9eC4) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=13&akid=11048%2E878179%2Ero9eC4). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=11048%2E878179%2Ero9eC4)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=11048%2E878179%2Ero9eC4)

name: Tom Cotton (Senator R-Arkansas)

disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Your input is crucial to our success

This is important and will only take a few minutes, Friend.

The Republican Party is starting the process of building our strategy for 2024, **and we need your input** to get the job done.

name: Mike Pompeo
subject: I need you to read this message
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHAMPION AMERICAN VALUES
body:
before the next debate...

| |
---
| | | | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z6beh7709828ulj4q6v507cgmq8lsvof566vk6ag_rp22sh2s8i66p73cdjm4o76cph2bs)
---
| [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zvh5ciob8bukm4ghdanc761kajeffptq2thc51h0_rp22sh2s8i66p73cdjm4o76cph2bs)
---
| **" Mike, it is so hard to see what this nation has come to. I don't know what this next cycle will look like, but I do know I wish you would consider running for the presidency. You would have my vote - no question."** **Keith from Austin, TX** **" I wish you would just run for POTUS!!!!! The work you and Trump did was the BEST that I have seen since Reagan. I miss having a true leader in the White House and I seriously hope you'll reconsider your candidacy. Praying!!!"****Linda from Fresno, CA**

---

Friend, I have been touched by everyone's heartfelt messages asking me to run for President, and I am truly humbled and honored to have so many Pipehitters consider my skill set for this position.

But I have another critical mission for 2024... and I hope that you will continue to stand with me as you always have.

**[Will you take 30 seconds to read this special memo about my plans for next year's elections?](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zgbso0022s03skl0orhbl6jjp2ql77p8513bs4h8_rp22sh2s8i66p73cdjm4o76cph2bs "Will you take 30 seconds to read this special memo about my plans for next year’s elections?")**

---

Be a Pipehitter,
---
|
---
Mike Pompeo
---

name: Matt Gaetz
subject: You've Been Attacked...
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ
body:
It’s Matt Gaetz, and I need your immediate attention.

| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrnjee48ln1iqr8iddqdh1t1uumjo3c0movjhtqg_rp22sh2s8i66p73cdjm4o72cth2bs)
---
| | Friend,

It’s Matt Gaetz, and I need your immediate attention.
**I was just _ATTACKED_ and _BOOED_ by RINOs for asking you to weigh in and contribute to this fight.**
I will _**NOT**_ be lectured by Republicans who grovel and bend the knee for the lobbyists and special interests who have hollowed out this town and borrowed against the future of our future generations.

These lobbyists and special interests own our leadership and HATE that I fund my political operation by asking Patriotic Americans for [_$10, $20, and $30 at a time_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zcj4eltk8p8qt17dv6a4i12ht573iohql3seo86o_rp22sh2s8i66p73cdjm4o72cth2bs).

We’re finally on the verge of ushering in **REAL CHANGE** to how Washington works, and I’m asking you to stand with me in this seminal moment:
---
| [🇺🇸 JOIN THE MOVEMENT. DEMAND CHANGE 🇺🇸](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zd5ofbg0qan27dj3ithags9efq67ojhit4pfp2g0_rp22sh2s8i66p73cdjm4o72cth2bs "🇺🇸 JOIN THE MOVEMENT. DEMAND CHANGE 🇺🇸")
---
| The Lobbyists and Special Interests want Congress to work just the way it does: FOR THEM!

I want Congress to work the way the Founders intended: FOR YOU!

I’ve got more enemies than ever, just because I won’t bend the knee.
**We've just ousted Kevin McCarthy. But the fight is not over. Now, we must elect a Speaker.**
[**_Stand with me._**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zct2b02q4k9i6ilap8fdhd8cls4nk6lb6vt1kk30_rp22sh2s8i66p73cdjm4o72cth2bs)

subject: The Doug Collins Podcast Update – Saturday, October 7, 2023
body:
| [Having trouble viewing this email? Click here to see it in your browser.](http://click1.srnemail.com/ViewMessage.do?m=essytzzrs&r=umwffggwgqwc&s=twbpvcddvtbttrdbbgljtsvmcsstzcgrszb&q=1696680000&a=view)

---
---
---
| |
###
---
| | [ Back in the Zoo York Mood ](http://click1.srnemail.com/wgdjgsttghwbhhmtbwwydbzhkgbnskkhlsymklwvvszdgv_xdpbbpphpvhctdbcbbsgggg.html)
### _Friday, October 6, 2023_
It's Friday and were still talking about Kevin McCarthy, seals are loose at the Central Park Zoo, Taylor Swift is bigger than the football games she attends, are two legendary coaches on the hot seat? [ ](http://click1.srnemail.com/xrgcrbnnryptyyqntppmdtsykrtjbkkyvbmqkvphhbsdrp_xdpbbpphpvhctdbcbbsgggg.html)
---|---
| [ Thunderstruck: Kevin McCarthy removed as Speaker of the House ](http://click1.srnemail.com/qvddgfjjgcvtccrjtvvbmthcygtpfyycwfbrywvssfhmgg_xdpbbpphpvhctdbcbbsgggg.html)
### _Wednesday, October 4, 2023_
It happened, the Speaker has been removed and the House is shutdown until a new Speaker is elected. What does this all mean and where do we go from here? I lay it all out in this episode, along with a little known piece of trivia about a letter that the Speaker has to send when he or she is elected Speaker. [ ](http://click1.srnemail.com/ldqhjnffjldrllcfrddymrqlsjrwnsslknycskdggnqmjn_xdpbbpphpvhctdbcbbsgggg.html)

name: Matt Gaetzl
subject: The Swamp Strikes Back
disclaimer_text: paid for by the Swamp, and now they’re plotting to EXPEL me from Congress
body:
They want revenge.

| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zd47j7jr0vpc0e4sa22kcbmapvr71g5sssh8uaqg_rp22sh2s8i66p73cdjm6ob6cjh2bs)
---
Friend, we made history in the House this week.
| [**SAVE GAETZ**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zg60lgpne08vhe5oeuunpjejot54406eh4lv3cbo_rp22sh2s8i66p73cdjm6ob6cjh2bs)
---
For the first time in a long time, a politician was held accountable for breaking their promise to the American people.
Everyone knows Washington is broken, and lots of Republicans talk about how dysfunctional it is, but _**nobody ever does anything about it!**_
**That all changed when I stood up to the entire Swamp and removed Kevin McCarthy as Speaker.**
We’re not going to save this country from being destroyed if we keep doing business as usual. It’s going to take courage and decisive action to eradicate the culture of failure and decline that rots our Congress to its core.
Of course, the lobbyists and special interests who control the politicians in Washington want Congress to work just the way it does: FOR THEM!
**I want Congress to work the way the Founders intended: FOR YOU!**
Americans didn’t give Republicans the majority in the House to keep funding the Biden Pelosi agenda, they elected us to stop the insanity and get our country working for the people again.
**The RINOs in the Republican party are FURIOUS at me for exposing the fact they are bought and paid for by the Swamp, and now they’re plotting to EXPEL me from Congress.**
| [**SAVE GAETZ**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zsuff07pe674ov4ahluapdk577d2tdgcijevudmo_rp22sh2s8i66p73cdjm6ob6cjh2bs)
---
**[We’re finally on the verge of ushering in REAL CHANGE to how Washington works, and I’m asking you to stand with me in this seminal moment.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z4s9b89s669hddogsqf2agfk52p5hph9c1g6jjr8_rp22sh2s8i66p73cdjm6ob6cjh2bs)**
If the Swamp expels me for taking a stand, it won’t happen again for a generation. Nothing will change, and our country will be doomed.
I’ve been humbled by the outpouring of support, and I’ll never apologize for funding my political operation exclusively from patriots that share my determination. Thanks for standing strong, Matt Gaetz
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zbchi76lkquor3metu7jv7tjelqmbr2e3vr39rgo_rp22sh2s8i66p73cdjm6ob6cjh2bs)
---
| | |
---
| |
---

name: Nikki Haley
subject: Are you tired of the drama?
body:
Let's talk

| |
---
| | | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c679097%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=5ZVqjsWDK12tP02iRTHnMg&sysid=1)
---

Friend,

Are **YOU** tired?

Tired of the **DRAMA?**

Tired of the **CHAOS?**

So am I, Friend. Which is why I want to have an honest conversation with **YOU. **

---
| | [READ HERE](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c679098%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=rj%2bEU%2feF0KP7W6cgMV9YJA&sysid=1)
---

My very best,
---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c679097%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=5ZVqjsWDK12tP02iRTHnMg&sysid=1)
---
Nikki Haley
---
| | | | |
---
---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c679099%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=NlrWDypWpmQpf98XazVoHQ&sysid=1 "NikkiHaley_Merch")
---
| | [GET YOUR HAT NOW](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c679090%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=SfQvGZTkEdK2Mm%2bMb%2fzhCA&sysid=1 "Claim Your Mug")
---
---
| | **More About Nikki Haley**

---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c679091%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2fJE571BJR2IHon4ichcUmg&sysid=1 "NikkiHaley_Podium")
---
My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I’m running for President of the United States.

I’m running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I’m running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I’m running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I’m doing this for my son who’s a senior in college and shouldn’t have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn’t believe in just to get an A.

I’m running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I’m running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I’ve seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden’s leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a “jobs governor”** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs, stood up for Israel even when others refused, and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I’ve done it before. **And I’ll do it as your next President. **

As President, I’ll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington’s spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America’s future.

**[Will you join me today and help me save our country?](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c679092%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=zmdPRAYwIMqLasmQ03Tofw&sysid=1 "Will you join me today and
help me save our country?")**

---
| | [DONATE](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c679093%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=YvCWlp%2bwm7X%2fhYdX8vMAYA&sysid=1 "DONATE")
---

name: Newt Gingrich
subject: I just accepted an important mission
body:
Now, I’m kindly asking you for 5 minutes of your time.

| |
---
| | | Hello all,

**This is Newt Gingrich.** I just accepted an important mission asked of me by the Majority Whip.

He is looking for some guidance as we enter the early stages of the impeachment inquiry and the final quarter of the year. Both are critical to the future of our country.

So allow me to be blunt:

I'm kindly asking you for 5 minutes of your time to fill out his Official Majority Leadership Audit:

---
| | [FILL IT OUT HERE](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zd1hkd5se7q6h55cufvsti23n0dbc1guni21mafg_rp22sh2s8i66p73cdjm6ob2cjh2bs "FILL IT OUT HERE")
---

Once submitted, your responses will be logged, formatted, and transmitted directly to the Majority Whip's office.

_Again, it 's only a few questions. I've been assured it won't take you very long._

Do you think you can do that for me?

**[Here's your access link once more.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z68oogpufkv8nijaav2e1un26ll3vguf5ltjlvko_rp22sh2s8i66p73cdjm6ob2cjh2bs "Here’s your access link once more.")**

Thank you, Patriot. I mean that.
- Newt

---
|

name: ICYMI News
subject: Victor Davis Hanson: Victory and the Savior Generals
body:
I'm pleased to share with you a free resource that will ignite your curiosity and challenge your perceptions.

| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zhlt55fkinlg307belndmug03oui869dno4ema5o_rp22sh2s8i66p73cdge0o31cph2bs)
---
---
| | Dear Friend, [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z7vrpqbohg0f9au9gmdg4efs63hfakf07t8us5gg_rp22sh2s8i66p73cdge0o31cph2bs)
Throughout pivotal moments in history, we have witnessed the remarkable transformation of seemingly lost causes, orchestrated by the savior generals--visionary leaders displaying unparalleled expertise.

Today, I'm pleased to share with you a free resource that will ignite your curiosity and challenge your perceptions. Esteemed historian and Hoover Senior Fellow, **Victor Davis Hanson** , has authored a groundbreaking eBook--_Victory and the Savior Generals_ --a captivating exploration into the minds of these exceptional leaders.

You can secure your free copy today by clicking on this exclusive link: **[https://resources.hoover.org/victory-and-the-savior-generals](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z0tao2p7vcuoj60rhsihlr436n1o05jj789s1ji0_rp22sh2s8i66p73cdge0o31cph2bs)**

Inside its digital pages, you'll embark on a journey that uncovers the defining traits of these savior generals. Their ingenuity, contrarian spirit, and unwavering courage breathed new life into seemingly lost causes. Their profound understanding of conflict, rejection of complacency, adaptability to change, and alignment with societal values contributed to their monumental successes.

This is your opportunity to unravel the secrets of history's most influential leaders, unlocking invaluable lessons that resonate even in the present day.

Claim your complimentary copy of _Victory and the Savior Generals_ now through this secure link: **[https://resources.hoover.org/victory-and-the-savior-generals](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zcpiksklh9usfuekn7glm6k7aejr6d1asgel6qh0_rp22sh2s8i66p73cdge0o31cph2bs)**

Wishing you a wonderful journey through the pages of history!

Greg

Greg Stamps | Online Development
Hoover Institution | Stanford University

---
_With its eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research organization that seeks to improve the human condition by advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred years, Hoover’s work has directly led to policies that have produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the United States and around the world._

name: Matt Gaetz
subject: The Swamp Strikes Back
disclaimer_text: paid for by the Swamp, and now they’re plotting to EXPEL me from Congress
body:
They want revenge.

| | [ ](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24702%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=vjFfm7F%2fErRSeeLPaHfCRw&sysid=1)
---
Friend, we made history in the House this week.
| [ **SAVE GAETZ** ](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24703%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=CPtaVtgyQqj15sDouI%2bBiQ&sysid=1)
---
For the first time in a long time, a politician was held accountable for breaking their promise to the American people.
Everyone knows Washington is broken, and lots of Republicans talk about how dysfunctional it is, but _**nobody ever does anything about it!**_
**That all changed when I stood up to the entire Swamp and removed Kevin McCarthy as Speaker.**
We’re not going to save this country from being destroyed if we keep doing business as usual. It’s going to take courage and decisive action to eradicate the culture of failure and decline that rots our Congress to its core.
Of course, the lobbyists and special interests who control the politicians in Washington want Congress to work just the way it does: FOR THEM!
**I want Congress to work the way the Founders intended: FOR YOU!**
Americans didn’t give Republicans the majority in the House to keep funding the Biden Pelosi agenda, they elected us to stop the insanity and get our country working for the people again.
**The RINOs in the Republican party are FURIOUS at me for exposing the fact they are bought and paid for by the Swamp, and now they’re plotting to EXPEL me from Congress.**
| [ **SAVE GAETZ** ](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24703%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=CPtaVtgyQqj15sDouI%2bBiQ&sysid=1)
---
**[We’re finally on the verge of ushering in REAL CHANGE to how Washington works, and I’m asking you to stand with me in this seminal moment.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24704%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=qxxBWye3cXVfBRP6bHpAOQ&sysid=1)**
If the Swamp expels me for taking a stand, it won’t happen again for a generation. Nothing will change, and our country will be doomed.
I’ve been humbled by the outpouring of support, and I’ll never apologize for funding my political operation exclusively from patriots that share my determination. Thanks for standing strong, Matt Gaetz
| [ ](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24702%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=vjFfm7F%2fErRSeeLPaHfCRw&sysid=1)

clean_body: They want revenge. | | Friend, we made history in the House this week. | For the first time in a long time, a politician was held accountable for breaking their promise to the American people. Everyone knows Washington is broken, and lots of Republicans talk about how dysfunctional it is, but nobody ever does anything about it! That all changed when I stood up to the entire Swamp and removed Kevin McCarthy as Speaker. We’re not going to save this country from being destroyed if we keep doing business as usual. It’s going to take courage and decisive action to eradicate the culture of failure and decline that rots our Congress to its core. Of course, the lobbyists and special interests who control the politicians in Washington want Congress to work just the way it does: FOR THEM! I want Congress to work the way the Founders intended: FOR YOU! Americans didn’t give Republicans the majority in the House to keep funding the Biden Pelosi agenda, they elected us to stop the insanity and get our country working for the people again. The RINOs in the Republican party are FURIOUS at me for exposing the fact they are bought and paid for by the Swamp, and now they’re plotting to EXPEL me from Congress. | If the Swamp expels me for taking a stand, it won’t happen again for a generation. Nothing will change, and our country will be doomed. I’ve been humbled by the outpouring of support, and I’ll never apologize for funding my political operation exclusively from patriots that share my determination. Thanks for standing strong, Matt Gaetz | | | | | | Your America News Your America News • 625 First Street #183 • Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Teach children to love America
body:
I have written a book

|
---
| | | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=931dfc8b23464730910bf5781db2a072&_e=ClGh3_dpzLg_CspYN6zONDU6RJjguWTlyJw5XK-MAr9LMU4PVqUnEAwTP4FKlWQRZtc4fixUp96dzkwhciVBx72_f-R95NQKQtJ5mdbk72txcsdDeHQJFqq5qE9sk8t3m_H88lt9m-Iep8SXpmNdlDVhqODi7la_Ud0WCRej_GuxfLvvDrWyfVRJSNSYyWIsvubNWTo1dC9uRQYGTGehsWaoNBO5kSfGQ2sIy111vC0FEgM9TuO0kI9tSTazEriXg8o8WA0aTBsFaz5KVKhHnT5BEcDkxUDcLNBFwEDY4XpLbwsBon53UjsmnqBjPI8AYSsFFNGYILCdtN_yrQotR6zUWjMIepws-UBADCEXEibtijHWKGiOJS-okj7L26uOeG9qNlNI0QAgM-pc71bZHDuHwgMSuM99FRLVzu1dX_0%3D)
---
| Fellow American,

Are you worried about the rising influence of radical ideologies in today's schools? I know I am.

That's why I have created the Little Patriots Program. This program provides curriculum for grades K-5 that teaches the REAL history of America, promoting the values of faith, liberty, community, and life that made our nation great.

This innovative approach makes learning history fun for our children while instilling in them a profound love and respect for our country. [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=931dfc8b23464730910bf5781db2a072&_e=ClGh3_dpzLg_CspYN6zONDU6RJjguWTlyJw5XK-MAr9LMU4PVqUnEAwTP4FKlWQRZtc4fixUp96dzkwhciVBx72_f-R95NQKQtJ5mdbk72txcsdDeHQJFqq5qE9sk8t3m_H88lt9m-Iep8SXpmNdlDVhqODi7la_Ud0WCRej_GuxfLvvDrWyfVRJSNSYyWIsvubNWTo1dC9uRQYGTGehsWaoNBO5kSfGQ2sIy111vC0FEgM9TuO0kI9tSTazEriXdhGozYjNzxwypXgI8LgcRjbqWDnQuhPk9SG4exOOoEZcGMn_w9kP_0O7sceF6cLDF4qj5iA5yEr8l2h_PYmZ0Z4GKOxwuu0ML18DhnYxI1kiGMeFj4UUN7uP3_vrofH6tuG0ZgvpFY-IKo9JjZUqYqrDKRM9YqyENbF62eF4nSw%3D) But, in order to keep this curriculum **free of charge** , I need your support.

I have written a book, [_Why America Matters_.](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=931dfc8b23464730910bf5781db2a072&_e=ClGh3_dpzLg_CspYN6zONDU6RJjguWTlyJw5XK-MAr9LMU4PVqUnEAwTP4FKlWQRZtc4fixUp96dzkwhciVBx72_f-R95NQKQtJ5mdbk72txcsdDeHQJFqq5qE9sk8t3m_H88lt9m-Iep8SXpmNdlDVhqODi7la_Ud0WCRej_GuxfLvvDrWyfVRJSNSYyWIsvubNWTo1dC9uRQYGTGehsWaoNBO5kSfGQ2sIy111vC0FEgM9TuO0kI9tSTazEriXdxSnFSTrnkfOm3GmSdYw5G5HZhc47wrLPqi8bUsV0KOcsK2MK-JmPngkK0sL8hzh0L2-mvOuxPch6Yw9YvDESEvA99vxI-ohbUOxKq5swtnxdLHY0wj9OuB6rkxKpYV1DnKCW73WyObrw2xgYLurf2LCNnyOVap6Zv1LEpfI_6E%3D) Intended for young readers, this book creates a deeper understanding of the importance of our country and the respect that it deserves.

I want to send you a copy for a gift of $25 or more. To give a gift use this secure link: [https://secure.americancornerstone.org/why-america-matters-donate](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=931dfc8b23464730910bf5781db2a072&_e=ClGh3_dpzLg_CspYN6zONDU6RJjguWTlyJw5XK-MAr9LMU4PVqUnEAwTP4FKlWQRZtc4fixUp96dzkwhciVBx72_f-R95NQKQtJ5mdbk72txcsdDeHQJFqq5qE9sk8t3m_H88lt9m-Iep8SXpmNdlDVhqODi7la_Ud0WCRej_GuxfLvvDrWyfVRJSNSYyWIsvubNWTo1dC9uRQYGTGehsWaoNBO5kSfGQ2sIy111vC0FEgM9TuO0kI9tSTazEriXwoVUm4sS4sOFoqRFbHes8wvQY2lWXrOirkHc_oO4LVIbcosfJBl_J400oelJQbG3e4v92XsL60BIwZYpmULeoY1K2pxqK8Umh6opqv_JlDEQXqm2lO-JWSXG4lcTW138ftAyTQPqMFFpn-0mqEeoFkvRa3a7omCW9XFMX6KCKqw%3D)

All proceeds from your donation will go directly to supporting our Little Patriots Program, ensuring that we can keep creating curricula and cartoons that show the history of America.

You can help shape the minds of our future leaders today and give them the best possible resources.

Your gift of $25 or more will get you access to my book, _Why America Matters_ , and help us reach more children with the truth.

Sincerely,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder and Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute

---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country's most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government's role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation's citizens.
---
|
---
| _Copyright(C) 2023 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved._

---

body:

---
**Jim Jordan.**
**The Democrats fear him, rightfully so.**
**He has proven his loyalty to the American people.**
**He stands with President Trump.**
This is Harriet Hageman and for these reasons,[ **I will be endorsing Congressman Jim Jordan for Speaker of the House.**](https://secure.winred.com/hageman-for-wyoming/pa-speaker-endorsement?utm_medium=emailrental&utm_source=pa_npa_pa&utm_campaign=20231005_harriethageman_jordan-v1_pa_hhageman_npa&utm_tc=CLW-20231007&utm_content=donate&amount=20.24&recurring=true %)
_Republicans are vulnerable right now._
To be frank - House Democrats are plotting for a nationwide takeover.
But they will not stand.
Jim Jordan will NEVER, EVER let this happen.
We're gearing up for a HUGE response to show the Radical Left we won't stand for this CORRUPT power grab.
That said - we need to know where you stand.
Will you add your name to the endorsement list for Jim Jordan?
I plan to bring this to our next meeting, so I need your response ASAP.
| [ **GO ON THE RECORD HERE** ](https://secure.winred.com/hageman-for-wyoming/pa-speaker-endorsement?utm_medium=emailrental&utm_source=pa_npa_pa&utm_campaign=20231005_harriethageman_jordan-v1_pa_hhageman_npa&utm_tc=CLW-20231007&utm_content=donate&amount=20.24&recurring=true %)

Thank you, Harriet Hageman

# Saturday, October 7, 2023
---|---
**Good morning! **On this day in 1765, the [Stamp Act Congress](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxszzFvhCAUwPFPA5uG9xQ4B4ZLE7fr0qGj4eChr0ExSs702zft3P2ff_L7fEwPz5m3-d2v5Goqkw-VXzSBamyD3YQyukSE1ElyYAZjbgBg5OIsRnymGCDZHrUHg3SzfUTSCP0AXrJDhR0oZdWgNZjWGmtuZDqjIWkkEL2iyLUc7VfhrS6U8nd50dGGssrsllr3U3R3gaPA8bqu9nlw9dvGwf8mAsdadg4Cx4_q1725h9q8lW0-6Dzl4eJ-cc58Git6Na-e89-4_sv8CQAA___aWlMP) convened to petition King George III to treat colonists equally with other British citizens. The colonial rebellion against Parliament's new tax on stamps lit the fuse of the American Revolution, and it wouldn't be long until British tea was floating in the harbor in Boston.

## Trump Endorses Jim Jordan for Speaker
Former President Trump has thrown his [full support](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskD2P3CAUAH8N7rD4MHhdUKRxt2lTWggeazbgZ8HbdfLvT3fSdVePRhrNn_t297nk4_HbV3CUcPOB8hs2KfjMld7UEF0CUKAHcNIu1t6klHbYnYQ52CgnvSQRlsmGmGRcdJqS8TejzZCdEkpLIWaxGCPtONvZ3sBqa2QyCiSbBMRM2MYn5oN2SOU_vqGNAetQ3E50dqZ_MbUytV7XNSb8d8DVPzlT64klUw6dqZXaq54cjoitQ-fPXPkTW_QHT9h4P8H_hcZ3fHXgAetZgIATki_fUoWDhubieeVScrczm8Sj-ly-YujHNR8BAAD__-IwaDU) behind Rep. Jim Jordan (R-OH) to be the next Speaker of the House. "He will be a GREAT Speaker of the House, & has my Complete & Total Endorsement!" Trump said on [social media](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsjzFv8yAQQH8NbIm4wxxmYPikT97SqVJHi8A5psLBwiRV_32Vzl3fk570Pi7zJeSS77e3sLHvS51D7PnJM6iTPaGeUSa_MCNryR7IEY0AQHL1S2CXYkgYjGI1Xjlh1MFGfR3AXUcts0eFGpSyyhkDdLZkaWTSZGAxyCAGxSn32s6fNd_7ykv5rk9u51g3Wfza-34I_U_gJHDq7dHXo8Ycysu_4KAah_K_3kNJ7-2x7QKnvR79EDgBAIwECM6SxgGNk82n_SuXkg-yYlC3LeTflOx_jv8EAAD__zC6V2Q). Speculation has grown in the last few days about Trump assuming the role himself, but he clarified that he'd serve "for a short time" only if necessary and that he wants Jordan to take the role. The fall of Kevin McCarthy and subsequent vacancy have generated so much attention that oddsmakers are taking bets on what will happen next. As of a few days ago, Rep. Steve Scalise (R-LA) was the betting favorite to assume the Speakership, but Jim Jordan has now surpassed him.
## Hunter Biden's Lawyer Leaves Case
A major player on Hunter Biden's defense team is withdrawing himself from Mr. Biden's federal gun charge case. After filing paperwork Friday, attorney [Richard Jones is calling it quits](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFu6yAUgOGnwRsWB2JwBoa7eMtdO1oEju1TEbCAhObtq3bu_A-_9H3c1pujSGn_7x5o25ZX5xu9cAXBDZdqlUOwG6JENaAFfdV6BgA9HFZ5NHcxiwmckWIOQU0AgGDUXXmn3EBWCqlACCOu0wR6NNroGbXSE2yTRGAXgYFaLuNnptQO3OI7v7CMPj-GaI_WzsrUPyYXJpfe-7jlr4S9_nQmlzNHauQrk8vxTA0Lv1PAxF1ruSR8807tCMX1yjcMWFzk-zNxf7iyI_eu4lBsODvFSFUbdhH7w1H8vbc_Lb4DAAD__2qCYb0), though he's given no real explanation yet as to why. In the official withdrawal document, Jones essentially states that his exit shouldn't have any adverse effects or kick up any undue prejudices against Mr. Biden's case.

Biden, facing three felony gun charges for lying on a 2018 firearms application, [pleaded not guilty](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFugzAURuGnMdtF1ya2yeChC1u6dkQu_gFXDo6MCcrbV-nc-SyfztdtvPmY4rZ8-jtcnfPopxqfGCWTJdWNqgluBhS6Bk6aqzG9lNI0q-uDZaOgZ55sbz362UupA8NqTGDdRKdYdZLZ8lVraVprrOlhOqPlrBWkuDBCrLm0PzludcWcXvmJ0k753iS31vrYRfch1CDUcJ5nW3BUlP3dhRoSFp-EGtZjqyj0HQM2CgfokeADbbnScsRUX7QcG02rLwt2Ckj-9AU05aNUehNJMnEn1NAUFx5nTCnuxooLL3cf05-m_vvmNwAA__-IMGU9) to all counts Tuesday.

Feel like staying in this weekend? A slew of new shows is hitting streaming platforms, starting with the long-awaited second season of _Loki_ on Disney+. Paramount+'s _Our Flag Means Death _is also dropping its second season, a good option if you're in the mood for a pirate adventure with some laughs. clean_body: Former President Trump has thrown his full support behind Rep. Jim Jordan (R-OH) to be the next Speaker of the House. | | | | | | Saturday, October 7, 2023 ---|--- Good morning! On this day in 1765, the convened to petition King George III to treat colonists equally with other British citizens. The colonial rebellion against Parliament's new tax on stamps lit the fuse of the American Revolution, and it wouldn't be long until British tea was floating in the harbor in Boston. In case you haven't signed up yet, to get on our mailing list and ensure you don't miss our next edition. Want to help keep The Flyover airborne? Check out our sponsor, . | Trump Endorses Jim Jordan for Speaker Former President Trump has thrown his behind Rep. Jim Jordan (R-OH) to be the next Speaker of the House. "He will be a GREAT Speaker of the House, & has my Complete & Total Endorsement!" Trump said on . Speculation has grown in the last few days about Trump assuming the role himself, but he clarified that he'd serve "for a short time" only if necessary and that he wants Jordan to take the role. The fall of Kevin McCarthy and subsequent vacancy have generated so much attention that oddsmakers are taking bets on what will happen next. As of a few days ago, Rep. Steve Scalise (R-LA) was the betting favorite to assume the Speakership, but Jim Jordan has now surpassed him. Hunter Biden's Lawyer Leaves Case A major player on Hunter Biden's defense team is withdrawing himself from Mr. Biden's federal gun charge case. After filing paperwork Friday, attorney , though he's given no real explanation yet as to why. In the official withdrawal document, Jones essentially states that his exit shouldn't have any adverse effects or kick up any undue prejudices against Mr. Biden's case. Biden, facing three felony gun charges for lying on a 2018 firearms application, to all counts Tuesday. Weekend Streaming Options Feel like staying in this weekend? Paramount+'s Our Flag Means Death is also dropping its second season, a good option if you're in the mood for a pirate adventure with some laughs. For the first time in a long time, a politician was held accountable for breaking their promise to the American people.
Everyone knows Washington is broken, and lots of Republicans talk about how dysfunctional it is, but _**nobody ever does anything about it!**_
**That all changed when I stood up to the entire Swamp and removed Kevin McCarthy as Speaker.**
We're not going to save this country from being destroyed if we keep doing business as usual. It's going to take courage and decisive action to eradicate the culture of failure and decline that rots our Congress to its core.
Of course, the lobbyists and special interests who control the politicians in Washington want Congress to work just the way it does: FOR THEM!
**I want Congress to work the way the Founders intended: FOR YOU!**
Americans didn't give Republicans the majority in the House to keep funding the Biden Pelosi agenda, they elected us to stop the insanity and get our country working for the people again.
**The RINOs in the Republican party are FURIOUS at me for exposing the fact they are bought and paid for by the Swamp, and now they 're plotting to EXPEL me from Congress.**

Everyone knows Washington is broken, and lots of Republicans talk about how dysfunctional it is, but nobody ever does anything about it! My story is simple. I was raised in rural poverty by a single mother on food stamps. At 18, I joined the Navy. After 26 years of service and 5 combat tours, I retired as a Navy SEAL Senior Chief. Now, I’m serving as a first-term Congressman for Wisconsin’s 3rd District.

I’m not a swamp-dwelling politician - I don’t have support from mega-donors or Super PACs. I’m just like you - **a concerned American who loves this nation and will always do the right thing.**

**[The Democrats are going at me with everything they’ve got, and I’ll need all the help I can get to protect this seat. body:
This will only take a moment

| |
---
| | | Hey there, it’s Young.

I know you’ve been getting a lot of emails recently so I won’t waste your time. I’m reaching out today to ask if I have your _**[official endorsement.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24723%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=BDD5TeoxjGtrBjGlp47iZg&sysid=1 "official endorsement.")**_

Will you please take a moment to sign your name and be my FIRST official endorsement for me and my campaign?

---
| | [ENDORSE YOUNG KIM](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24724%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=5VOn7VFhnJu6Lo8Eat5Ohw&sysid=1)
---

I need true patriots on my team now more than ever as we start ramping up the fight against Joe Biden and his Dem Machine.
---
| | [ENDORSE YOUNG KIM](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24724%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=5VOn7VFhnJu6Lo8Eat5Ohw&sysid=1)

_It won’t take but just a moment, Friend. I hope you’ll join my team._

- Young

Friend,

**FIRST** , I was named 1 of 18 Republicans under attack by the White House because Biden won my district in 2020.

**THEN** , far-Left groups pledged **MILLIONS** to defeat me.

**NOW** , I OFFICIALLY have a far-Left opponent.

This is urgent, Friend. Control of the House Majority will come down to my race. I have been one of the far-Left’s top targets the past two elections, and with the way things are going, this is going to be my toughest race yet.

The attacks against me are only going to get worse now that I have an opponent.

_**Defending the House Majority could come down to protecting my seat. **

**_[I am personally asking for your support. name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Teach children to love America
body:
I have written a book

|
---
| | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=acac740da89e45d3812c6ed33ed485ea&_e=cy7Fbl0Nko8j1WAD0sXFmLW2eYvetDldPGM6ct5MQ4kZakXbReGdzg5sLAzwFOfrLEw9ZjXNPxJK1Hyg8RJfr1miiczZlcMcpWFUGbuD7nSCf9cTeGGtyJ_-qpceQ6ssFBG5GXAitbWz5uH7IKe--F9q_4dvPIocpIdcyRfmfSOVNo7x7tacsKeI8bp6aR77lFXacMan6McUvUvqE0yrw3i-Qesm4fsCf1k-cHIzcJ0NK7g8yoztUFQrOrMct0qPF12llGrhaBFvYqH3xK0abv9-sgu3rS6XlAquR26HbP3LQaaAIkRZEEMzl2PwpjjYjkKYvgmGOgBI70ILjsjmKAIsb-hIBpcc4rouDnbjttDQSiHsb6AV6_UjSnDiNtZsmwwhLY_hoof2J_eXBX8WsNd1ZvSFBilABGus8Hj-HMQ%3D)
---
| Fellow American,

Are you worried about the rising influence of radical ideologies in today's schools? I know I am.

That's why I have created the Little Patriots Program. This program provides curriculum for grades K-5 that teaches the REAL history of America, promoting the values of faith, liberty, community, and life that made our nation great.

This innovative approach makes learning history fun for our children while instilling in them a profound love and respect for our country. [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=acac740da89e45d3812c6ed33ed485ea&_e=cy7Fbl0Nko8j1WAD0sXFmLW2eYvetDldPGM6ct5MQ4kZakXbReGdzg5sLAzwFOfrLEw9ZjXNPxJK1Hyg8RJfr1miiczZlcMcpWFUGbuD7nSCf9cTeGGtyJ_-qpceQ6ssFBG5GXAitbWz5uH7IKe--F9q_4dvPIocpIdcyRfmfSOVNo7x7tacsKeI8bp6aR77lFXacMan6McUvUvqE0yrw3i-Qesm4fsCf1k-cHIzcJ0NK7g8yoztUFQrOrMct0qP18K8qdlQCPEhx9sBTqDjtF-QNyEY3YDM467Ra-wn-lBkDjIS4mLfUwwJGyJvUNuKjBGFljUGQEIycvUgrXdR1uesKYIbpc3hE1Sk_lMEXh7e-v7YBg27AkT9bo5dlmOQ-9bXUpmCaa0v0WPk0MprGchcA8Rurd9zaGfKpSmTwF4%3D) But, in order to keep this curriculum **free of charge** , I need your support.

I have written a book, [_Why America Matters_.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=acac740da89e45d3812c6ed33ed485ea&_e=cy7Fbl0Nko8j1WAD0sXFmLW2eYvetDldPGM6ct5MQ4kZakXbReGdzg5sLAzwFOfrLEw9ZjXNPxJK1Hyg8RJfr1miiczZlcMcpWFUGbuD7nSCf9cTeGGtyJ_-qpceQ6ssFBG5GXAitbWz5uH7IKe--F9q_4dvPIocpIdcyRfmfSOVNo7x7tacsKeI8bp6aR77lFXacMan6McUvUvqE0yrw3i-Qesm4fsCf1k-cHIzcJ0NK7g8yoztUFQrOrMct0qPpgRzkyMPp17oy67B5YBUW2w2uzxLZ9d5C0TNKzVJxo6jpp3q3-6f2sZVLGj46JPcQC8sDEQ-0dr68rTpEFPwnSvq6oPfaWw8qZIIyZ7Z9M3ScBT1fhgqOXGx7srNIuJsavJdCQyOCUAosq919xV5A6XKtxCK_5gepkdTmDuSMyc%3D) Intended for young readers, this book creates a deeper understanding of the importance of our country and the respect that it deserves.

I want to send you a copy for a gift of $25 or more. To give a gift use this secure link: [https://secure.americancornerstone.org/why-america-matters-donate](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=acac740da89e45d3812c6ed33ed485ea&_e=cy7Fbl0Nko8j1WAD0sXFmLW2eYvetDldPGM6ct5MQ4kZakXbReGdzg5sLAzwFOfrLEw9ZjXNPxJK1Hyg8RJfr1miiczZlcMcpWFUGbuD7nSCf9cTeGGtyJ_-qpceQ6ssFBG5GXAitbWz5uH7IKe--F9q_4dvPIocpIdcyRfmfSOVNo7x7tacsKeI8bp6aR77lFXacMan6McUvUvqE0yrw3i-Qesm4fsCf1k-cHIzcJ0NK7g8yoztUFQrOrMct0qPbCpz3igIMs70MVYXkPasz0OTuuq_PMUpGKWt9Z9vdI0qhM1rxBrzulMscCerVAtUxLxb-EqJDL0wXGJa8Fl8ia6Y47YAXgveQO2EUPyqc6Jzw4xFhJbO7VFomPBU_nOCb0plVFwqdCmBCQWVRxeawmm0ApxwgYz-a97IVKGTwa8%3D)

All proceeds from your donation will go directly to supporting our Little Patriots Program, ensuring that we can keep creating curricula and cartoons that show the history of America.

You can help shape the minds of our future leaders today and give them the best possible resources.

Your gift of $25 or more will get you access to my book, _Why America Matters_ , and help us reach more children with the truth.

Sincerely,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder and Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute

clean_body: I have written a book | | | | | Fellow American, Are you worried about the rising influence of radical ideologies in today's schools? I know I am. That's why I have created the Little Patriots Program. This program provides curriculum for grades K-5 that teaches the REAL history of America, promoting the values of faith, liberty, community, and life that made our nation great. This innovative approach makes learning history fun for our children while instilling in them a profound love and respect for our country. But, in order to keep this curriculum free of charge , I need your support. I have written a book, Intended for young readers, this book creates a deeper understanding of the importance of our country and the respect that it deserves. I want to send you a copy for a gift of $25 or more. To give a gift use this secure link: All proceeds from your donation will go directly to supporting our Little Patriots Program, ensuring that we can keep creating curricula and cartoons that show the history of America. You can help shape the minds of our future leaders today and give them the best possible resources. Your gift of $25 or more will get you access to my book, Why America Matters , and help us reach more children with the truth. Sincerely, Dr. Ben Carson Founder and Chairman American Cornerstone Institute | | Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country's most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government's role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation's citizens. | | Copyright(C) 2023 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved. name: Pro Life Update
subject: Unlocking the Untold Traits of the Savior Generals
body:
I'm pleased to share with you a free resource that will ignite your curiosity and challenge your perceptions.

| | | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zj8d6buls2go4995nl1cjjatjd93ihovp14jj1kg_rp22sh2s8i66p73cdgeeoj6c9h2bs)
---
---
| | Dear Friend, [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zrn9fffpqvvgmive22j9nv3gs93kb0fc1j798hoo_rp22sh2s8i66p73cdgeeoj6c9h2bs)
Throughout pivotal moments in history, we have witnessed the remarkable transformation of seemingly lost causes, orchestrated by the savior generals--visionary leaders displaying unparalleled expertise.

Today, I'm pleased to share with you a free resource that will ignite your curiosity and challenge your perceptions. Esteemed historian and Hoover Senior Fellow, **Victor Davis Hanson** , has authored a groundbreaking eBook--_Victory and the Savior Generals_ --a captivating exploration into the minds of these exceptional leaders.

You can secure your free copy today by clicking on this exclusive link: **[https://resources.hoover.org/victory-and-the-savior-generals](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z4mosj8bpg4bshucdud1t2gsd82ic44ft422o2gg_rp22sh2s8i66p73cdgeeoj6c9h2bs)**

Inside its digital pages, you'll embark on a journey that uncovers the defining traits of these savior generals. Their ingenuity, contrarian spirit, and unwavering courage breathed new life into seemingly lost causes. Their profound understanding of conflict, rejection of complacency, adaptability to change, and alignment with societal values contributed to their monumental successes.

This is your opportunity to unravel the secrets of history's most influential leaders, unlocking invaluable lessons that resonate even in the present day.

Claim your complimentary copy of _Victory and the Savior Generals_ now through this secure link: **[https://resources.hoover.org/victory-and-the-savior-generals](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zth8de52um0jh52i0etj5dbl6650lppqbhdlbo0o_rp22sh2s8i66p73cdgeeoj6c9h2bs)**

Wishing you a wonderful journey through the pages of history!

Greg

Greg Stamps | Online Development
Hoover Institution | Stanford University

---
_With its eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research organization that seeks to improve the human condition by advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred years, Hoover’s work has directly led to policies that have produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the United States and around the world._

Hoover Institution 434 Galvez Mall Stanford University Stanford CA USA 94305

| | | Hello all,

**This is Newt Gingrich.** I just accepted an important mission asked of me by the Majority Whip.

He is looking for some guidance as we enter the early stages of the impeachment inquiry and the final quarter of the year. Both are critical to the future of our country.

So allow me to be blunt:

I'm kindly asking you for 5 minutes of your time to fill out his Official Majority Leadership Audit:

Once submitted, your responses will be logged, formatted, and transmitted directly to the Majority Whip's office.

_Again, it 's only a few questions. I've been assured it won't take you very long._

Do you think you can do that for me?

**[Here's your access link once more.](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c5b295768491426eacd434b1a6c90330&_e=8JMx_YjKs69lEWTgzgdunbpbMxITJWg6clqsuhKvq62TzQ9xWYtTQYt3DGe2W7LWmET6DDaPB4wB9iIpjh--W-iFFZ5CEs5hMhCw4FtGLTJGC-l-0gqHgfq-ROGK1iRCp3JbiHoL-TcdsIHSguMBDYTKaQ_33usLSPTQGBhc71J_hTPWoG6Kb8KgsOXe-R0R9KHW9qsmGq_Q5XBlKrdPgyxy0xfldRnKa3eekZ_FSgzQEq1tr3s_TXnwS1bVK4u0MFBb2-ItxlQsJQ5cGB172BLSSrtQauNHclWACTxHwZ7amAEAH52zsq7q6H2RuOxXwKBBCPnxobZvDNWbGkQ5xQbL-dkDbKxvSLpSkGn4_7A95IdgMEz8r5V3K8yqYSYEHVenC5kzcZK-edcNu826rOt0djXP3drV6xanwKtjqVjaC2kB0hRn0EVVRdfObaLrBHuKYRIzMV674o8wGQKc-K12nR8MgRI66cBssN-6y7g%3D "Here’s your access link once more.")**

Thank you, Patriot. I mean that.

clean_body: Now, I'm kindly asking you for 5 minutes of your time. | | | | | Hello all, This is Newt Gingrich. I just accepted an important mission asked of me by the Majority Whip. He is looking for some guidance as we enter the early stages of the impeachment inquiry and the final quarter of the year. Both are critical to the future of our country. So allow me to be blunt: I'm kindly asking you for 5 minutes of your time to fill out his Official Majority Leadership Audit: | | "FILL IT OUT HERE" Once submitted, your responses will be logged, formatted, and transmitted directly to the Majority Whip's office. Again, it 's only a few questions. I've been assured it won't take you very long. Do you think you can do that for me? "Here’s your access link once more." Thank you, Patriot. name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature is Needed: Protect wildlife habitat and cultural sites
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2037901?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | **URGENT ACTION NEEDED: Stop fossil fuel companies from DESTROYING a rare ocean ecosystem valued by the Indigenous Chumash Tribe!**[_**Sign before the October 25th comment deadline!**_](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2037902?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) The proposed Chumash Heritage National Marine Sanctuary is the first-ever Tribal-nominated sanctuary. If approved, it would permanently **protect more than 5,600 square miles** of Central California’s coastal waters. There are few other regions in the entire world like this one, Friend. Warm southern currents and cool northern currents meet to create a rich, diverse ecosystem where you can find splashing otters, migrating whales, leatherback sea turtles, and hundreds of other species. It also contains **submerged ancient cultural sites of the Chumash people.** But these precious waters and coasts are currently UNPROTECTED from greedy fossil fuel companies who want to drill in our oceans, **threatening oil spills, creating toxic pollution, and disturbing wildlife!** **NOAA is considering permanent protections for Chumash – but the VERY LAST comment period is closing soon!** [**_Please, Friend, tell the National Atmospheric and Oceanic Administration to STOP greedy fossil fuel companies from hurting our oceans and approve the Chumash Heritage National Marine Sanctuary!_**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2037903?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2037904?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Approval of the Chumash Heritage National Marine Sanctuary will set a precedent. In addition to protecting the oceans, cultural heritage, and wildlife within its own borders, this marine sanctuary will**open the door for more Tribal-led protections and management** of some of our country’s most important waters and lands.
Some Chumash elders have been fighting to protect these coasts for their entire lives. Don’t let all their work be for nothing! **We need 236 more signatures from your area to hit our goal!** [**_Amplify Tribal demands and help protect one of the world’s most unique ocean ecosystems before the comment period closes!_**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2037905?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2037904?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Standing with you,
Marcie Keever
Oceans and vessels program director,
Friends of the Earth**
|

My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States.

I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor"** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs, stood up for Israel even when others refused, and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. **And I 'll do it as your next President. **

As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.
