Which is why I want to have an honest conversation with YOU. | | My very best, | Nikki Haley | | | | | | "NikkiHaleyMerch" | | "Claim Your Mug" | | More About Nikki Haley | "NikkiHaleyPodium" My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States. I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again. I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country. I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A. I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer. I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better. As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor" because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery. At the UN I fought for America, made sure our allies knew we had their backs, stood up for Israel even when others refused, and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names. I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. And I 'll do it as your next President. As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future. name: =?utf-8?Q?Douglas=20Carswell?=
subject: Is school choice unconstitutional in Mississippi? No.
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/leadershipacademy-11571198?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
| Dear Friend,

**There has been some good news about school choice in our state.** First, Mississippi’s Authoriser Board approved our state’s first charter high school, Clarksdale Collegiate Prep.

**Then on SuperTalk this week, both the Lieutenant Governor, Delbert Hosemann, and future House Speaker, Jason White, sounded wonderfully upbeat about school choice.** Delbert Hosemann even said he expected to see “multiple school choice bills” presented during the 2024 state legislative session. **Three cheers! **
---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=8e5550104e&e=5703353baa)
---
_**Had enough of ‘woke’ ideology? Then you might enjoy a video that skewers this dull, sterile, humorless dogma - and if you like it, pass it on! **_
| **However, the Lieutenant Governor also introduced a note of caution, suggesting that such reforms may have to be restricted in their scope.** Why? Because he said, under Mississippi’s constitution “you can’t put government money into private schools”.

**The Lieutenant Governor raises an important point.** As the case for universal school choice becomes increasingly difficult to ignore, we need to examine what Mississippi’s constitution actually says. **Does our state constitution really preclude Mississippi from implementing Arkansas-type reform? **

Section 208 of the Mississippi Constitution states that:

_“No religious or other sect or sects shall ever control any part of the school or other educational funds of this state; nor shall any funds be appropriated toward the support of any sectarian school, or to any school that at the time of receiving such appropriation is not conducted as a free school.” _

It could not be clearer, opponents of school choice will say. No public money can be appropriated for private schools.

**Except, of course, with Arkansas-type school choice, public money is not appropriated for private schools. It is appropriated to families, who receive 90 percent of the prior year’s net public school aid budget paid into their child’s Education Freedom Account.** This they can then spend on a school of their choice, public, private or home school.

**Claiming that under such a scheme money is being appropriated to private schools would be like claiming that part of your wages are being appropriated to Target, simply because you chose to spend some of your salary there. **
---
|
---
_Governor Sarah Huckabee Sanders has made school choice happen._
| **The argument that Mississippi’s constitution prevents universal school choice is not a slam dunk after all.**

In his interview on SuperTalk, the Lieutenant Governor was also quite right to refer to a case currently before the courts concerning the use of pandemic relief funds paid to private schools.

**During Covid, large sums of federal money were provided to states like Mississippi to distribute to eligible recipients for disaster relief and to spur economic recovery.** The Mississippi legislature, in turn, authorized a state agency to distribute about $10 million of those federal funds to private schools for infrastructure improvements.

**This prompted a legal challenge brought by the activist group _Parents for Public Schools_ , who argued that Section 208 made such payments unconstitutional. A Hinds County chancellor agreed.** The Mississippi Supreme Court is now reviewing the case on appeal.

**What if the Supreme Court rules that it was unconstitutional to give $10 million of pandemic relief funds to private schools?** Would that mean Arkansas-type school choice is now considered unconstitutional in our state, as Mr. Hosemann seemed to imply?

**Not at all. In fact, our legal division, the Mississippi Justice Institute, led by the brilliant Aaron Rice, recently addressed that very question in the pandemic relief litigation.** Teaming up with our friends at the Institute for Justice, we filed a “friend of the court” brief with the Mississippi Supreme Court to ensure the point was clear.
---
|
---
_Aaron Rice, Mississippi Justice Institute_
| Here is what we told the Court.

**_Even if the Court ruled that the provision of $10 million in federal relief funds to private schools was unconstitutional, that decision would _not_ prevent Mississippi from enacting school choice programs, including those available to families using non-public schools. _**

**Why not? Because the Mississippi Constitution only prohibits the appropriation of state education dollars for _institutional_ aid to non-public schools. It does not prevent the state from providing _individual_ aid to students who choose to use those funds for tuition at non-public schools.** Indeed, to avoid future confusion on that point, we asked the Court to explicitly say so in its ruling.

Moreover, as our legal brief points out, it is not just the text of the Constitution on our side. Precedent from the Mississippi Supreme Court supports our view as well. Over 80 years ago, the Court decided _Chance v. Mississippi State Textbook Rating & Purchasing Board_, 200 So. 706 (Miss., 1941). In that case, the Court upheld a law that appropriated funds to purchase textbooks and distribute them to students, including those in non-public schools. Why? Because the program was designed to benefit the students, not the schools.

**Far from precluding school choice, Mississippi’s constitutional law is favourable to it.**

There are plenty of legitimate (if misguided) arguments against having universal school choice in Mississippi. Claiming that the Mississippi Constitution prevents it is not one of them.

Have a wonderful weekend!
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=a8dc8ed989&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
Warm regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO
---
|
---

Moreover, as our legal brief points out, it is not just the text of the Constitution on our side. Precedent from the Mississippi Supreme Court supports our view as well. Over 80 years ago, the Court decided Chance v. Mississippi State Textbook Rating & Purchasing Board, 200 So. 706 (Miss., 1941). In that case, the Court upheld a law that appropriated funds to purchase textbooks and distribute them to students, including those in non-public schools. Why? Because the program was designed to benefit the students, not the schools. Far from precluding school choice, Mississippi’s constitutional law is favourable to it. There are plenty of legitimate (if misguided) arguments against having universal school choice in Mississippi. Claiming that the Mississippi Constitution prevents it is not one of them. Have a wonderful weekend! | "Forward this email to a friend!" | | Warm regards, Douglas Carswell President & CEO | | |

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Teach children to love America
body:
I have written a book

|
---
| | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=536fa7014dc14e1aa443f61fa8ffcac2&_e=T_Sd6SeCbZRCTbnf8cHDyNCVHQmDHp_rC8QZE59yMPtfcJEORuseV8mcC9dpOJK7_8m_xgGsF2Murj1IcdN5h1xGbIyKSL6UHN8hbAw-8esD_9WIKfMn1Zq6QAO2b2tetjzHWCmEI0EzdVjb8VqPJ9gUYC18ic4lNRZe4u3KkYR9Ay7JDiJ7IWPwv7qFmkDX1yPz58JqvxrM6GmQFhR68TXQICOHHZefY0ehaZeRA8nwndFk9zdW7gi2i3vlVNYbwRn-BY-3QMSVoNm184MBOgdVBZEG-tcomIN0uG0pwFBcoBLPOIG64kbySrakwCFv9ldeH6OFNDbZe_Q0M6W3tAuOKwAVrM4a_5Sj_D6__D3tPBM4XWmbU7Ht0BmS7g7ylV-tJ60t46iyv9kNM0FFH1ypihgOQw1zGVXV6mnCa9M%3D)
---
| Fellow American,

Are you worried about the rising influence of radical ideologies in today's schools? I know I am.

That's why I have created the Little Patriots Program. This program provides curriculum for grades K-5 that teaches the REAL history of America, promoting the values of faith, liberty, community, and life that made our nation great.

This innovative approach makes learning history fun for our children while instilling in them a profound love and respect for our country. [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=536fa7014dc14e1aa443f61fa8ffcac2&_e=T_Sd6SeCbZRCTbnf8cHDyNCVHQmDHp_rC8QZE59yMPtfcJEORuseV8mcC9dpOJK7_8m_xgGsF2Murj1IcdN5h1xGbIyKSL6UHN8hbAw-8esD_9WIKfMn1Zq6QAO2b2tetjzHWCmEI0EzdVjb8VqPJ9gUYC18ic4lNRZe4u3KkYR9Ay7JDiJ7IWPwv7qFmkDX1yPz58JqvxrM6GmQFhR68TXQICOHHZefY0ehaZeRA8nwndFk9zdW7gi2i3vlVNYbh19Xe9JP53NnsYzi0ANei_90klg6qHv5jm9D2jRuOYcVLfOPaTyxvRDRxAwdNGr0mgwVPnnFUGJqr4RPzV6GEDeJHtTnrIRgsKFlBsUTNna1lNO2s6ce3084BdVf7Mw8uoT6SOBLG8IgcM-ZbrTKCPxPMcgiu33gd09c3Mc2tHQ%3D) But, in order to keep this curriculum **free of charge** , I need your support.

I have written a book, [_Why America Matters_.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=536fa7014dc14e1aa443f61fa8ffcac2&_e=T_Sd6SeCbZRCTbnf8cHDyNCVHQmDHp_rC8QZE59yMPtfcJEORuseV8mcC9dpOJK7_8m_xgGsF2Murj1IcdN5h1xGbIyKSL6UHN8hbAw-8esD_9WIKfMn1Zq6QAO2b2tetjzHWCmEI0EzdVjb8VqPJ9gUYC18ic4lNRZe4u3KkYR9Ay7JDiJ7IWPwv7qFmkDX1yPz58JqvxrM6GmQFhR68TXQICOHHZefY0ehaZeRA8nwndFk9zdW7gi2i3vlVNYbeHi6vCn29-bB576hUqxseCEyZ4jbERfsZDbh2_42IelgGdcHkypbxuNvZQBseT3EgIvOLddzLVITJgkuWMNJ8DODZCNczBINRgKXB9aTCly26jfETEMNTWkNtyLLtrTNfGmvr739t3Sjkb56ra9xPZeAaWAfydjsQpe6qkuE3cg%3D) Intended for young readers, this book creates a deeper understanding of the importance of our country and the respect that it deserves.

I want to send you a copy for a gift of $25 or more. To give a gift use this secure link: [https://secure.americancornerstone.org/why-america-matters-donate](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=536fa7014dc14e1aa443f61fa8ffcac2&_e=T_Sd6SeCbZRCTbnf8cHDyNCVHQmDHp_rC8QZE59yMPtfcJEORuseV8mcC9dpOJK7_8m_xgGsF2Murj1IcdN5h1xGbIyKSL6UHN8hbAw-8esD_9WIKfMn1Zq6QAO2b2tetjzHWCmEI0EzdVjb8VqPJ9gUYC18ic4lNRZe4u3KkYR9Ay7JDiJ7IWPwv7qFmkDX1yPz58JqvxrM6GmQFhR68TXQICOHHZefY0ehaZeRA8nwndFk9zdW7gi2i3vlVNYbUl_EQtrbUBrgPGjdft1CJPuXM7cNjgje7f52MLz0WUKX1BqhlXwe3g8EE4X2pfmi8tIUKiu6dkO0fX-0O3k1gm7c3oTLLFYGU-vNF5ld30f24r8ZJ-He1gzA68kV4aF8bSMgScqkv3uhY6XfhWM7CkM6CYS7h3aisQIrj2keS6M%3D)

All proceeds from your donation will go directly to supporting our Little Patriots Program, ensuring that we can keep creating curricula and cartoons that show the history of America.

You can help shape the minds of our future leaders today and give them the best possible resources.

Your gift of $25 or more will get you access to my book, _Why America Matters_ , and help us reach more children with the truth.

Sincerely,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder and Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute

That's why I have created the Little Patriots Program. This program provides curriculum for grades K-5 that teaches the REAL history of America, promoting the values of faith, liberty, community, and life that made our nation great.

This innovative approach makes learning history fun for our children while instilling in them a profound love and respect for our country. [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6721416642874961bb861353642823e5&_e=kozBT406jdv1e_QosYHNLpw46_ihYof95n8Oiq0AEoTqg7o_3Ngt9xKx0fzwCWeyWTsut_5F99zdJo4r8Xu5bfks93d8gLPwJXpeRMQc-yhHZ4mvth7bUSTQo0UJprrGGFINhBTW0M4O-cOM9NFLLRaFZKMEm2iEy4avT4nkvGEvIQih8Ui51NzlgzEq6JN5IpbiSj1NIcukVmcXxJx0A3WwaaAi4fafRgFa4pOZCemRH-EQ2HvdyrqsGRxUzrcoiFDgZTg5kIvx7McEYheewS3Kz2jOv9ByZNkSMvItChDzVg7x0jhWLAs0AXfIeIygJhas-ii3Ue2Hgkugoh-CflM4An715AUh7DSeXecJ-2JfwpXr1V-Vh3wD4LQYqOzVcILuawaJEArH6DOl3pW2wsdW0It35QQ2E9Zju6y2xaE%3D) But, in order to keep this curriculum **free of charge** , I need your support.

I have written a book, [_Why America Matters_.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6721416642874961bb861353642823e5&_e=kozBT406jdv1e_QosYHNLpw46_ihYof95n8Oiq0AEoTqg7o_3Ngt9xKx0fzwCWeyWTsut_5F99zdJo4r8Xu5bfks93d8gLPwJXpeRMQc-yhHZ4mvth7bUSTQo0UJprrGGFINhBTW0M4O-cOM9NFLLRaFZKMEm2iEy4avT4nkvGEvIQih8Ui51NzlgzEq6JN5IpbiSj1NIcukVmcXxJx0A3WwaaAi4fafRgFa4pOZCemRH-EQ2HvdyrqsGRxUzrcoMEXD1GE3wZclvmd8sFKmDDW4KfCxctSlkoS5Y9eQqR-4cOmGI7CNDMayvovVNdT2OFgmRZ8hA6crobAVqMyNJpenQca76svTlvl-lJ2bavzogJ2-yOk8eEzsScDEzzxEFypic24Dd5apmiivQLfk_r8qI6zZ9S3-PM30O5TXxiI%3D) Intended for young readers, this book creates a deeper understanding of the importance of our country and the respect that it deserves.

I want to send you a copy for a gift of $25 or more. To give a gift use this secure link: [https://secure.americancornerstone.org/why-america-matters-donate](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6721416642874961bb861353642823e5&_e=kozBT406jdv1e_QosYHNLpw46_ihYof95n8Oiq0AEoTqg7o_3Ngt9xKx0fzwCWeyWTsut_5F99zdJo4r8Xu5bfks93d8gLPwJXpeRMQc-yhHZ4mvth7bUSTQo0UJprrGGFINhBTW0M4O-cOM9NFLLRaFZKMEm2iEy4avT4nkvGEvIQih8Ui51NzlgzEq6JN5IpbiSj1NIcukVmcXxJx0A3WwaaAi4fafRgFa4pOZCemRH-EQ2HvdyrqsGRxUzrcorTPNWdQ5L6jKbLpvhNyyUSStqh8hRWX3qZnv_QgMFkbitNAq5KCmnk7tGLStcBN9TPKhCAZizs3JaAZO23ZlflQQyOxBdigcF_19Ki3YNfQiHM97TMa-poOk7Z58oBEOu0QFzwi-ZNYDTCejT3LuDUDPso_cgiBdo2IMbn_Mz58%3D)

All proceeds from your donation will go directly to supporting our Little Patriots Program, ensuring that we can keep creating curricula and cartoons that show the history of America.

You can help shape the minds of our future leaders today and give them the best possible resources.

Your gift of $25 or more will get you access to my book, _Why America Matters_ , and help us reach more children with the truth.

Sincerely,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder and Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute

name: VoteVets
subject: “A woke militar that can’t fight or win…”
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
No matter what happens in this election cycle, one thing will always be true:
#
Derek -
No matter what happens in this election cycle, one thing will always be true:
**No one — absolutely no one — will fight harder to hold Donald Trump and the Republican Party accountable for their disdain for Veterans and Military families.**
It wasn’t enough that Trump called people who sign-up to serve “suckers and losers.” He’s doubled down, saying, “We have a woke military that can’t fight or win”
And who will ever forget his attack on Gold Star families like Khizr and Ghazala Khan, or saying of John McCain that he “preferred war heroes who weren’t captured.”
But it’s not just him.
Marjorie Taylor Greene said enlisting is like “throwing your life away.”
Kevin McCarthy, Elise Stefanik, Josh Hawley and more... attacking the military and those who serve is a mainstream position of the Republican Party.
It used to be that most people thought “Veteran” was synonymous with “conservative.”
Not anymore.
Because of the work we’ve done, we’re flipping that narrative on its head, we’re turning out Veterans and Military families for Democrats, and we’re elevating the voices of Veterans in some of the most powerful ads.
But we cannot do it alone. So please:
[**Can you make a $3 contribution to VoteVets today? We will put it right to work elevating the voices of Veterans to hold Republicans accountable for their attacks on those who serve.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-oct23.zemByr&refcode=em231007&t=1&akid=17403%2E3013755%2EE0vIPN)

It wasn’t enough that Trump called people who sign-up to serve “suckers and losers.” He’s doubled down, saying, “We have a woke military that can’t fight or win” And who will ever forget his attack on Gold Star families like Khizr and Ghazala Khan, or saying of John McCain that he “preferred war heroes who weren’t captured.” But it’s not just him. Marjorie Taylor Greene said enlisting is like “throwing your life away.” Kevin McCarthy, Elise Stefanik, Josh Hawley and more... attacking the military and those who serve is a mainstream position of the Republican Party. It used to be that most people thought “Veteran” was synonymous with “conservative.” Not anymore. Because of the work we’ve done, we’re flipping that narrative on its head, we’re turning out Veterans and Military families for Democrats, and we’re elevating the voices of Veterans in some of the most powerful ads. But we cannot do it alone. So please: If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | ** | | | | | | | ** Thank you, The team at VoteVets PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS.ORG, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE’S COMMITTEE

# Answering the Call
---
| | [GET TICKETS](https://alfonsoforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bb75364011dcc8a637f1fdd6f&id=7d9c5f4667&e=16d812e81c)
---

Join us for an unforgettable evening of unity and purpose at our upcoming fundraiser event! We are proud to invite you to be a part of this remarkable gathering where we celebrate the spirit of democratic veterans and champions for change. As we come together, we'll be fighting for a better tomorrow, one filled with hope, progress, and a brighter future for all.
Our event promises an inspiring atmosphere where you can connect with like-minded individuals who share a passion for positive transformation. By purchasing your tickets, you not only secure your place at this extraordinary gathering but also contribute to a cause that truly matters. Come, be part of this dynamic movement, and help us pave the way for a more equitable and just world. Your presence at our fundraiser event is not just a ticket; it's a ticket to a future where we stand united as champions for change, democratic veterans in the fight for a better tomorrow. Don't miss out – get your tickets now and let's make history together!
| [GET TICKETS](https://alfonsoforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bb75364011dcc8a637f1fdd6f&id=aa59e11822&e=16d812e81c)

| | Local and statewide elections are underway across the country! And these races make a big difference in people’s daily lives. Voters have the opportunity to elect and re-elect candidates who will move our communities forward — on issues ranging from access to healthcare, to tackling the climate crisis, to funding for our public schools, to ensuring equal access to the ballot box. **So to that end, Fair Fight is proud to announce two new endorsements of voting rights champions in Louisiana and South Carolina.** We’re equipping them with resources to fundraise, organize, and advocate to protect the freedom to vote for years to come. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71132983/431270667/-1224638947?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20231007_f_nationalendorsements_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZTkxNWQwNC0xMTY1LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1NPHVFxckkbdd9ZDgEDyWtrwQnf64q4pBLR56u5t7BE=) We're working to ensure that these candidates stay in office and continue to make progress for their communities — and we rely on grassroots support to make it all possible. [**Will you make a donation today to help support and elect even more pro-voter candidates across the country?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71132985/431270670/-1224638947?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20231007_f_nationalendorsements_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZTkxNWQwNC0xMTY1LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1NPHVFxckkbdd9ZDgEDyWtrwQnf64q4pBLR56u5t7BE=) Thank you! clean_body: Local and statewide elections are underway across the country! | | | Local and statewide elections are underway across the country! And these races make a big difference in people’s daily lives. Voters have the opportunity to elect and re-elect candidates who will move our communities forward — on issues ranging from access to healthcare, to tackling the climate crisis, to funding for our public schools, to ensuring equal access to the ballot box. So to that end, Fair Fight is proud to announce two new endorsements of voting rights champions in Louisiana and South Carolina. We’re equipping them with resources to fundraise, organize, and advocate to protect the freedom to vote for years to come. = We're working to ensure that these candidates stay in office and continue to make progress for their communities — and we rely on grassroots support to make it all possible. = Thank you! Friend,

NOT be lectured by Republicans who grovel and bend the knee for

town and borrowed against the future of our future generations.

I fund my political operation by asking Patriotic Americans for
$10, $20, and $30 at a time.

We're
finally on the verge of ushering in REAL CHANGE to how Washington
works, and I'm asking you to stand with me in this seminal

JOIN THE MOVEMENT. DEMAND CHANGE 🇺🇸

clean_body: You've Been Attacked Friend, It's Matt Gaetz, and I need your immediate attention. I was just ATTACKED and BOOED by RINOs for asking you to weigh in and contribute to this fight. I will NOT be lectured by Republicans who grovel and bend the knee for the lobbyists and special interests who have hollowed out this town and borrowed against the future of our future generations. These lobbyists and special interests own our leadership and HATE that I fund my political operation by asking Patriotic Americans for $10, $20, and $30 at a time. We're finally on the verge of ushering in REAL CHANGE to how Washington works, and I'm asking you to stand with me in this seminal moment: 🇺🇸 JOIN THE MOVEMENT. DEMAND CHANGE 🇺🇸 The Lobbyists and Special Interests want Congress to work just the way it does: FOR THEM! I want Congress to work the way the Founders intended: FOR YOU! I've got more enemies than ever, just because I won't bend the knee. We've just ousted Kevin McCarthy. But the fight is not over. Now, we must elect a Speaker. Stand with me. 🇺🇸 JOIN THE MOVEMENT. DEMAND CHANGE 🇺🇸 🇺🇸 CHIP IN $10 🇺🇸 🇺🇸 CHIP IN $20 🇺🇸 🇺🇸 CHIP IN $30 🇺🇸 🇺🇸 CHIP IN ANY AMOUNT 🇺🇸 Thanks for standing with me, Matt Gaetz FIGHT WITH MATT GAETZ >> PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ Copyright © 2023 Friends of Matt Gaetz, All rights reserved. name: Ryan Mackenzie
subject: The truth about MAGA
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mackenzie for Congress
body:
The Left spews hate and threatens Republicans but we are the issue? I have had enough of the lies. |
---
[](http://links.mackenzieforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e09c1376a1134fb5bbc6c87f9d1914fb&_m=6c13e22b6d7b4aa7b79eb814ded1088f&_e=xZ6aV64iAec_rDKtuQi_vx5pMC9FhNkufVkmd2JPHXs6_qH4tZtZLfi03i_OnMC761H8al5OflUl-3O0N4SeY7TN18EpY3GcWqFZdiUXWQGf97UiePzd5l8ci-kbXeYrlLP0GnzTXEujbAbmymT1EQ6x4rlEACXj9UFhWVDmEUQJcz66B-hOl8ausfkyxQk8Mt6Dc-C4Q-XoZuYSefxi81xwp8IExAO6oTDmSt0uzaNaFyMtcPl_cN-Cttx9NH56bV1p1ARxJ9pj9q9lbDLMSd_s47eioTdlkpaNK6Mq5EYF_vtPd1E_mXdLpPc1hNY_qWx3JRMaQitYUuBoe7op5QF2e0B89ujg8JZdjpsDYWmbqZMB9YChtcPPk3Ae8zKjdXlHNVJ5OkEKp80ILDiuQQ%3D%3D)

Fellow American,

Just last year in Philadelphia, the birthplace of our republic, President Biden declared that Donald Trump and the Republicans who support him represent an extreme threat to our country. This has been echoed and parroted by every Democrat since Trump.

A Democrat Congressman from New York put out a memo with talking points referring to “Republican Nazis.”

Hillary Clinton in a CNN interview suggested, “there needs to be a formal deprogramming of the cult members" in reference to Republicans who favor President Trump.

Their playbook is simple, declare your Republican opponent a MAGA extremist and hope that scares people. [**Here’s the truth, Friend – it’s because the Democrats don’t have a plan or platform to stand on.**](http://links.mackenzieforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e09c1376a1134fb5bbc6c87f9d1914fb&_m=6c13e22b6d7b4aa7b79eb814ded1088f&_e=xZ6aV64iAec_rDKtuQi_vx5pMC9FhNkufVkmd2JPHXs6_qH4tZtZLfi03i_OnMC761H8al5OflUl-3O0N4SeY7TN18EpY3GcWqFZdiUXWQGf97UiePzd5l8ci-kbXeYrlLP0GnzTXEujbAbmymT1EQ6x4rlEACXj9UFhWVDmEUQJcz66B-hOl8ausfkyxQk8Mt6Dc-C4Q-XoZuYSefxi81xwp8IExAO6oTDmSt0uzaNaFyMtcPl_cN-Cttx9NH56efb2K-8RgikLYpJSktZTqVtC49o2TA0QYm1iLHvMFUdpAMUB9Rh7DlJPzzPMiTh62wpJUOeMY6Trd34K815hrLMwByWrKhsDBgbmSRx9vfPlGoLoo6ybEGkkBaRGnLuMJX8Fm7DcQYyQ1umetJV8LQ%3D%3D)

[](http://links.mackenzieforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e09c1376a1134fb5bbc6c87f9d1914fb&_m=6c13e22b6d7b4aa7b79eb814ded1088f&_e=xZ6aV64iAec_rDKtuQi_vx5pMC9FhNkufVkmd2JPHXs6_qH4tZtZLfi03i_OnMC761H8al5OflUl-3O0N4SeY7TN18EpY3GcWqFZdiUXWQGf97UiePzd5l8ci-kbXeYrlLP0GnzTXEujbAbmymT1EQ6x4rlEACXj9UFhWVDmEUQJcz66B-hOl8ausfkyxQk8Mt6Dc-C4Q-XoZuYSefxi81xwp8IExAO6oTDmSt0uzaNaFyMtcPl_cN-Cttx9NH56ttGrlQ7ZnncUM2Eg1fiRYOOSGRePCBAFtjVrCowU4rhrcx6CCVVUoiaNc8UO7tYAt1m3-eQp6Ooz-OCz9C1VppSJTL6j3dVoKPcohGyzngEYMODKI4Wh2JTNYEXQ9FIRLGceXJi5R-jSfiftLU6ERg%3D%3D)
It’s been made even worse recently. Quietly and under the guise of anti-terrorism, the FBI has started monitoring the “MAGA Followers” heading into next year’s election. So much for free speech and the idea that the FBI isn’t being weaponized against Republicans.

Fellow American, I’m running for Congress to break away from the hateful rhetoric and get things done.

I believe in:

**Election integrity in all 50 states

Increased protection along our borders

Energy independence in America

An effective economic solution to inflation**
[**AMERICAN PRINCIPLES**](http://links.mackenzieforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e09c1376a1134fb5bbc6c87f9d1914fb&_m=6c13e22b6d7b4aa7b79eb814ded1088f&_e=xZ6aV64iAec_rDKtuQi_vx5pMC9FhNkufVkmd2JPHXs6_qH4tZtZLfi03i_OnMC761H8al5OflUl-3O0N4SeY7TN18EpY3GcWqFZdiUXWQGf97UiePzd5l8ci-kbXeYrlLP0GnzTXEujbAbmymT1EQ6x4rlEACXj9UFhWVDmEUQJcz66B-hOl8ausfkyxQk8Mt6Dc-C4Q-XoZuYSefxi81xwp8IExAO6oTDmSt0uzaNaFyMtcPl_cN-Cttx9NH56pM_z2ej42RYXBzVICXrWbJaZQwHJkvAY8kq9qCERGyYgLTzp26hUth566eWtR-KxRQqaTKME-JalxyjyaGRrygBQlrLnqIDd1HZjM18_-L0p-Fln-7WERqdaPP81idPOxt-nSW-nbrKUVrKNZGkFyQ%3D%3D)
I believe in making America stronger. To grow the American economy, defend American values, secure our communities, and restore American freedoms we need to elect a representative who has proven the commitment and ability to do it. I’m ready for the job and to get the results you deserve.

[**If you’ve had enough of the political games and extremist language, I need you on my team. Chip in $7 today to flip Pennsylvania’s 7th!**](http://links.mackenzieforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e09c1376a1134fb5bbc6c87f9d1914fb&_m=6c13e22b6d7b4aa7b79eb814ded1088f&_e=xZ6aV64iAec_rDKtuQi_vx5pMC9FhNkufVkmd2JPHXs6_qH4tZtZLfi03i_OnMC761H8al5OflUl-3O0N4SeY7TN18EpY3GcWqFZdiUXWQGf97UiePzd5l8ci-kbXeYrlLP0GnzTXEujbAbmymT1EQ6x4rlEACXj9UFhWVDmEUQJcz66B-hOl8ausfkyxQk8Mt6Dc-C4Q-XoZuYSefxi81xwp8IExAO6oTDmSt0uzaNaFyMtcPl_cN-Cttx9NH56AaDQjAcLfD-njz2WLNOnTFFiBubr-w26lYRW1eACwJDMEfJukDOpK2BOkheArrdpIF0EA_jg3sloN4fTn-zEMED0TbOvrrk8etFZj1jpc12uU-wiZc6KcPvOE7tVE_aUMrdEF6b-Osj1iXSNLKVSaA%3D%3D)

For America,
[](http://links.mackenzieforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e09c1376a1134fb5bbc6c87f9d1914fb&_m=6c13e22b6d7b4aa7b79eb814ded1088f&_e=xZ6aV64iAec_rDKtuQi_vx5pMC9FhNkufVkmd2JPHXs6_qH4tZtZLfi03i_OnMC761H8al5OflUl-3O0N4SeY7TN18EpY3GcWqFZdiUXWQGf97UiePzd5l8ci-kbXeYrlLP0GnzTXEujbAbmymT1EQ6x4rlEACXj9UFhWVDmEUQJcz66B-hOl8ausfkyxQk8Mt6Dc-C4Q-XoZuYSefxi81xwp8IExAO6oTDmSt0uzaNaFyMtcPl_cN-Cttx9NH56mhxoHo9nCnNJy1Xhbx-J2LU6cR5783-LvWMSztScgn22Ko1VYeTvOc5jSBsIZ8Qp9HInahcV-m1GlYSC4et7k4UHrgc0rC-jYwxixziRl0tZyNLI6lBYroPN9ttpfacbN_AqSkl2LbZTeS-Qj3u-Zg%3D%3D)
Ryan Mackenzie

[**RESULTS - NOT JUST TALK**](http://links.mackenzieforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e09c1376a1134fb5bbc6c87f9d1914fb&_m=6c13e22b6d7b4aa7b79eb814ded1088f&_e=xZ6aV64iAec_rDKtuQi_vx5pMC9FhNkufVkmd2JPHXs6_qH4tZtZLfi03i_OnMC761H8al5OflUl-3O0N4SeY7TN18EpY3GcWqFZdiUXWQGf97UiePzd5l8ci-kbXeYrlLP0GnzTXEujbAbmymT1EQ6x4rlEACXj9UFhWVDmEUQJcz66B-hOl8ausfkyxQk8Mt6Dc-C4Q-XoZuYSefxi81xwp8IExAO6oTDmSt0uzaNaFyMtcPl_cN-Cttx9NH56LIfPMxWBt5LSwocHKNk4HpTe480Zvlyi9nRyD17yYAtz1ZYcfmG74nIJbM-pwf_F40anLpDuc5Ojdg3vG7BObtaBkVUnt3oJ8tCB5cQAAs3SLwYuHy5RvX6M62KPfwu5pYgTqOq92MzjIlw1b1b6bQ%3D%3D)

MEET RYAN

* * *
_When it comes to fighting for American freedoms and helping others, Ryan Mackenzie has had some great teachers.

A 9th generation resident of the Lehigh Valley, Ryan's first ancestor to settle in our area fought in the Northampton County Militia during the Revolutionary War. In more recent generations, his family members helped build companies like Hercules Cement, served our country in both World Wars, and served our community here at home in professions like nursing and teaching.

It's that spirit of service that inspired Ryan to fight back against the Far Left here in Pennsylvania. Ryan faced an all-out assault by the abortion industry in his first race, and he beat them back. Rush Limbaugh said of Ryan: "Planned Parenthood took it on the chin ... Mackenzie won by an 18-point margin."

In Pennsylvania's state capitol, Ryan is known by conservatives and feared by the establishment as one of the most effective and proven reformers in government. Ryan didn't just talk – he got our values enacted into law._

[ **JOIN TEAM MACKENZIE**](http://links.mackenzieforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e09c1376a1134fb5bbc6c87f9d1914fb&_m=6c13e22b6d7b4aa7b79eb814ded1088f&_e=xZ6aV64iAec_rDKtuQi_vx5pMC9FhNkufVkmd2JPHXs6_qH4tZtZLfi03i_OnMC761H8al5OflUl-3O0N4SeY7TN18EpY3GcWqFZdiUXWQGf97UiePzd5l8ci-kbXeYrlLP0GnzTXEujbAbmymT1EQ6x4rlEACXj9UFhWVDmEUQJcz66B-hOl8ausfkyxQk8Mt6Dc-C4Q-XoZuYSefxi81xwp8IExAO6oTDmSt0uzaNaFyMtcPl_cN-Cttx9NH56pokcLYHfp38hD8UTH939PkNA11nEw5U10ZwJqnRrhi0lt9-52Aoq6egHNsLtlIgIPBkC-3V8Nafixkap693eJAwmnErKhhXpWZ4oLLIJUqEXbYubH-TJ8RVVEuA5QlqryGYJWDrmyvkRKbMiKZ-9ZA%3D%3D)

name: Senator Rick Scott
subject: Socialists need not apply
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida
body:
| | | Peter, The residents of Florida have made themselves clear: when it comes to living here, socialists need not apply.

We value our freedom. We are proud to be Americans. We believe in common sense - not woke, warped reality.

**If we’re going to keep Florida safe for our children, we need to keep socialists OUT!**

name: Team Tim Sanchez
subject: We want to hear from you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Sanchez For Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/timsanchez?refcode=X_logo [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/timsanchez?refcode=X_logo]
Team Tim Sanchez here, and we’re 100% behind Tim as he ramps up his campaign!
You see, as a party, we have gotten away from talking about the issues that really matter most to working-class families – and we believe it’s crucial to refocus the conversation on the issues that truly matter to you.
https://secure.ngpvan.com/GH9osNOhckGF66qWrPinCQ2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/GH9osNOhckGF66qWrPinCQ2]
We understand the challenges working families face as the costs of housing, health care, child care, and groceries rise, and that for so many who aspire to join the middle class, there isn’t a clear pathway to get there.
That’s why Tim is running to reduce crime and homelessness, expand the K-12 public education model to include a 4-year college degree, increase pathways for our youth through job training and apprenticeships, and, as the only veteran running for this seat, is committed to protecting our country’s core beliefs by rejecting the GOP's threats to our democracy. Because these are the areas that demand our attention.
But, the issues that matter most to Tim are the ones that matter most to you.
That’s why we’re conducting a survey to learn what issues matter most to you, team. Can we count on you to take a moment and tell us what issues are most concerning to you right now? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/GH9osNOhckGF66qWrPinCQ2]
Our campaign is powered by grassroots support. So hearing from you helps us better understand what challenges you’re facing, and how Tim can build a plan to help. To ensure that we fully represent your priorities and concerns, click here to fill out our survey today. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/GH9osNOhckGF66qWrPinCQ2]
Thank you for your continued support and for playing a vital role in shaping the future of CA-12.
Sincerely,
Team Tim Sanchez
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/timsanchez?refcode=X_footer-w [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/timsanchez?refcode=X_footer-w] Tim Sanchez is running to represent California’s 12th Congressional District.
As a Proud son of East Oakland, a dedicated father, and a proud veteran, he knows firsthand the challenges that working families in the East Bay face. He is ready to deliver progress for all of us and continue the tradition of progressive leadership of doing what’s right – even if that means being the lone voice.
...And he’s ready to take the fight to Congress, but we'll need your support to win. Chip in today! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/timsanchez?refcode=X_footer-w]

She claimed that her fellow Republicans are out to get her for her vote, and encouraged watchers to donate to her extremist MAGA campaign. (Does she know CNN’s audience?) **But, after Mace plugged her website and begged for contributions, she received a BRUTAL callout on her hypocrisy! 🤭** Why? clean_body: Imitation is the most sincere form of flattery. | = Photo Credit: CNN Peter, Nancy Mace JUST got called out for her hypocrisy on CNN, and it was TOO good of a moment not to fill you in. But before we do, we’re asking: = = Grab your popcorn, because here’s the rundown... Nancy Mace joined CNN for an interview after siding with seven other MAGA extremists to oust Kevin McCarthy from the Speakership. She claimed that her fellow Republicans are out to get her for her vote, and encouraged watchers to donate to her extremist MAGA campaign. (Does she know CNN’s audience?) But, after Mace plugged her website and begged for contributions, she received a BRUTAL callout on her hypocrisy! 🤭 Why? Because as the anchor pointed out, Mace called MAGA ringleader Matt Gaetz a “fraud” for doing the exact same thing just a few months ago – fundraising off of his votes against electing McCarthy as Speaker. Her reaction to this was like watching a deer in headlights. All jokes aside, it’s time that South Carolina has a leader that’s focused on serving them – not throwing our government into chaos for attention. = = = With you, – Team Michael B. name: Derek Kilmer
subject: What's happening in Congress:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
The House of Representatives has reached new levels of dysfunction
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71139933/431293950/-2027002553?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzNzUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTJiNmNmZDItMTk2NS1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=2_ql-oX74K3oqhg392RFhAp8UslTMTY9iyBeJgMy6CU=&emci=0119d8d3-8964-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=a2b6cfd2-1965-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=3595835)

Hey Peter,

Let's talk about what's been going on in Congress — it's been a real rollercoaster.

**FIRST:** We teetered on the brink of a potential default on our national debt. We were close to being unable to pay our bills, and that's a big deal. It would've had major consequences for the economy and hurt everyone's wallets, all because House leadership, for a long time, refused to raise the debt ceiling just like we did three times during the Trump administration. We had to act and act fast.

**THEN:** We faced the threat of a government shutdown. A dire threat to our nation's stability, which would have disrupted vital services, endangered the livelihoods of dedicated government workers, and put our economy at risk, all because some of the most extreme House Republicans decided to use our government as a political bargaining chip to try and advance their reckless personal and political agendas.

**NOW:** Fast forward to today, and Congress is a real mess. It's like a big puzzle missing a crucial piece. As of Tuesday evening, Speaker McCarthy has been vacated from his position, which means the House no longer has a Speaker to guide our legislative efforts. And frankly, _this level of gridlock is not what the American people deserve or expect from their elected officials._

For too long, Kevin McCarthy has been playing with fire, giving in to extremists instead of working for the American people to move our nation forward. As a result, he is now forced to embrace the consequences of his choice to cave to extremism. **And while I know the process of electing a new Speaker won't be a walk in the park, I'm hopeful that House Republicans will embrace a smarter path forward.**

Look: For the last four years, I proudly chaired the "Fix Congress" Committee to mend our broken system and boost bipartisanship and functionality between Democrats and Republicans. And guess what? We've got over 200 bipartisan recommendations to prove that it's possible. **Peter, we may have our work cut out for us, but I remain committed to working across the aisle to avoid partisan games and keep our nation moving FORWARD.**

It's an honor to represent you,

Derek

* * *
Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
---
People for Derek Kilmer
PO Box 1381
Tacoma, WA 98402
United States

name: John Kasich
subject: An Opportunity?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kasich for America, not authorized by any
body:
If there is not a Republican candidate who can secure the necessary 218 votes in the House to become Speaker, then there should be a real effort to bring some moderate Democrats into a Republican-led coalition that is focused on governing.| | | [](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=a066dd6ca97d4f0cb9cefddaee8888f1&_e=oyPpRpW-QrpS_FkWb_mvGGLMNUSJd7tfp_c00T4L-A47gNjvSg8h1BBH-xAWyDj52PWeEnpSyTO2sF5_qSsyNAlOvnclgTUo8NmRKbPUgYIMN7WNEZ0ElC43V2icwW2LX6pcwtw5OA5TLSptohHW_rTltXrRtBJelqhTlo7O32gS2SPUfdSC39DyhB5zJEiLhsqBCYyqxWAGnYxmyyJgYw%3D%3D)
---
Peter, It's been a wild week in Washington, D.C. so far, and with the uncertainty about who will serve as the next Speaker of the House, it's an opportunity for us to call on our elected leaders to start acting in the best interest of the American people.

If there is not a Republican candidate who can secure the necessary 218 votes in the House to become Speaker, then there should be a real effort to bring some moderate Democrats into a Republican-led coalition that is focused on governing. I recently spoke about this:
---
[](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=a066dd6ca97d4f0cb9cefddaee8888f1&_e=oyPpRpW-QrpS_FkWb_mvGIy4VG1ZmoVAPVybIywGw3_BE0M8J0sPG466O6vRlogOc5AHW4DFMqGquVTeb9jiKc_NPIXPVDSx3K2Db_a4nw2ukUKuw4CPAfN7mmB4zG7QZ1EdTisbw0420AXsBJpbfMBntlRtVAeKclL53FqIvNs-JkZ1ByczofOVgTdC6iPyZZ9HfJGsfrsi3aib-O-lEgVU6oZkh_xJkF-tFl5JGxOpzFKt0BLPidUcwSb7T8ym)
---
While our country remains divided, I believe that the majority of people want their elected representatives in Washington, D.C. to find ways to work together. Where in life do people get 100% of what they want and anything else short of that is considered to be a failure?

This is the kind of rhetoric that the radical wings of both parties have often used to capitalize on the anger and fears of Americans. It's one of the main reasons we're so divided, and it's so toxic for democracy.

The American people are right to expect their elected leaders to be honest with them, but they're also right to expect those who they send to Congress to work to solve problems and create better opportunities for all Americans.

If picking up some Democrat votes for a Speaker candidate means giving the Democrats some votes on their legislation or some better positions on committees, so what? The republic isn't going to fall!

It's time for the majority of Americans to get engaged again by demanding that their elected representatives find ways to work together. And if they refuse, to support new candidates who are there to govern.
---
I'm out there every week giving speeches, doing media interviews, communicating on social media and using every other tool at my disposal to give hope and encouragement to as many Americans as I can.

[Peter - I'm counting on your continued support to ensure that we can keep this important work moving forward](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=a066dd6ca97d4f0cb9cefddaee8888f1&_e=oyPpRpW-QrpS_FkWb_mvGBJmqToyptnNjDfe1uzm6qdrIUbFfB8aveKmpRegl3aExajlWLsJro0tosMSnYbJwV2fiHmh0MAhDp2KHoF9lCbUoHbOb2V0s7sHs2CMrvDFoODSVpCo7pbDYnhusdwAvGv44mHMqq1-g7LSnGplytKoZZQWOZpugAj_3-PXxEqm_lz8l_0EcLM69VxWBwzjjWF2mf6NKS8j7w_GJUvoMws%3D).

Will you please consider chipping in right now to help with this important cause and ensure that we can keep up the fight for a better America?

clean_body: If there is not a Republican candidate who can secure the necessary 218 votes in the House to become Speaker, then there should be a real effort to bring some moderate Democrats into a Republican-led coalition that is focused on governing.| | | Peter, It's been a wild week in Washington, D.C. so far, and with the uncertainty about who will serve as the next Speaker of the House, it's an opportunity for us to call on our elected leaders to start acting in the best interest of the American people. If there is not a Republican candidate who can secure the necessary 218 votes in the House to become Speaker, then there should be a real effort to bring some moderate Democrats into a Republican-led coalition that is focused on governing. I recently spoke about this: While our country remains divided, I believe that the majority of people want their elected representatives in Washington, D.C. to find ways to work together. Where in life do people get 100% of what they want and anything else short of that is considered to be a failure? This is the kind of rhetoric that the radical wings of both parties have often used to capitalize on the anger and fears of Americans. It's one of the main reasons we're so divided, and it's so toxic for democracy. The American people are right to expect their elected leaders to be honest with them, but they're also right to expect those who they send to Congress to work to solve problems and create better opportunities for all Americans. If picking up some Democrat votes for a Speaker candidate means giving the Democrats some votes on their legislation or some better positions on committees, so what? The republic isn't going to fall! It's time for the majority of Americans to get engaged again by demanding that their elected representatives find ways to work together. And if they refuse, to support new candidates who are there to govern. I'm out there every week giving speeches, doing media interviews, communicating on social media and using every other tool at my disposal to give hope and encouragement to as many Americans as I can. . Will you please consider chipping in right now to help with this important cause and ensure that we can keep up the fight for a better America? I'm so appreciative for your ongoing support. Thank you! -John | | | Get the Latest Updates: | | | | ---|---|---|--- | | | | Paid for by Kasich for America, not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.JohnKasich.com

### No More Pastries
Ryan talks about the dangers of relying on the federal government for bailouts, with this sugary-sweet analogy.
_[Watch here](https://binkley2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5894b488eac5a196e1e5d6896&id=23491b4732&e=c1403f41d3)_

---
### Disappearing Dollars
Overprinting, inflation, and government regulation is weakening the dollar. But Ryan plans to fix this with better energy policies and a new healthcare plan. Healthcare inflation has risen faster than general inflation for twenty years. It's time to put a stop to that. _[Watch here](https://binkley2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5894b488eac5a196e1e5d6896&id=bbe359e214&e=c1403f41d3)_

name: Katie Porter
subject: New quarter, new survey
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
I want to hear from you.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=31018%2E3422442%2Ex5T0Eo)
Derek,
If you’ve been on our email list for a while now (thank you!), you may notice every quarter, I ask about your top priorities.
Now that we’re in the final quarter of 2023, I’m reaching out again to check in and see if anything has changed for you these past few months.
[**So, what are your top priorities, Derek?**](https://act.katieporter.com/survey/kpem-survey-em-20231007/?source=em20231007-1&akid=31018%2E3422442%2Ex5T0Eo)
[Take the survey›››](https://act.katieporter.com/survey/kpem-survey-em-20231007/?source=em20231007-1&akid=31018%2E3422442%2Ex5T0Eo)
We’re just five months out from the primary election—which means I’m on the campaign trail doing what I love most: Talking to people like you, hearing your stories, and learning about the issues most important to you and your community.
As much as I would love to, I can’t talk to everyone in person. This is why I regularly send out this survey. If you have a few free minutes, [**I want to know about the issues that are most important to you:**](https://act.katieporter.com/survey/kpem-survey-em-20231007/?source=em20231007-1&akid=31018%2E3422442%2Ex5T0Eo)
[Take the survey›››](https://act.katieporter.com/survey/kpem-survey-em-20231007/?source=em20231007-1&akid=31018%2E3422442%2Ex5T0Eo)
As a former teacher and professor, I know all too well that oftentimes, only those with the highest, loudest hands get called on. Politics can be the same way, as those with resources and power play an outsized role in Washington (*cough* corporate PACs and federal lobbyists *cough*).
That’s why I like to do surveys like these, and hear directly from supporters like you.
[**Thanks for taking the time to share your thoughts with me.**](https://act.katieporter.com/survey/kpem-survey-em-20231007/?source=em20231007-1&akid=31018%2E3422442%2Ex5T0Eo)
—Katie Porter

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=em20231007-1&t=2&refcode2=31018_3422442_x5T0Eo&akid=31018%2E3422442%2Ex5T0Eo)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4s-emails/?t=3&akid=31018%2E3422442%2Ex5T0Eo)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-update-info-footer)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4s-unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=31018%2E3422442%2Ex5T0Eo)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Senate
PO Box 5176
Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)
Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: We can’t afford to underestimate AIPAC and other right-wing groups.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter, [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/138603?t=1001&akid=31207%2E1203867%2E3t4VpC ]did you
see this op-ed from our Executive Director, Alexandra Rojas, in The
Nation?

Over the last 6 years, Justice Democrats has been leading the fight of
recruiting and electing progressive primary challengers to oust
out-of-touch, entrenched incumbents who only serve the establishment.

But our movement is under threat. The same right-wing forces we overcame
to elect a new group of working-class lawmakers of color are back,
doubling down, [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/138604?t=1002&akid=31207%2E1203867%2E3t4VpC ]pouring millions of dollars into electing corporate
Democrats that they can once again depend on to do the bidding of the
billionaire class.

We cannot underestimate groups like AIPAC and their millions of dollars as
they recruit challengers to our incumbents including Jamaal Bowman, Summer
Lee, and Ilhan Omar.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/138765?refcode=em20231007-31207&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=31207%2E1203867%2E3t4VpC ]Will you contribute $3 right now to help ensure we have
the resources to fight against AIPAC and other establishment, right-wing
groups who hate our progressive candidates?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/138765?refcode=em20231007-31207&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=31207%2E1203867%2E3t4VpC ]Contribute $3

We’re going to do everything we can to protect our progressive fighters
from the right-wing groups who will spend heavily against us this cycle,
but we need you with us. The alternative is allowing a small group of
Republican donors to dictate our party’s membership and agenda in
Congress.

Together we will continue to transform the Democratic Party from the
inside out.

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1023&akid=31207%2E1203867%2E3t4VpC ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1024&akid=31207%2E1203867%2E3t4VpC ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20231007-31207-footer&t=1025&refcode2=31207_1203867_3t4VpC&akid=31207%2E1203867%2E3t4VpC

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1026&akid=31207%2E1203867%2E3t4VpC

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

body:

Friend, Between a sham impeachment inquiry, the government nearly shutting down, and Kevin McCarthy being ousted from his speakership position, it’s been an interesting few weeks in Washington, to say the least. We’re seeing in real time the grip that extremist, election-denying Republicans have on decision-making in Congress. Now Speakerless, House Republicans are scrambling to find a new leader -- and the potential contenders are _even more_ extreme than McCarthy. **Here’s the short list as of right now:** **→ Rep. Steve Scalise** – an election denier who still refuses to say whether he believes President Biden was legitimately elected. **→ Rep. Jim Jordan** – an ultra-MAGA Trump ally who has repeatedly weaponized his position as House Judiciary Chair on partisan investigations, including a probe into Fani Willis, the Georgia DA investigating Donald Trump for election interference. → Some radicals like Marjorie Taylor Greene are even suggesting **Donald Trump** be the next Speaker. Whether it be the House, the Senate, or at the Secretary of State level, the election-denier wing of the Republican Party isn’t going anywhere. In fact, it’s becoming more emboldened. [**At DASS, we’re working to defend our elections and stop Trump's allies from undermining our democracy, but we need you in this fight. If you’re with us, can you make a donation of $3 today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71142980/431305506/-248329306?refcode=em-10.07.23-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YTFiNjFmZi0xZDY1LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iIhgPtQRyZDYNgIvm6WH867Nkyn_jwVOOpu610cgKhU=)

Now Speakerless, House Republicans are scrambling to find a new leader -- and the potential contenders are even more extreme than McCarthy. Here’s the short list as of right now: → Rep. Steve Scalise – an election denier who still refuses to say whether he believes President Biden was legitimately elected. → Rep. Jim Jordan – an ultra-MAGA Trump ally who has repeatedly weaponized his position as House Judiciary Chair on partisan investigations, including a probe into Fani Willis, the Georgia DA investigating Donald Trump for election interference. → Some radicals like Marjorie Taylor Greene are even suggesting Donald Trump be the next Speaker. Whether it be the House, the Senate, or at the Secretary of State level, the election-denier wing of the Republican Party isn’t going anywhere. **GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

Friend,
The Radical Democrats tried to keep me off the campaign trail this week by tying me up in court and forcing me to fight for my livelihood and defend my family’s name.
But I won’t let them get away with it.
That’s why I’m flying to Iowa as I write you this email to ensure that we win the first caucus of the 2024 election.
The quicker we wrap up the Republican primary, the quicker we can focus 100% of our time, effort, energy, and resources on FIRING Crooked Joe and the radical left-wing regime that has weaponized our legal system.
**Today marks a very PIVOTAL MOMENT in the Republican presidential primary... Today, there are exactly 100 DAYS LEFT until the Iowa Caucus.**
_This is the final stretch. This is our chance to give it all we’ve got. This is our chance to surge so high that not a soul in the country doubts that the primary is effectively over._
That’s why I’ve set a very ambitious goal of 100,000 grassroots donors to step up and help us lock up a victory in the FIRST CAUCUS of 2024.
And with 100,000 donors, all it takes is giving contributions of $1, $5, $24, and so on, for us to post tremendous numbers.
Every dollar adds up – and before you know it, we’ve outraised the field.

clean_body: Today is a pivotal moment in the 2024 election. This is the final stretch. | | | Friend, The Radical Democrats tried to keep me off the campaign trail this week by tying me up in court and forcing me to fight for my livelihood and defend my family’s name. But I won’t let them get away with it. That’s why I’m flying to Iowa as I write you this email to ensure that we win the first caucus of the 2024 election. The quicker we wrap up the Republican primary, the quicker we can focus 100% of our time, effort, energy, and resources on FIRING Crooked Joe and the radical left-wing regime that has weaponized our legal system. Today marks a very PIVOTAL MOMENT in the Republican presidential primary... Today, there are exactly 100 DAYS LEFT until the Iowa Caucus. This is the final stretch. This is our chance to give it all we’ve got. This is our chance to surge so high that not a soul in the country doubts that the primary is effectively over. That’s why I’ve set a very ambitious goal of 100,000 grassroots donors to step up and help us lock up a victory in the FIRST CAUCUS of 2024. And with 100,000 donors, all it takes is giving contributions of $1, $5, $24, and so on, for us to post tremendous numbers. Every dollar adds up – and before you know it, we’ve outraised the field. | Thank you, | Donald J. disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eigel for Missouri, Thomas Hughes, Treasurer_
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://us21.campaign-archive.com/?e=c00a6982d2&u=00ef1c295ae4331d7c1e52945&id=d786dedad6)
---
| |
---
| | **🚨 New Polling Shows Eigel for Governor Support SURGING 🚨**

After recent polling showed State Senator Bill Eigel surging into 2nd place on the uninformed ballot in the Missouri Gubernatorial Race, new polling among **INFORMED** Republican voters shows decisive support for Bill Eigel. In a poll taken Sep 29-Oct 1, Eigel garners a **clear majority of informed support**!

Eigel 52%
Ashcroft 14%
Kehoe 11%
Undecided 22%

“Our campaign has gotten a lot of national attention because I am the only candidate willing to fight the Swamp in Jefferson City,” Eigel said. “Ashcroft and Kehoe are pro-swamp. They support raising taxes and spending, selling Missouri to foreign countries, and allowing machines to take over our elections.”

This polling comes on the heels of several straw polls taken in a half dozen Missouri counties showing Eigel winning in every case with broad support—including decisive victories in St Louis, St Charles, Cole, Cass and Perry Counties.

“Missourians want a leader different than the same status quo of do-nothing RINOs controlling the state in Jefferson City. I will be that leader.”

The poll was taken from N=400 respondents with a margin of error of +\\- 5%

**Let’s Go Missouri!**

body:

Peter — In 2018, pop sensation and Tennessee based-singer Taylor Swift posted the following to her millions of Instagram followers: | _Running for Senate in the state of Tennessee is a woman named Marsha Blackburn. As much as I have in the past and would like to continue voting for women in office, I cannot support Marsha Blackburn. Her voting record in Congress appalls and terrifies me. She voted against equal pay for women. She voted against the Reauthorization of the Violence Against Women Act, which attempts to protect women from domestic violence, stalking, and date rape. She believes businesses have a right to refuse service to gay couples. She also believes they should not have the right to marry. These are not MY Tennessee values._
* * *

clean_body: In the words of Taylor Swift, let’s say this to Marsha Blackburn: We Are Never Ever Getting Back Together. | = Peter — In 2018, pop sensation and Tennessee based-singer Taylor Swift posted the following to her millions of Instagram followers: | Running for Senate in the state of Tennessee is a woman named Marsha Blackburn. As much as I have in the past and would like to continue voting for women in office, I cannot support Marsha Blackburn. Her voting record in Congress appalls and terrifies me. She voted against equal pay for women. She voted against the Reauthorization of the Violence Against Women Act, which attempts to protect women from domestic violence, stalking, and date rape. She believes businesses have a right to refuse service to gay couples. She also believes they should not have the right to marry. These are not MY Tennessee values. = Just as we’ve been saying — Marsha Blackburn does NOT represent Tennessee values. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = | = = | = = For the past several years, Marsha Blackburn has been a disgrace to Tennessee. She’s a far-right extremist, and her voting record terrifies us. Just this past weekend, she voted no on keeping the federal government open — in favor of sending us in a shutdown. So in the words of Taylor Swift, let’s say this to Marsha Blackburn: We Are Never Ever Getting Back Together. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = | = = | = = Thanks for your support today — and we look forward to joining Taylor Swift in turning folks out to the polls in next year’s election! — TNDP Tennessee Democratic Party 319 Plus Park Blvd Nashville, TN 37217 United States | mailto:info@tndp.org | CAROL V. Fellow Conservative, You’re a committed conservative – and you know what’s on the line here in Texas. Senate Democrat Chuck Schumer and his far-left, radical-left backers across America have made Ted their top target. _They are fanatical in their desire to flip Texas to protect their grip on the United Senate_ and our country as a whole. The one-year countdown to Election Day will be here before we know it, and far-left Democrat Colin Allred is raising massive amounts of money while masquerading as a moderate... **That’s why we’re reaching out to TOP CONSERVATIVES to ask for urgent and continuous help (every month) in what will be the most expensive and crucial Senate race in the Nation. ** When you make a commitment to help with a **monthly contribution** you’ll be sustaining our fight to **KEEP TEXAS RED** and Retake the United States Senate for Republicans in 2024! **Here’s how it works:** 1.**[Follow this link to our secure donation page](http://trk.tedcruz._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1FLUhvdXNlRmlsZSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Q3J1el9Ob24tVFgtUmVjdXJyaW5nLURvbm9yc18yMDIzMTAwNiZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PU5vbi1UWC1SZWN1cnJpbmctRG9ub3JzJnV0bV9hZ2VuY3k9UEcmYW1vdW50PTEyLjk5JnJlY3VycmluZz10cnVlIn0/9lNWeSdsyoKtTG9xO3uctQ)**;

We need youth voters to turn out in November.

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/71147828/431322906/1843371473?refcode=EM_F_231007month_N_TN_90DO_7_NG_N_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImMzNWY2NDVlLTI2NjUtZWUxMS05OTM3LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=K3sYI3ymI3tEiXicZorcZqTB5OwTPAwUwOztrWXPx7w=)
| Team,

We’re one month out from Election Day! Our team is putting sneakers 👟 on the ground to register students to vote, and we need your help.

**This weekend, NPP’s affiliated non-partisan organization, New PA Project Education Fund, will be hosting a voter registration blitz at Penn State University to spread the message of why courts matter.** On November 7, voters will head to the polls in Pennsylvania to vote for a State Supreme Court Justice, two new Superior Court judges, a new Commonwealth Court judge, and several local/municipal positions.

[**These elections will significantly impact students’ lives, and we must ensure they’re aware and ready to make their voices heard. Will you help us register as many students to vote as possible by donating $25 or more now?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/71147829/431322908/1843371473?refcode=EM_F_231007month_N_TN_90DO_7_NG_N_L1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImMzNWY2NDVlLTI2NjUtZWUxMS05OTM3LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=K3sYI3ymI3tEiXicZorcZqTB5OwTPAwUwOztrWXPx7w=)

Last week, the New PA Project Education Fund went to Temple University in Philadelphia to ensure students were aware they could register to vote on campus. We had great conversations with students about when, where, and how they can vote on November 7. It was a great success! And we plan to replicate that this weekend.

Here’s the thing: These courts can and will issue rulings on some of our state’s most fundamental issues, including our very freedom to vote, equitable redistricting, the right to control our own bodies, and much more. And have no doubt, we will feel their impact for years to come. That is why we CANNOT afford low-youth voter turnout. It’s detrimental to our democracy. That’s why we are out here doing the work!

**The New PA Project Education Fund aims to register over 400 Penn State Students to vote, and it doesn’t stop there. Will you help us engage the youth across the Commonwealth ahead of this important election in November?**

[**We cannot slow down now. We are in the one-month countdown until Election Day. Can you help us register as many students to vote as possible by pitching in $25 now?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/71147832/431322910/1843371473?refcode=EM_F_231007month_N_TN_90DO_7_NG_N_L2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImMzNWY2NDVlLTI2NjUtZWUxMS05OTM3LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=K3sYI3ymI3tEiXicZorcZqTB5OwTPAwUwOztrWXPx7w=) name: Angela Alsobrooks
subject: 📎 photo attached
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alsobrooks for Senate
body:
[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/7074?t=1007&amount=25&akid=544%2E52803%2Ep9IG2x ][IMG]

When you’re a child, your mind is soaking up everything,
Peter.

You’re growing, learning, understanding, and slowly but surely, evolving
into the person you eventually become.

You’ve probably heard me talk about my great-grandmother Maebell James,
but ever since I was little, she taught me that it’s our responsibility to
help others, even when it isn’t easy.

If you don’t like something, she’d say, “Go farther and do better.” That
message has been my north star during my time in public service.

Together, we’re going to go farther and do better so that future
generations have safe communities, a healthy and habitable planet, and a
system that benefits working families.

So even though I’m sharing a throwback with you, I want to be clear that
my message in this race is about moving Maryland forward.

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/7074?t=1008&amount=25&akid=544%2E52803%2Ep9IG2x ]I need your help right now making that vision a reality,
Peter. Would you please consider
contributing $25 to my campaign for the U.S. Senate so we can go farther
and do better together?

If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately.

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/7074?t=1009&express_lane=true&amount=25&akid=544%2E52803%2Ep9IG2x ]Chip in $25 [ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/7074?t=1010&express_lane=true&amount=50&akid=544%2E52803%2Ep9IG2x ]Chip in $50

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/7074?t=1013&express_lane=true&amount=250&akid=544%2E52803%2Ep9IG2x ]Chip in $250 [ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/7074?t=1014&amount=35&akid=544%2E52803%2Ep9IG2x ]Other Amount

Thank you for being a part of our movement, Peter.

—Angela

body:
These are the races to keep an eye on during the 2023 local elections in Washington State... | | | [ ](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=6089b4e106&e=6a281f566d)
---
| | Dear Peter,

By popular demand, the WAGOP is excited to release our **second list of bellwether school board races** for the 2023 elections taking place right now.

We have received overwhelmingly positive response from our supporters and candidates after sending out the first list of bellwether races. They want to see more! So, we’ve assembled a second list of **races to watch that all qualify our parameters of bellwether races****—based on geography, political lean, messaging efforts, etc.** Volunteers, contributions, messaging support and all other factors are increasing for great school board candidates like these, all around the state.

As with the first list, the races below are **leading indicator****s** of what we can expect heading into the 2024 statewide races. **Good results in these school board races** means our common-sense conservative message and ground game strategy are working.

These bellwether races are listed below, arranged by region—so you can find the races closest to you. **Click on the buttons below to** **learn more about these important campaigns** either from their campaign website, or from the county GOP website (not all local campaigns have campaign websites). You’ll find **candidate information, campaign event schedules, volunteer opportunities, and contribution** links.
_**Please also look on your county GOP website for voting recommendations in your hometown.**_

clean_body: These are the races to keep an eye on during the 2023 local elections in Washington State... | | | | | Dear Peter, By popular demand, the WAGOP is excited to release our second list of bellwether school board races for the 2023 elections taking place right now. We have received overwhelmingly positive response from our supporters and candidates after sending out the first list of bellwether races. They want to see more! So, we’ve assembled a second list of races to watch that all qualify our parameters of bellwether races—based on geography, political lean, messaging efforts, etc. Volunteers, contributions, messaging support and all other factors are increasing for great school board candidates like these, all around the state. As with the first list, the races below are leading indicators of what we can expect heading into the 2024 statewide races. Good results in these school board races means our common-sense conservative message and ground game strategy are working. These bellwether races are listed below, arranged by region—so you can find the races closest to you. Click on the buttons below to learn more about these important campaigns either from their campaign website, or from the county GOP website (not all local campaigns have campaign websites). You’ll find candidate information, campaign event schedules, volunteer opportunities, and contribution links. body:

We want to thank you for taking the time to contact the Clemmie Harris for Congress campaign. As we all know, Democratic control of the House of Representatives in 2024, will be on the shoulders of Clemmie Harris and the voters in New York's 22nd district. Your contribution could have a major impact in the outcome of some of the biggest local elections of the year, Peter:
* $5 to help elect **Van Turner** for Mayor of Memphis
* $10 to help elect **Gabe Amo** and make history as the first Black congressman representing Rhode Island (RI-01)
* $50 to help elect **Dr. Shawn Wilson** for governor of Louisiana, making history as the state’s first Black governor
* Or $200 to help **_block a Republican trifecta_** under Glenn Youngkin in Virginia

**_Local elections are key_ , Peter,** and we need your help now more than ever to push our slate of endorsed candidates across the finish line before the end of the month.

clean_body: | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. name: Team Lose Cruz
subject: Can you make an early investment in our work to kick out Ted Cruz?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LOSE CRUZ PAC
body:
Early investments will be crucial to taking on Ted and the $ the GOP will spend to defend him.
# [](https://act.losecruzpac.com/go/128?t=1&akid=112%2E623276%2EIgcKwU)
Hey,
**At Lose Cruz, our mission is simple:**
**We’re here to kick Ted Cruz out of the United States Senate once and for all next year.**
We get it. November 2024 feels like a while away. In reality, next year’s election is _only_ 396 days away and we need the early resources to build a solid foundation and implement our aggressive campaign strategy _now._
That's why we're asking: **[Will you make an early investment of $5 or anything you can now?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-lc-20231007?refcode=em20231007&amount=5&refcode2=112_623276_IgcKwU&akid=112%2E623276%2EIgcKwU)
Everything from our ability to run a hard-hitting ads campaign against Ted to reaching and mobilizing every single Texas voter depends on raising money early and consistently.
**A contribution from you will help us make critical and strategic investments today that will make a huge impact down the line.** **[Can we count on you to make a difference today?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-lc-20231007?refcode=em20231007&amount=&refcode2=112_623276_IgcKwU&akid=112%2E623276%2EIgcKwU)
**[Donate ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-lc-20231007?amount=&refcode=em20231007&refcode2=112_623276_IgcKwU&akid=112%2E623276%2EIgcKwU)**
Thank you so much! Enjoy the long weekend! 😎
The Lose Cruz Team

* * *
**[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-lc-footer?refcode=em-112&t=2&refcode2=112_623276_IgcKwU&akid=112%2E623276%2EIgcKwU)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:

Lose Cruz PAC
1835 7th St NW, Ste 203
Washington, DC 20001

name: Friends of Charity Barry
subject: It's Official! #RetirePocan
body:
| | | |
---
|
# Ready to Retire Pocan?
---
---
| Good Afternoon, Fellow Patriots!
If you are reading this email, it is because I just made my official announcement! I am running for Congress in 2024!
Since you last heard from me, I have not stopped fighting for you! It's been a busy year, and I have been carefully considering many opportunities and how I can best serve the good people of the Second Congressional District and fight for a Conservative government of, by, and for the people.
I am confident that I can do the most good for our district as a strong candidate against Mark Pocan in the 2024 election cycle - ensuring that he is not handed this seat on a silver platter!
I am so thankful for each of you who have supported me in the past, and I look forward to working with you over the next year!
We can take on the progressive socialists in CD2, but only if we are working as a team!
Let me know how you are excited to get involved, and please consider making a contribution today so we can get right to work!
Ever Grateful,
Charity Barry

I believe in this mission from the bottom of my heart |

| | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/71149510/431328601/2084576589?sourceid=1052097&refcode=20231007_BookerRS&refcode2=WTEFE1010&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZTA1ZDU5NC0yYTY1LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wC6rCA2218TYmfTNu5Wicy6suXgsdAQsffy6ApQVScs=) Hi Peter, it's Senator Cory Booker. I'm thrilled to have the chance to write to you today.

I'm sure I don't have to tell you, but just in case you don't know: _you are part of something really special_. The EMILYs List community has been an inspiration in Democratic politics for almost 40 years, and your mission to elect more Democratic pro-choice women to office makes our country better _every single day_. ****The truth is, when women win, we all win. That's why I'm asking you to join me today in supporting EMILYs List with a donation that will go straight into helping women win up and down the ballot, across the country. I have to be honest — I can't believe that in the year 2023, we're having to fight for the right to choose. AGAIN. But if that's what the moment calls for, Peter, then that's what we'll do.
****It's time to fight our hearts out for fundamental freedoms. Are you ready? If you are, please give generously to my friends at EMILYs List as they work to elect women who will fight for all of us:**

**[https://emilyslist.org/go/Elect-Women-October](https://click.everyaction.com/k/71149517/431328608/2084576589?sourceid=1052097&refcode=20231007_BookerRS&refcode2=WTEFE1010&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZTA1ZDU5NC0yYTY1LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wC6rCA2218TYmfTNu5Wicy6suXgsdAQsffy6ApQVScs=)****

Cory
