clean_body: I believe in this mission from the bottom of my heart | | | = Hi Peter, it's Senator Cory Booker. I'm thrilled to have the chance to write to you today. I'm sure I don't have to tell you, but just in case you don't know: you are part of something really special. The EMILYs List community has been an inspiration in Democratic politics for almost 40 years, and your mission to elect more Democratic pro-choice women to office makes our country better every single day. **The truth is, when women win, we all win. That's why I'm asking you to join me today in supporting EMILYs List with a donation that will go straight into helping women win up and down the ballot, across the country. Donate now >> If you have saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your contribution will go through immediately. | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = I have to be honest — I can't believe that in the year 2023, we're having to fight for the right to choose. AGAIN. But if that's what the moment calls for, Peter, then that's what we'll do. It's time to fight our hearts out for fundamental freedoms. Are you ready? If you are, please give generously to my friends at EMILYs List as they work to elect women who will fight for all of us: =** Thank you! In solidarity and hope, Cory = Sen. Cory Booker = = EMILYs List is a community of over five million members that helps elect Democratic pro-choice women to office. | Paid for by EMILYs List and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. [**SHARE YOUR THOUGHTS**](https://link.tomkean.com/u/click?_t=9b7a451def6d4254858fc869cf07cd48&_m=b62ae981e9634d8985cc59a903040e34&_e=StB_024gMFPQ2Hbgf8Olp5yuGTRrS5ZjK1VNfIdos8QhlzxxAY1pzRsyGqGo1CV63CXM0AdcTz69Vcv6kOEz9fpV047jQ8BK-GcqT9YTjMFdPwR077WX02EO8_OXkJkqvBdpSo9cWh-vVtWN2AIxgW4CE-Z6400QVPRhTwjeUzZtDM5Ag-pXdGwj8Eflw3slDkCoCBWQBI5J1ZXaAtyWiMHTdnrzD9BOOZ7yWAnEbSblTSKM_olSQSedPqSK_iu1YkNxz1zDAFu-Nh2GHAH5brrpheTt4TSLCPYLJ8KbwTWDwXiDCfOA8wXTFKnyQNOpjwh09VoKtXDiI0uTtXn8gU2XbBK5D2E6G6gr47csTZ-ZGRMz82DJ3xdUOz_HPf80)

You might be wondering to yourself, friend, _“Why should I care about a senator from California?”_ First, let’s take a look at the new senator’s bio: **🚨 President of a Radical Super PAC** **🚨 Advised Kamala Harris’ Presidential Campaign****🚨 ZERO Experience Holding Public Office****🚨 DOESN’T EVEN LIVE IN CALIFORNIA?!** Does this sound like someone qualified for the job? **_Of course not. _** **Newsom made his pick regardless of qualifications because he wants someone who is going to advance their Radical agenda on the country without a second thought.** Now, why should _YOU_ care? Because this pick will shift the Senate even FURTHER to the left and right now there’s not much keeping the Democrat-controlled Senate in check.
So we want to know, friend, **what do you think about all this?**

name: Gloria Johnson
subject: I was a teacher
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gloria for Tennessee
body:
Here’s what I learned:

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71149949/431330212/-849459103?refcode=ea.7180f543-2b65-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ms=ea.7180f543-2b65-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTgwZjU0My0yYjY1LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jGUBC1X7mN681QhevCAHY27caXAuT8wSmJQ2E8CqmPs=&emci=60772ed0-bd63-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=7180f543-2b65-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=46764483)
---
Y’all — My parents always taught me to give back to people in my community who need it. That’s why I became a special education teacher and worked in schools for nearly 30 years. **A lot of what I learned as a teacher informs my work as a representative.** I learned that I couldn’t fix everything by myself, but that I _could_ help give kids the tools they needed for success. I learned that each student needed something different from me to reach their full potential. I learned that I couldn’t expect my students to understand where I was coming from, at first. If I met them where they were, then we could develop solutions to meet their needs together. **That’s how I’ll serve Tennessee as your Senator.** I know we can’t just dive in with one-size-fits-all solutions. That’s why I pledge to reach out to our communities and truly listen to what they need. I also know that if we’re going to win, there are folks who I’ll need to convince to join our movement. And the fact is, it’ll take a lot of hard work and resources to get those folks on our side. **_[I’m hoping you can make your first contribution to power us through the fight ahead. clean_body: Here’s what I learned: | Y’all — My parents always taught me to give back to people in my community who need it. That’s why I became a special education teacher and worked in schools for nearly 30 years. A lot of what I learned as a teacher informs my work as a representative. I learned that I couldn’t fix everything by myself, but that I could help give kids the tools they needed for success. I learned that each student needed something different from me to reach their full potential. I learned that I couldn’t expect my students to understand where I was coming from, at first. If I met them where they were, then we could develop solutions to meet their needs together. That’s how I’ll serve Tennessee as your Senator. I know we can’t just dive in with one-size-fits-all solutions. That’s why I pledge to reach out to our communities and truly listen to what they need. I also know that if we’re going to win, there are folks who I’ll need to convince to join our movement. And the fact is, it’ll take a lot of hard work and resources to get those folks on our side. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thanks so much for your time, Gloria = | Gloria Johnson is running for the U.S. Senate because Tennesseans deserve leaders who care. For too long, elected officials like Marsha Blackburn have done absolutely nothing to make Tennesseans’ lives better. The only interests they’ve cared about are special interests. The only people they’ve championed are their donors. Gloria will advocate for real solutions to protect our communities from gun violence, make health care more affordable and accessible for all of us, secure access to the ballot box, and defend reproductive rights. | = = Follow along: | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Gloria for Tennessee Contributions or gifts to Gloria for Tennessee are not tax deductible. Gloria for Tennessee 73 White Bridge Rd #103-353 Nashville, TN 37205

name: Nicole, Accountable Tech
subject: ICYMI: Tell Google to Delete Users’ Location Data
body:
Time to Act:
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc2fbcc59-4417-4c24-b44f-7f558763ade6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf659f3cd-7513-4eb4-9b75-6f6e53efe8fb/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Google promised to delete sensitive user data that could be weaponized to prosecute those seeking reproductive health care across state lines. Peter, they haven’t kept their promise. [Join us in holding Google accountable: Add your name to demand Google stop collecting and retaining user location data for abortion clinics.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T23c80a2f-4931-4e9e-b605-5c897aa772d3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [ADD YOUR NAME NOW!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3243310c-85f1-4492-bcfa-2f10fc0b816f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| Peter, In the time since the Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade, dozens of states have banned or severely restricted abortion care despite the fact that 511,000 abortions were estimated to have occurred in the first 6 months of 2023. [1] Accountable Tech’s research shows that Google still retains location search queries for reproductive care facilities – despite promising to do otherwise over a year ago. [2]

This is a HUGE problem: Right-wing state governments are increasingly seeking to prosecute people seeking abortions – and in states like Oklahoma and Texas, even private citizens can sue anyone who aids and abets abortion seekers. [3] [Peter, will you join us in calling on Google to protect users’ privacy and delete users’ location data that state governments and private citizens could use to prosecute or sue those seeking reproductive health care →](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta4270b5e-7538-41a4-9dfd-91ee6eea278d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | [ADD YOUR NAME!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T447c4822-a9a0-4f64-b0a8-154f405fd3bd/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Thanks to previous pressure that we put on Google this past year the tech giant updated their policy to automatically delete the location data of visits to "particularly personal" locations like counseling centers, domestic violence shelters, abortion clinics, fertility centers, addiction treatment facilities, weight loss clinics, cosmetic surgery clinics, and others. [4]

However, our own research from November 2022 and April 2023 found that this data is STILL being stored despite Google’s promises, and it could be weaponized by anti-abortion prosecutors and state agents. Recent research from the Washington Post also concluded that location history data related to visiting abortion clinics was stored by Google, despite their promises to automatically delete that sensitive data. [5] [This is unacceptable. Join us in calling on Google to uphold its promise and ADD YOUR NAME to demand Google stop collecting and retaining location data from users.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T53b1ff1d-fb81-42f1-9001-9b1d0a8d51c7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thanks for taking action with us to hold Google accountable. Nicole Gill
Co-founder and Executive Director
Accountable Tech [1] New York Times: [https://www.nytimes.com/interactive/2023/09/07/us/abortion-data-bans-laws.html](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc9958a2d-1e75-42eb-910a-d7d5033beaa2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [2] Accountable Tech: [https://accountabletech.org/research/googles-data-collection-and-policies-could-endanger-those-seeking-abortions/](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tee76e7af-828d-457d-a2f7-9c39fd3b8d9c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [3] CNN: [https://www.cnn.com/2022/04/28/politics/oklahoma-heartbeat-act/index.html](https://default.salsalabs.org/T131fcf12-fc25-45ed-b2d8-9ace2d12c72e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [4] Google: [https://blog.google/technology/safety-security/protecting-peoples-privacy-on-health-topics/](https://default.salsalabs.org/T32d72edd-1cc5-4199-8fe6-305d26c42b60/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [5] Washington Post: [https://www.washingtonpost.com/technology/2023/05/09/google-privacy-abortion-data/](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf89896ea-104a-45be-bbff-bc42582d65b3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T92e07bd5-e7ec-4580-819c-6dce24639394/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

Peter, they haven’t kept their promise. | | | Peter, In the time since the Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade, dozens of states have banned or severely restricted abortion care despite the fact that 511,000 abortions were estimated to have occurred in the first 6 months of 2023. [1] Accountable Tech’s research shows that Google still retains location search queries for reproductive care facilities – despite promising to do otherwise over a year ago. [2] This is a HUGE problem: Right-wing state governments are increasingly seeking to prosecute people seeking abortions – and in states like Oklahoma and Texas, even private citizens can sue anyone who aids and abets abortion seekers. [3] | | | | | | | | Thanks to previous pressure that we put on Google this past year the tech giant updated their policy to automatically delete the location data of visits to "particularly personal" locations like counseling centers, domestic violence shelters, abortion clinics, fertility centers, addiction treatment facilities, weight loss clinics, cosmetic surgery clinics, and others. [4] However, our own research from November 2022 and April 2023 found that this data is STILL being stored despite Google’s promises, and it could be weaponized by anti-abortion prosecutors and state agents. name: Urgent Redistricting Update
subject: What’s going on in Ohio?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
It’s shameful.
|
---

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/71150764/431332775/-1466375647?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20231007_FR_10G_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ0YjdkY2E4LTJjNjUtZWUxMS05OTM3LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=fDYSfd9TYtnTNxLEUGzAX_QwNgUbfYQeF150FC6X1Mg=)
---
**Team, what Republicans are doing in Ohio is _shameful_.** From the beginning, the GOP’s redistricting process has been marked by:
❌ Ignoring court orders
❌ Delaying map redraws
❌ Rushing public hearings
Last year, after state courts struck down their gerrymandered districts, Ohio Republicans ran out the clock before the 2022 election by resubmitting gerrymandered maps _seven more times_.

Now, after delaying the process of drawing new maps for a year and a half, Republicans in Ohio took just a week and a half to rush through manipulated voting districts.

**It is absurd – and enough is enough. It’s time for a transparent redraw process. Will you rush a donation now to help the NDRC fight for fair redistricting across the country?**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

**Team, power-hungry politicians should not be in charge of drawing maps. Period.** That’s why the NDRC is working across the country to protect the fair maps gains we’ve made, prevent Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression, and propel a fair redistricting process.
**"Our democracy is stronger because of what we have accomplished. States that were once gerrymandered . . . are now highly competitive, allowing voters to choose their representatives instead of the other way around.

But the movement doesn’t stop here. We must continue the work until we have fair maps in every state."

– _President Barack Obama_**

clean_body: It’s shameful. | | = Team, what Republicans are doing in Ohio is shameful. From the beginning, the GOP’s redistricting process has been marked by: ❌ Ignoring court orders ❌ Delaying map redraws ❌ Rushing public hearings Last year, after state courts struck down their gerrymandered districts, Ohio Republicans ran out the clock before the 2022 election by resubmitting gerrymandered maps seven more times. Now, after delaying the process of drawing new maps for a year and a half, Republicans in Ohio took just a week and a half to rush through manipulated voting districts. It is absurd – and enough is enough. It’s time for a transparent redraw process. Will you rush a donation now to help the NDRC fight for fair redistricting across the country? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Team, power-hungry politicians should not be in charge of drawing maps. Period. That’s why the NDRC is working across the country to protect the fair maps gains we’ve made, prevent Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression, and propel a fair redistricting process. "Our democracy is stronger because of what we have accomplished. States that were once gerrymandered . . . are now highly competitive, allowing voters to choose their representatives instead of the other way around. But the movement doesn’t stop here. We must continue the work until we have fair maps in every state." – President Barack Obama = – The NDRC = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. clean_body: The last few weeks have been jam-packed with examples of how out-of-touch Republicans are. | | | | MAGA Republicans are working overtime creating disruptions instead of working for the American people. The last few weeks have been jam-packed with examples of how out-of-touch and dysfunctional Republicans are: We've witnessed two presidential debates featuring shouting matches as candidates fight over whose plans for our country are the most extreme Their shenanigans almost shut down the government, and then MAGA Republicans threw the House into chaos by ousting the Speaker for the first time in history Meanwhile, the MAGA-led House is perpetrating an aimless sham-impeachment inquiry against President Biden Americans need a government that works for them, and Republicans are showing they can't deliver.**These MAGA extremists prefer infighting over governing. They're not taking anything seriously, and we need to use our grassroots power to ensure they're out of power in 2024. = Onward! Peter –
Dan Crenshaw here.
This week, the House of Representatives descended into chaos and confusion as eight Republicans joined every single Democrat in removing Kevin McCarthy as Speaker of the House. Republicans across the political spectrum - from Jim Jordan to Elise Stefanik to Thomas Massie - have all spoken out against this unprecedented action by a small faction of the House Republican conference. I share those concerns and you can listen to my full interview on this topic with Fox News Radio's Guy Benson here: [https://radio.foxnews.com/2023/10/04/dan-crenshaw-uni/](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00133KvHqkJNBxU0seOY-l6cd2IlLXthGc15IRJN-AG_zgd4O3IKP-wx8F7M5HIP91dFd0Xuk7M6heNKrW32teSy9uu9mk3pvPesXps2npXUSsUzx5UuCe2FnGcnFj0yujPa8wIKZHwAFHphQmER_C4mNIScjsg9b6ud_DHuly-vUPkI_DL4Ppdy4jzjEN0A8J9&c=5GdA3sdlhjbUzGTOUkAT2saGqvYS4jlhZpBvj4N-_cTraFxs3Q337A==&ch=Fw8lXGPKDuiaPXYlHEvpJmfqLlUFC4kXTmgzOXTMdkMY9TNK17bI2Q==)
There are critical issues facing the American people that Congress must address, whether that's an unmitigated border crisis, persistent inflation, rampant crime in every American city, and much more. The sooner Republicans can unite and get back to work on the things that actually matter to Americans, the better.
My full attention is on getting the Republican House majority back to work on key challenges facing our country. I'm still advocating for policies to secure our southern border and reduce veteran suicide, two topics I discuss in this campaign brief.
Now more than ever, I appreciate the support of dedicated donors like you from across the country. The Republican Party desperately needs commonsense, level-headed leaders in office to undo the damage Joe Biden's policies have inflicted on our country. I try to be one of those leaders every single day in Congress, and I take my job for you seriously.
If you want to help me stay in office and continue fighting for the priorities that matter to you - not side issues that distract from the real problems at hand - I would greatly appreciate any contribution you can send to my campaign. [You can donate at this link here.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00133KvHqkJNBxU0seOY-l6cd2IlLXthGc15IRJN-AG_zgd4O3IKP-wx8F7M5HIP91d3ujbaLRXkeNesd1HbXl21x3Ifdo5uQgmYdbnIyns9zdbTmGRtTkXdUweITa1SdMrj3WYivdqs5xKVAjOwY4MJWsb5URQUeYXr5H_FCkvLZf1TJTTcUK3QXZCG5EnRBE30W8DnEHNreeJcLhGazmPOpsra82AvHpHOQ1ckKkewbb0Bu2Yf5oT-wsSLcsf5oJh52icGHAgIomOwyWwYBgdVNM0aeLB526zMcmRZjN8iY3YsUzx3DcMXbUoLGXWXQL4jQmwVVuLnjTy9scyJsZrBOWVCnqCwB-Uss4N-dWFDu4=&c=5GdA3sdlhjbUzGTOUkAT2saGqvYS4jlhZpBvj4N-_cTraFxs3Q337A==&ch=Fw8lXGPKDuiaPXYlHEvpJmfqLlUFC4kXTmgzOXTMdkMY9TNK17bI2Q==)
Thank you for your continued support, and God bless.
Now, here's your brief.

| HERE'S WHY BIDEN'S NEW BORDER WALL IS NOTHING TO CELEBRATE

| Biden's announcement this week of a few miles of border wall, to be completed at some later date, is nothing to celebrate.
If barriers are now an agreed upon solution, they need to be the buoy barriers Texas has put in the Rio Grande. Buoy barriers can be deployed immediately and they actually prevent migrants from crossing the international barrier.
If Biden were really serious, he would be enforcing the laws we have on the books right now to stop illegal immigration. But he's not serious. His border wall is just a stunt to grab some headlines and make it seem like he's not totally ignoring the crisis he created.

| Last week, my amendment to the Defense Appropriations Act was adopted by a voice vote. The amendment requires a report on potential Pentagon-Veterans Affairs collaboration for psychedelic-assisted therapy clinical trials. Over the past few years I've heard incredible testimonies from veterans who have turned to psychedelic-assisted therapies to treat PTSD and Traumatic Brain Injury.
This is not about legalization or recreational use of psychedelics. It's about honoring our promise to our military families and confronting the high incidence of suicide in the military and veteran community. We have a crisis, and the idea that we wouldn't research potential breakthrough treatments is unacceptable. The status quo is inadequate, and it won't stop servicemembers and veterans from committing suicide.
We have good reason for believing that this research will help. The most recent Phase 3 clinical trials with MDMA found that 86% of the study participants had reduced PTSD symptoms and 71% didn't even qualify as having PTSD anymore.
These clinical trials are already happening, and we need to continue this research for our service members.

clean_body: | | | | | | | | == | Peter – Dan Crenshaw here. This week, the House of Representatives descended into chaos and confusion as eight Republicans joined every single Democrat in removing Kevin McCarthy as Speaker of the House. Republicans across the political spectrum - from Jim Jordan to Elise Stefanik to Thomas Massie - have all spoken out against this unprecedented action by a small faction of the House Republican conference. I share those concerns and you can listen to my full interview on this topic with Fox News Radio's Guy Benson here: == There are critical issues facing the American people that Congress must address, whether that's an unmitigated border crisis, persistent inflation, rampant crime in every American city, and much more. The sooner Republicans can unite and get back to work on the things that actually matter to Americans, the better. My full attention is on getting the Republican House majority back to work on key challenges facing our country. I'm still advocating for policies to secure our southern border and reduce veteran suicide, two topics I discuss in this campaign brief. Now more than ever, I appreciate the support of dedicated donors like you from across the country. The Republican Party desperately needs commonsense, level-headed leaders in office to undo the damage Joe Biden's policies have inflicted on our country. I try to be one of those leaders every single day in Congress, and I take my job for you seriously. If you want to help me stay in office and continue fighting for the priorities that matter to you - not side issues that distract from the real problems at hand - I would greatly appreciate any contribution you can send to my campaign. == Thank you for your continued support, and God bless. Now, here's your brief. | | | | | | | | HERE'S WHY BIDEN'S NEW BORDER WALL IS NOTHING TO CELEBRATE | == | == | | | Biden's announcement this week of a few miles of border wall, to be completed at some later date, is nothing to celebrate. If barriers are now an agreed upon solution, they need to be the buoy barriers Texas has put in the Rio Grande. Buoy barriers can be deployed immediately and they actually prevent migrants from crossing the international barrier. If Biden were really serious, he would be enforcing the laws we have on the books right now to stop illegal immigration. But he's not serious. His border wall is just a stunt to grab some headlines and make it seem like he's not totally ignoring the crisis he created. | | | | | | | | | | == | | | | | | | | ADVANCING INNOVATIVE TREATMENT OPTIONS FOR VETERANS LIVING WITH PTSD | == | == | Last week, my amendment to the Defense Appropriations Act was adopted by a voice vote. The amendment requires a report on potential Pentagon-Veterans Affairs collaboration for psychedelic-assisted therapy clinical trials. Over the past few years I've heard incredible testimonies from veterans who have turned to psychedelic-assisted therapies to treat PTSD and Traumatic Brain Injury. This is not about legalization or recreational use of psychedelics. It's about honoring our promise to our military families and confronting the high incidence of suicide in the military and veteran community. We have a crisis, and the idea that we wouldn't research potential breakthrough treatments is unacceptable. The status quo is inadequate, and it won't stop servicemembers and veterans from committing suicide. We have good reason for believing that this research will help. The most recent Phase 3 clinical trials with MDMA found that 86% of the study participants had reduced PTSD symptoms and 71% didn't even qualify as having PTSD anymore. These clinical trials are already happening, and we need to continue this research for our service members. | | | | | | | | == | | | == | | | | | | | | ON SOCIAL MEDIA | | | == | == | == | | | == | | | | | | | | NEWS | WASHINGTON EXAMINER: == NATIONAL REVIEW: == HOOVER: == | That's it for this week's campaign brief. Thank you for reading and staying informed. Have a great weekend! | In Service, | | Dan Crenshaw | | | | | | | | | | | | == | Was this email forwarded to you? == to get the latest updates on the fight in Washington direct from me. Any questions, comments, or concerns? Simply reply to this email or give Team Crenshaw a call at 281-888-4016. These updates are only possible with the generous gift of supporters like you! From: Team Schrier
Subject: Will you take Kim’s priorities survey?
Date: Thurs, October 5 The House Republican caucus has been in complete chaos, team.

First, they led us to the brink of a reckless government shutdown. Then on Tuesday, Matt Gaetz and his MAGA friends led the effort to remove their own Speaker – _for the first time in American history._

**No matter how much dysfunction we see on the Republican side of the aisle, Kim’s ready to keep working in a bipartisan way to deliver results for the people of WA-08.**

As we look ahead to the rest of the year, we have a lot of work ahead of us – from lowering costs to keeping our government open. That’s why Kim wants to hear from this grassroots team.

body:
the countdown begins

|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71151518/431334819/1995090618?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNTBiNmZjMi0yZTY1LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=H9Afms4U2ueX8O8YfkB6GM7nzge13Ri30rrNbYrjyfw=&emci=eee6adb3-7f64-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=250b6fc2-2e65-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=4568237)

| | Well, Derek, it’s official. Election Day is one month away. As my team and I dive head first into the ground game in Virginia, getting voters to the polls to bring a sweeping victory for Democrats in the General Assembly next month, I wanted to share a quick thought with you. I frankly can’t remember the last time our legislative elections received this much attention. I’m seeing articles left and right from political pundits talking about why we’re the “state to watch” or how our election is “a sneak peak of what’s to come in 2024.” Here’s a short – but terrifyingly accurate – headline I just read in _Politico:_ [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71151519/431334820/1355561865?refcode=mw_em_231007_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNTBiNmZjMi0yZTY1LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=H9Afms4U2ueX8O8YfkB6GM7nzge13Ri30rrNbYrjyfw=) It’s safe to say that this election carries a lot of weight for not just the Commonwealth, but our entire country. _****[That’s why I’m asking if you can chip in $5 to support my efforts these next 4 weeks to turn the General Assembly blue.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71151520/431334821/1355561865?refcode=mw_em_231007_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNTBiNmZjMi0yZTY1LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=H9Afms4U2ueX8O8YfkB6GM7nzge13Ri30rrNbYrjyfw=)****_ A GOP sweep next month would set the stage for rollbacks on climate policies, gun safety, reproductive health care, and more. It could also be a predictor of other upcoming state elections taking place in 2024 – allowing Republicans to test their messaging and campaign strategies. My team and I are doing everything in our power this month to elect Democrats up and down the ballot in Virginia to protect all the progress we’ve fought so hard for. _****[Can you help us by donating today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71151521/431334822/1355561865?refcode=mw_em_231007_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNTBiNmZjMi0yZTY1LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=H9Afms4U2ueX8O8YfkB6GM7nzge13Ri30rrNbYrjyfw=)****_ **Don’t forget: Virginia is the only state in the nation with the chance to flip the legislature blue this year.** One month to go. Let’s get it done. Mark Warner **[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71151522/431334823/1355561865?refcode=mw_em_231007_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNTBiNmZjMi0yZTY1LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=H9Afms4U2ueX8O8YfkB6GM7nzge13Ri30rrNbYrjyfw=)**

As my team and I dive head first into the ground game in Virginia, getting voters to the polls to bring a sweeping victory for Democrats in the General Assembly next month, I wanted to share a quick thought with you. I frankly can’t remember the last time our legislative elections received this much attention. I’m seeing articles left and right from political pundits talking about why we’re the “state to watch” or how our election is “a sneak peak of what’s to come in 2024.” Here’s a short – but terrifyingly accurate – headline I just read in Politico: = It’s safe to say that this election carries a lot of weight for not just the Commonwealth, but our entire country. **= A GOP sweep next month would set the stage for rollbacks on climate policies, gun safety, reproductive health care, and more. It could also be a predictor of other upcoming state elections taking place in 2024 – allowing Republicans to test their messaging and campaign strategies. My team and I are doing everything in our power this month to elect Democrats up and down the ballot in Virginia to protect all the progress we’ve fought so hard for. = Don’t forget: Virginia is the only state in the nation with the chance to flip the legislature blue this year. One month to go. Let’s get it done. Mark Warner = | | Friends of Mark Warner 1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213 Williamsburg, VA 23185 United States | Click here to . | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Bad news for Republicans:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m23-schiff [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m23-schiff]
Hey there,
In a moment, I’m going to ask you to split a small donation between Seth Moulton and our campaign ahead of our midnight deadline [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/m23-schiff] . But first, I wanted to explain why your gift is so important — especially right now.
From the moment I jumped into the race, Republicans piled on.
It actually started the night right before I announced my campaign. In one of Kevin McCarthy’s first acts as Speaker, he unilaterally removed me from serving on the House Intelligence Committee.
Then it was Matt Gaetz. He introduced legislation trying to bar me from accessing classified information.
Then came Tucker Carlson. He recently launched into a desperate rant about me on his primetime Fox News show.
Then Donald Trump piled on too. He couldn’t resist. He dedicated part of his CPAC speech to hurl insult after insult against me.
And I’m going to be honest, I don’t even send you the really crazy stuff.
It’s just the beginning. After every one of their attacks, I then receive thousands more like it online from their MAGA loyalists trying to sabotage our work to defend democracy.
Republicans see me as their boogeyman this election. Why? Because I’ve stood up to these bullies and called out their lies.
It’s clear they don’t want me in the Senate. They don’t want oversight. They don’t want me to hold them accountable. They don’t want an outspoken defender of democracy on the Senate floor.
Bad news for Republicans: I’ve never been one to give up a fight — especially when it gets tough. I’m not going to let Donald Trump or any one of his lackeys tear our campaign down.
Friend, I need to know you have my back the entire way. Will you pitch in a donation of $3 or more to Seth Moulton and our campaign before our midnight deadline? The attacks are only going to get nastier from here, so we need to prepare for everything they’re going to launch our way: [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/m23-schiff]
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m23-schiff]
Thank you for your support,
— Adam
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m23-schiff]

name: LucasKunce.com
subject: NEW: “Josh Hawley doesn’t stand with workers, he just poses”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
UAW Local 2250 Legislative Chair: “I know a fraud when I see one”
#
Working people are fed up with Josh Hawley’s BS, Peter.
MSNBC just published a scathing op-ed from a union leader at UAW Local 2250 here in Missouri all about Hawley’s failed attempt to brand himself as “pro-worker” for his re-election campaign. **Just see for yourself:**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38512?t=1&akid=3938%2E614464%2ErEfLuA)
**[CLICK HERE TO READ THE OP-ED](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38512?t=2&akid=3938%2E614464%2ErEfLuA)**
**Hawley’s hypocrisy about his support for workers has drawn some serious coverage from several in-state and national news outlets.**
_Business Insider_ reported on his opposition to the PRO Act. _The Intercept_ exposed him for accepting campaign contributions from the Big Three Automakers. And the _St. Louis Post-Dispatch_ found that Hawley’s most recent agreement rating on the UAW’s Labor Union scorecard is 0%.
**But this testament from union leadership really speaks for itself:**
> _There’s a stark difference between staging a photo op with unions...and taking real votes in the Senate to fight for us..._
> _We know [Hawley]’s only changed his tune because of polling and the fact that he’s up for re-election next year._
> _This isn’t my first rodeo. I know a fraud when I see one. And working people are sick and tired of it._
**It’s about time working Missourians had someone actually fighting for them in the U.S. Senate — not a fraud and a phony like Josh Hawley.** That’s why Lucas Kunce is running to replace him, with support from the Missouri AFL-CIO and dozens more statewide and union locals across the state.
**[So if you’re ready to defeat Josh Hawley and elect Lucas Kunce, a proven warrior for working people, to Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat, please chip in $10 or whatever you can afford toward our campaign today:](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38513?refcode=em20231007-3938&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=3938%2E614464%2ErEfLuA)**

Team Lucas Kunce

name: Team Ohio Dems
subject: One month
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Ohio Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
until we can vote to protect reproductive rights in our state constitution

The countdown is on, team. **We’re officially one month out from Election Day.** **We have 31 days to protect reproductive rights in Ohio’s Constitution for good.** Only 31 days left to fight back against the storm of Republican ad spending, to educate Ohioans on how we can overcome the GOP’s suppressive voter ID laws, to reach _every voter in every corner of the state_ to get people to the ballot box in droves. **31 days to organize for victory.** **[One of the biggest ways to make an impact in this home stretch is by setting up a $5 weekly recurring donation through Election Day. #

Hi team, It’s been a few months since we last reached out with a survey to make sure we understand your priorities, but with the final quarter of the year underway and chaos erupting in Congress, we thought today was a good time to check in to see what’s on your mind. Right now, Nikki is cutting through the noise to overcome the partisan infighting in Congress and deliver real solutions for working families in IL-13 and our country — where our focus should always be. From working to pass a bipartisan budget to championing legislation to provide our veterans, farmers, and teachers with the resources they need, Nikki will continue to meet this moment with the urgency it deserves. The issues that matter most to you are important to our reelection campaign, folks. And together, we can set the agenda Nikki will focus on over the next few weeks in Washington. **[So, please take our campaign’s official Q4 Priorities survey to let us know which issues you'd like to see prioritized this quarter. Exactly 31 days from today, the good folks of our state will stand at a crossroads: they can vote out corruption and move our state forward, or choose the same broken path of backward leadership where nothing ever gets done.

[The answer couldn't be more clear. Can you chip in just $1 (yes, you read that right) for our 1-month countdown to Election Day to help us give Tate Reeves the boot?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71157175/431340646/-935144756?amount=1&refcode=ea.9b70aff6-3265-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ms=ea.9b70aff6-3265-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWI3MGFmZjYtMzI2NS1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=vMQKF7pBo9wzvZFmPyq3vSixZ_vT0lfNsukzGflVxgo=)

When I'm elected Governor, I'm going to make sure that our hospitals stay open and funded, healthcare staff remain employed, and that 220,000 Mississippians gain access to Medicaid.

I'm going to clean up the corruption, disrupt the status quo, and stand up to the special interests running the show in Jackson.

And I am going to put money back into the pockets of working families by eliminating the grocery tax and cutting car tag costs in half. **But I need your help now more than ever.**

Every dollar is another investment into a text message to an undecided voter, a mail piece, a new TV ad, another knocked door, or any other tool you can imagine to contact voters.

November 7th will put our campaign to the test against Tate Reeves' rich and powerful donors. I know that if we work together, we can pull off the win, move Mississippi forward, and bring accountability to our state.

[So, Peter, what do you say? Can you chip in just $1 today to help me get the job done?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71157177/431340648/-935144756?amount=1&refcode=ea.9b70aff6-3265-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ms=ea.9b70aff6-3265-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWI3MGFmZjYtMzI2NS1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=vMQKF7pBo9wzvZFmPyq3vSixZ_vT0lfNsukzGflVxgo=) | **[Donate $1](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71157178/431340649/-935144756?amount=1&refcode=ea.9b70aff6-3265-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ms=ea.9b70aff6-3265-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWI3MGFmZjYtMzI2NS1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=vMQKF7pBo9wzvZFmPyq3vSixZ_vT0lfNsukzGflVxgo=)** | **[Donate $10](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71157179/431340650/-935144756?amount=10&refcode=ea.9b70aff6-3265-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ms=ea.9b70aff6-3265-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWI3MGFmZjYtMzI2NS1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=vMQKF7pBo9wzvZFmPyq3vSixZ_vT0lfNsukzGflVxgo=)** | **[Donate $25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71157180/431340651/-935144756?amount=25&refcode=ea.9b70aff6-3265-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ms=ea.9b70aff6-3265-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWI3MGFmZjYtMzI2NS1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=vMQKF7pBo9wzvZFmPyq3vSixZ_vT0lfNsukzGflVxgo=)**

clean_body: There’s no holding back now. | = = Peter, we're now one month out from one of the most consequential Mississippi governor elections of our lifetime. Exactly 31 days from today, the good folks of our state will stand at a crossroads: they can vote out corruption and move our state forward, or choose the same broken path of backward leadership where nothing ever gets done. = When I'm elected Governor, I'm going to make sure that our hospitals stay open and funded, healthcare staff remain employed, and that 220,000 Mississippians gain access to Medicaid. I'm going to clean up the corruption, disrupt the status quo, and stand up to the special interests running the show in Jackson. And I am going to put money back into the pockets of working families by eliminating the grocery tax and cutting car tag costs in half. But I need your help now more than ever. Every dollar is another investment into a text message to an undecided voter, a mail piece, a new TV ad, another knocked door, or any other tool you can imagine to contact voters. November 7th will put our campaign to the test against Tate Reeves' rich and powerful donors. I know that if we work together, we can pull off the win, move Mississippi forward, and bring accountability to our state. = | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = God Bless, Brandon Presley = | | = = Follow along: Paid for by Brandon Presley Campaign Brandon Presley Campaign P.O. Here’s what we know about the current mifepristone case, Peter: Most recently, a federal court ruled that access to the abortion drug mifepristone must be restricted, pending further Supreme Court action. To be clear: **Mifepristone remains available for now.** But this ruling to restrict is now going to go before the Supreme Court — the same Court that voted to overturn _Roe v. Wade_ last year. If the Court upholds this decision, mifepristone will no longer be available by mail, and will only be available in the first seven weeks of pregnancy — including in states where abortion remains legal. [_**We still have time to fight back and make our demands known to the Court. We’re counting on you, Peter, to chip in any amount today to help us protect abortion medication access:**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71157453/431341166/1794220520?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20231007_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjdhOGEwMWMtMzM2NS1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=cb9VLVgIgnMzo70Bx_GJiJwjT7G_kNtbYJAm7uW2nHc=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71157460/431341173/1794220520?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=AU_HTP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20231007_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjdhOGEwMWMtMzM2NS1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=cb9VLVgIgnMzo70Bx_GJiJwjT7G_kNtbYJAm7uW2nHc=)

body:
We’re SO close

Peter, My life’s work — over 25 years of public service in state government — has been to bring people together, bridge divides, and find common ground. I know that Louisiana is at its best when we put divisive politics aside to get the job done. That’s why I jumped into this race in the first place: I believe that to make progress over the next four years, Louisiana needs a leader who will build bridges over our toughest obstacles, not burn them. **Now, we’re one week out from the Louisiana primary** , poised to make the November runoff — _but our work isn’t finished._ As the saying goes, “It ain’t over til it’s over,” and our top priority for these next 7 days is to turn out as many voters as possible in precincts across the state. **We need to raise $10,000 by Monday to fuel our voter outreach this week, and I’m counting on you to help us get it done!** **_[Peter, can you chip in any amount today to help us go all-in on our voter outreach in the home stretch this week? clean_body: We’re SO close Peter, My life’s work — over 25 years of public service in state government — has been to bring people together, bridge divides, and find common ground. I know that Louisiana is at its best when we put divisive politics aside to get the job done. That’s why I jumped into this race in the first place: I believe that to make progress over the next four years, Louisiana needs a leader who will build bridges over our toughest obstacles, not burn them. Now, we’re one week out from the Louisiana primary , poised to make the November runoff — but our work isn’t finished. As the saying goes, “It ain’t over til it’s over,” and our top priority for these next 7 days is to turn out as many voters as possible in precincts across the state. We need to raise $10,000 by Monday to fuel our voter outreach this week, and I’m counting on you to help us get it done! = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = It’s our time, Louisiana! Let’s do this! \- Shawn Wilson = | = = | PAID FOR BY WILSON FOR LOUISIANA Wilson for Louisiana P.O. Our membership cards will be sent to every member of our grassroots movement as a token of your commitment to electing state Democrats, and we want it to be a card you are proud of. body:
Thank you for signing up to receive the details for Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.’s major announcement on October 9 in Philadelphia, PA, the birthplace of our nation.

| [ ](https://www.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=join_rfk_jr_philly_107_unopens&n=1)
---
Dear Peter, Thank you for signing up to receive the details for Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.’s major announcement on October 9 in Philadelphia, PA, the birthplace of our nation. We are proud to share the official invitation for the event. We hope you will join us. [](https://www.kennedy24.com/philadelphia?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=join_rfk_jr_philly_107_unopens&n=2) | [](https://www.kennedy24.com/philadelphia?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=join_rfk_jr_philly_107_unopens&n=3 "RSVP") [RSVP](https://www.kennedy24.com/philadelphia?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=join_rfk_jr_philly_107_unopens&n=3)
---
In his speech on Monday, Mr. Kennedy will lay out a path to the White House that involves a **major shift in American politics**. We invite you to witness history in the making, at the very spot where our founding fathers launched this nation in 1776 with the Declaration of Independence. On Monday, we come together again to reset the course of our nation.
This is an event you won’t want to miss. We hope you will join us. Please RSVP to be there in person.
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/philadelphia?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=join_rfk_jr_philly_107_unopens&n=4 "RSVP") [RSVP](https://www.kennedy24.com/philadelphia?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=join_rfk_jr_philly_107_unopens&n=4)
---
If you can’t make the event in-person in Philadelphia, we will be livestreaming the event as well. If you would like to [register for the livestream event](https://www.kennedy24.com/philadelphia?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=join_rfk_jr_philly_107_unopens&n=5), you can register for that as well.
This is a free event. [Please consider making a donation of $5, $10, or $25 to support our efforts to put on this historic event](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=join_rfk_jr_philly_107_unopens&n=6).
Best,
Team Kennedy

Friend,
This week, as you watched yours truly stand trial as a completely innocent man, you’ve seen exactly what the Radical Democrats' endgame really is...
A pursuit of _absolute_ power at the expense of our free Republic, our Constitution, and not just my civil liberties, but _YOUR freedom_ as well.
The power-drunk Democrats, TERRIFIED by the latest polls that show us LEADING Crooked Joe by 10 POINTS, will do anything – _truly, anything_ – to destroy the one man who can and will defeat Biden in 2024.
_**They wrongfully impeach me and raid my home. They indict me, unlawfully arrest me, and even force me to take a mugshot. They’re attempting to strip me of my livelihood and take away my incredible business. They want to harass my family and take away my home, Trump Tower. And now, they’re trying to GAG me for the rest of the election to prevent me from even criticizing Crooked Joe.**_
**... All of this to CANCEL OUT YOUR VOTE! **
Our Founding Fathers would be rolling in their graves if they could see what is happening to the America they left us – _once the freest country in the world._
But these Deep State thugs truly are monsters...
They would trade our Republic for a tin-pot dictatorship in a heartbeat if it meant an everlasting grip on power.
And mark my words, if they succeed at INTERFERING in this election, in the FINAL BATTLE for our country, America will never be the same.
**But I promise you this: The one thing these crooks, thugs, and fools can _NEVER_ contend with is a movement of more than 74 MILLION patriots peacefully declaring that they will NEVER, _EVER_ SURRENDER our country to Third World Marxist tyranny! **
_If you’re struggling right now due to Biden’s disastrous policies, believe me, I completely understand. In that case, please don’t even think about donating. I mean it!_
But if you can contribute even just $1 alongside your fellow patriots to show that you too will NEVER SURRENDER, then God knows our country needs YOU now more than ever.

clean_body: This is my promise... | | | Friend, This week, as you watched yours truly stand trial as a completely innocent man, you’ve seen exactly what the Radical Democrats' endgame really is... A pursuit of absolute power at the expense of our free Republic, our Constitution, and not just my civil liberties, but YOUR freedom as well. The power-drunk Democrats, TERRIFIED by the latest polls that show us LEADING Crooked Joe by 10 POINTS, will do anything – truly, anything – to destroy the one man who can and will defeat Biden in 2024. They wrongfully impeach me and raid my home. They indict me, unlawfully arrest me, and even force me to take a mugshot. They’re attempting to strip me of my livelihood and take away my incredible business. They want to harass my family and take away my home, Trump Tower. And now, they’re trying to GAG me for the rest of the election to prevent me from even criticizing Crooked Joe. ... All of this to CANCEL OUT YOUR VOTE! Our Founding Fathers would be rolling in their graves if they could see what is happening to the America they left us – once the freest country in the world. But these Deep State thugs truly are monsters... They would trade our Republic for a tin-pot dictatorship in a heartbeat if it meant an everlasting grip on power. And mark my words, if they succeed at INTERFERING in this election, in the FINAL BATTLE for our country, America will never be the same. But I promise you this: The one thing these crooks, thugs, and fools can NEVER contend with is a movement of more than 74 MILLION patriots peacefully declaring that they will NEVER, EVER SURRENDER our country to Third World Marxist tyranny! If you’re struggling right now due to Biden’s disastrous policies, believe me, I completely understand. In that case, please don’t even think about donating. I mean it! But if you can contribute even just $1 alongside your fellow patriots to show that you too will NEVER SURRENDER, then God knows our country needs YOU now more than ever. | Thank you and God bless you, | Donald J. name: Team Pramila
subject: Supporting the Climate Resilience Workforce Act
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
In the midst of Congressional chaos, Pramila remains dedicated to delivering for our movement.
#
Peter, in the midst of Congressional chaos, Pramila remains dedicated to delivering for our movement.
Our fight for climate and economic justice is nowhere near finished.
**That's why Pramila introduced The Climate Resilience Workforce Act** to make bold investments in building a skilled workforce that can prepare and respond to our climate crisis. Her bill will create millions of jobs, centering communities who are hit hardest by climate change.
Peter, this is the kind of determined and compassionate leadership we need from every single member of Congress.
**[If you stand with Pramila and her efforts to stand up for working families and address the climate crisis, please contribute $3 to our movement today.](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/46128?refcode=em20231007-3015&t=1&akid=3015%2E420207%2Es3Jf0g)**
**[Donate ››](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/46128?refcode=em20231007-3015&t=20&akid=3015%2E420207%2Es3Jf0g)**
As the severity and frequency of climate disasters continue to rise, the United States does not have the necessary infrastructure or workforce to respond to this crisis. **In 2022 alone, our country experienced 18 weather disasters, costing the country billions of dollars and endangering the lives of millions.**
The Climate Resilience Workforce Act plans to:
* Create millions of climate resilience jobs
* Remove barriers to employment based on immigration status and provide a roadmap to citizenships to workers employed in climate resilience sectors
* Fund existing workforce development programs
* Invest in the creation of regional, state, local, and community-based climate resilience action plans that center frontline communities
* And so much more.

It's time that we buckle down and continue supporting leaders who actually care for their constituents, and the future of our planet. [**Chip in today to power our work and continue supporting Pramila as she fights for us in Congress.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/46128?refcode=em20231007-3015&t=21&akid=3015%2E420207%2Es3Jf0g)
---
In solidarity,
Team Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20231007-3015-footer&t=22&refcode2=3015_420207_s3Jf0g&akid=3015%2E420207%2Es3Jf0g)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=23&akid=3015%2E420207%2Es3Jf0g)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=3015%2E420207%2Es3Jf0g)

name: Sara Jacobs
subject: Feeling incredibly grateful
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
Friends - amid the chaos that is Capitol Hill right now, I’m so glad I have this team standing by me. Thank you so much to everyone who showed their support for my re-election campaign these last few days. The pressure was at an all-time high between our end-of-quarter fundraising deadline, our hustle to avoid a Republican government shutdown, and of course, the ousting of Kevin McCarthy from the Speakership.
Through all of that, you all stepped up – and here’s some good news: We blew past our fundraising goal!
This victory matters a lot. Besides the huge relief of hitting our goal - it sets us up for a strong October by helping us plan ahead and build a stronger campaign, and it shows everyone the strength of our grassroots support.
I’m feeling incredibly grateful and proud of this team. Thank you all so much for your support - whether that’s reading my emails, showing up when it matters most, chipping in to my campaign when you’re able to, or all of the above. Having supporters like you by my side will help us make a huge impact in the weeks and months ahead, especially as we get closer to next November.
Thank you 💗
-Sara
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
Congresswoman Sara Jacobs
California’s 51st District

No matter how much they attack our movement, we will NEVER SURRENDER our mission to MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!

_If you are doing poorly due to the very sinister and corrupt people running Washington right now, please do not donate. I mean it._

The Deep State is now declaring war on our America First movement. Crooked Joe has summoned a“war crimes prosecutor”to join the special counsel to try and imprison me for life as an innocent man. By adding a “war crimes” prosecutor to the Biden special counsel team, the Left is trying to send a message and make an example out of me... ...They want to show the nation that these are the consequences of choosing to put a political outsider in the White House. This is ultimately about instilling FEAR in the public. The fear that if you stand in the way of their Marxist agenda, then YOU could be INDICTED, ARRESTED, or IMPRISONED for your beliefs. The fear that if you give the forgotten, hardworking men and women of this country a voice, then YOU could be made their Public Enemy #1. In the eyes of the Deep State, challenging the ruling class and vowing to put the American people first is akin to committing war crimes. But together, we will PEACEFULLY show the Deep State that their intimidation tactics cannot work on the American people. No matter how much they attack our movement, we will NEVER SURRENDER our mission to MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN! If you are doing poorly due to the very sinister and corrupt people running Washington right now, please do not donate. I mean it. Otherwise, I don’t have to tell you how critical these times are for our country. America needs you now more than ever before. | | Thank you, Donald J. subject: Hovde fits the bill

body:
| Mitch McConnell and national Republicans are trying to recruit wealthy self-funders.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=1292%2E35263%2EKmd1ku)
We wanted to make sure you saw this, Peter: | | **"Eric Hovde sells $4.3 million in stock while eyeing a potential GOP bid against Tammy Baldwin"**
_— Milwaukee Journal Sentinel_
* * *
**Right-wing megamillionaire Eric Hovde recently reported over $4 million in stock sales that he could now use to fund his Senate campaign to defeat Tammy.[Before Hovde officially jumps into this race, will you rush in a donation to help Tammy defend this seat and our Senate majority?](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-oct23.ejjIam&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20231007_AM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=1292%2E35263%2EKmd1ku)** | [DONATE NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-oct23.ejjIam&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20231007_AM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=1292%2E35263%2EKmd1ku)
---
The race for Wisconsin’s toss-up Senate seat is heating up.
One of Tammy’s potential opponents, megamillionaire bank CEO Eric Hovde, recently sold a reported $4.3 million worth of stocks in a move that _**could help fund a campaign war chest to defeat Tammy.**_
Mitch McConnell and national Republicans are trying to recruit wealthy candidates across the country who can self-fund their own Senate campaigns — and Hovde fits the bill in Wisconsin.
**We need to take this seriously, Peter, and start building up the resources to fight back right now.**
**[With a potential megamillionaire Republican opponent looming, will you rush in a donation to help Tammy defend Wisconsin’s toss-up Senate seat? We’re counting on your support to keep this seat — and our Senate majority — blue.](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-oct23.ejjIam&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20231007_AM1_V1_S1&t=6&akid=1292%2E35263%2EKmd1ku)**

disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alaskans For Honest Elections, 2521 E Mtn Village Dr #904 Wasilla, AK 99654 Phillip Izon, Director Approved This Message
body:
Please share this with as many people as you can. Share with 5-10 people. | | | [](https://f69e.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=6521a3e3f1f2e84e7f189128&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.alaskansforhonestelections.com%2F%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D6521a26ef1f2e84e7f1870db%26ss_email_id%3D6521a3e3f1f2e84e7f189128%26ss_campaign_name%3DNew%2Bsigning%2Blocations%2Band%2Bour%2Bturn%2Bto%2Bfile%2Ba%2Bcomplaint%25E2%2580%25A6%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2023-10-07T18%253A31%253A17Z&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_6521a26ef1f2e84e7f1870db&l=en-US&s=1sVoK2Z_M6tEfbHow2pM3acIY2w%3D)
---
|
### **IT’S UP TO YOU ALASKA**
---
### **Tudor Bingo and Big Valley Bingo as new signing locations**
---
---
|
---
#### **PSA:**
#### **We submitted a formal complaint to APOC (Alaska Political Office Commission) concerning the actions of the Pro-RCV group in Alaska. While they have accused us of breaching various State Campaign Finance Laws, we assert that this group should also adhere to the same rules and regulations. Contrary to their portrayal, this organization is not grassroots and receives substantial funding from outside of Alaska. Our objective is to hold them responsible for their apparent hypocrisy and their attempts to intimidate and tarnish the image of Alaskans, their organizations, and families. Their efforts to suppress our movement against ranked choice voting should not go unnoticed, and they must answer for potentially breaking the same laws they accuse us of. It's concerning that these well-informed political activists, who have benefited from massive out-of-state donations for their ranked choice voting agenda and campaign finance law changes, manipulate the system to their advantage, expecting regular citizens to falter and then overwhelm them with financial and legal burdens. We trust that the State of Alaska will ensure that these laws are applied uniformly, calling this Pro-RCV group to account for any disregard of Alaskan laws and norms.**
#### **Please see the full 111 page complaint when it is made public by the news and APOC. All of this information is public information.**
---
### **Message To Alaskans**
---
### **THANK YOU, OVER 400+ Petition Books Returned**
---
#### **400 Petition Books Returned So Far... 600+ Still in Circulation**
**Mail your petition book after getting it notarized to:****Phil Izon - 4201 Dimond Way Wasilla, AK 99654 - Call if you need help**[**907-802-8116**](tel:+19078028116)
---
#### **Please continue to send your petition books in notarized. We will be in touch shortly to send out new books. We appreciate all of your time and effort. Today we had 74 petition books returned in a single day, very exciting and I hope all Alaskans appreciate the effort and time by all involved (Over 1,000 Alaskan Volunteers Across The State) to make this a reality. We plan to submit 200-300% of the required signatures.**
---
|
---
#### **You Must Sign The Petition In Person, Online Signatures Do Not Count.**
---
---
|
---
---
|
---
### **Signing Locations**
---
Anchorage Sign During Business Hours
---
---
|
---

---
---
|
---
Sign In Juneau, Call Beforehand
---
Sign In Wasilla, Address and Times Below

---
|
---
Sign In Homer, address and time below

|

Wasilla Sign During Business Hours

Dan Powell 907-942-1312
Thank You Dan!!!**
---

|

|
---
### Please Share with Friends, Family, and Co-Workers!
---

clean_body: Please share this with as many people as you can. Share with 5-10 people. | | | | IT’S UP TO YOU ALASKA Tudor Bingo and Big Valley Bingo as new signing locations | PSA: We submitted a formal complaint to APOC (Alaska Political Office Commission) concerning the actions of the Pro-RCV group in Alaska. While they have accused us of breaching various State Campaign Finance Laws, we assert that this group should also adhere to the same rules and regulations. Contrary to their portrayal, this organization is not grassroots and receives substantial funding from outside of Alaska. Our objective is to hold them responsible for their apparent hypocrisy and their attempts to intimidate and tarnish the image of Alaskans, their organizations, and families. Their efforts to suppress our movement against ranked choice voting should not go unnoticed, and they must answer for potentially breaking the same laws they accuse us of. It's concerning that these well-informed political activists, who have benefited from massive out-of-state donations for their ranked choice voting agenda and campaign finance law changes, manipulate the system to their advantage, expecting regular citizens to falter and then overwhelm them with financial and legal burdens. We trust that the State of Alaska will ensure that these laws are applied uniformly, calling this Pro-RCV group to account for any disregard of Alaskan laws and norms. Please see the full 111 page complaint when it is made public by the news and APOC. All of this information is public information. Message To Alaskans THANK YOU, OVER 400+ Petition Books Returned 400 Petition Books Returned So Far... 600+ Still in Circulation Mail your petition book after getting it notarized to:Phil Izon - 4201 Dimond Way Wasilla, AK 99654 - Call if you need helptel:+19078028116 Please continue to send your petition books in notarized. We will be in touch shortly to send out new books. We appreciate all of your time and effort. Today we had 74 petition books returned in a single day, very exciting and I hope all Alaskans appreciate the effort and time by all involved (Over 1,000 Alaskan Volunteers Across The State) to make this a reality. We plan to submit 200-300% of the required signatures. | You Must Sign The Petition In Person, Online Signatures Do Not Count. | | Signing Locations Anchorage Sign During Business Hours | Kenai / Soldotna Sign at G F Sherman Signs | Sign In Juneau, Call Beforehand Sign In Wasilla, Address and Times Below | Sign In Homer, address and time below | Wasilla Sign During Business Hours | Kodiak Please Contact To Sign the Petition!!! name: Cortney Bouse
subject: Here’s the situation, folks
body:
Election Day is ONE MONTH away.

| | Here’s what’s happening, folks: **FIRST:** 50 years of reproductive freedom came to a screeching halt when the Supreme Court overturned _Roe v. Wade_ last year. Since then, voters nationwide have made it clear that abortion access can and will decide elections, but Republicans just won’t take the hint. **THEN:** A seat on Pennsylvania’s Supreme Court opened up, and we’re _**one month away from Election Day**_. Republicans see this as their chance to roll back our hard-won reproductive rights. _We can’t let that happen._ **NOW:** We’re calling on our strongest supporters to pledge to vote in this critical election to keep the GOP from chipping away at abortion access in Pennsylvania. **[Can we count on you to pledge to vote?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/71167983/431353915/124007930?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYzM0MzRjYy0zZjY1LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dlSPukCxRKvL4Wn_sGzUECWAr9Avr4Jis6MHZ61bBxM=&emci=e107900a-f761-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=3c3434cc-3f65-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=6787172)** | [Pledge to vote](https://click.everyaction.com/k/71167984/431353916/-1798306371?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYzM0MzRjYy0zZjY1LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dlSPukCxRKvL4Wn_sGzUECWAr9Avr4Jis6MHZ61bBxM=&emci=e107900a-f761-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=3c3434cc-3f65-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=6787172 "CTA Button")
---
So much is riding on the outcome of this race, folks. Our state’s Supreme Court could become our last line of defense against attacks on our rights and democracy. Everything, from abortion access to election rules, could come down to who we let sit on the Court.
That’s why we’re calling on young people to make their voices heard in this election. The youth vote has the power to protect abortion access in Pennsylvania. [**Will you pledge to vote?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/71167985/431353917/930576984?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYzM0MzRjYy0zZjY1LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dlSPukCxRKvL4Wn_sGzUECWAr9Avr4Jis6MHZ61bBxM=&emci=e107900a-f761-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=3c3434cc-3f65-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=6787172)
Need to update your voter registration? We’ve got you covered! [Update your voter registration today!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/71167986/431353918/1905159730?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYzM0MzRjYy0zZjY1LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dlSPukCxRKvL4Wn_sGzUECWAr9Avr4Jis6MHZ61bBxM=&emci=e107900a-f761-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=3c3434cc-3f65-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=6787172)
Thanks for everything.
See you at the voting booth,
Cortney Bouse
Pennsylvania State Director
NextGen America

clean_body: Our "Black Women Breaking Barriers" collection is LIVE >> | | | Peter, We witnessed history made on Tuesday as former EMILYs List President Laphonza Butler was sworn in as a United States senator. Sen. Butler is the only Black woman currently serving in the Senate and the third Black woman to ever serve in the chamber. To celebrate this historic and groundbreaking moment, we created the "Black Women Breaking Barriers" collection as a tribute to her incredible achievement. Show your pride for Democratic pro-choice ground-breakers and history-makers everywhere by heading to the EMILYs List store today: | ** Get 15% off your order by using code LAPHONZA* Thank you, the EMILYs List team \----------Original Message--------- From: EMILYs List Sent: Thurs. subject: Early Voting ends TODAY - Here's how to help us WIN
body:
Early voting ends TODAY at 6pm. Here’s how you can help us get souls to the polls. | | |
---
| | Peter, Early voting ends TONIGHT at 6pm. Here’s how you can help us get souls to the polls. Watch this video where **Sandra Wilson** explains why she knew early on her son would be Governor one day, **then share it with friends**.

clean_body: Early voting ends TODAY at 6pm. Here’s how you can help us get souls to the polls. | | | | | Peter, Early voting ends TONIGHT at 6pm. Here’s how you can help us get souls to the polls. Watch this video where Sandra Wilson explains why she knew early on her son would be Governor one day, then share it with friends. We know you’re committed to helping us make Louisiana safer, smarter, healthier, and wealthier. But do your friends and family know? Are they keeping up with our campaign? Dr. Wilson is the one candidate in the race with experience, vision, and to deliver the necessary resources to move Louisiana forward, for all of us. | HELP SPREAD THE MESSAGE | | TEXT THIS GRAPHIC AND SHARE ON SOCIAL | | FIND YOUR POLLING LOCATION | Early Voting ends today at 6pm. Remember, Election Day on October 14th coincides with homecoming and football games, so cast your vote early and help shape our community's future. Find your polling location here or online at | Together, we can champion policy that uplifts and empowers people from all walks of life, all across Louisiana.With hope for Louisiana,Team Wilson = | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- Wilson for Louisiana P.O. Box 4572 Baton Rouge, LA 70821 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Josh Hawley
subject: DEVASTATING
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee
body:
| | | Peter, This is Josh Hawley, and I have an URGENT call to action for my top patriots.

**Democrats and RINOS want to spend BILLIONS more on the foreign war in Ukraine while American families are struggling here at home.**

**Career politicians are leaving our country behind and putting future generations in TRILLIONS of debt - all for a foreign war thousands of miles away!**

I’m _**sounding the alarm**_ on out-of-control foreign spending: enough is enough. It’s simple: you don’t spend money you don’t have, and right now, we’re in more debt than e _ver_ in American history.

**[If we’re going to stop this spending spree, we need a strong team of grassroots patriots on the ground, and I’m calling YOU to action. Will you pitch in NOW to join our team?](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=50312a6aeda44822a7cb6dbe6b111e2c&_e=LrCcQljYBt9CRwnzAcUveHSvBh44TJB-TAVHlpRjAjcZulQOz-x1FEwtVa1MLB6NNU_CzDmEExgrRpSwqrdGjM4XJD5VB5MxLYGVQPlfjcsKF2Rv6iHKIFFFaJJtDS7aOvsEd-l7ly7qA3aY_ItZBwHVapf8szMfdxq_gmbzGiX5dAs3LsXQxx9cAY6mzzD44I_JvKf3jGXYYRP1TkBDerruWn1vRJyqLJy5H9wfX3cp9sZAcPbEhnzB0t360PKIfNhs6wL3ktWu-31k0WRLsZTzvGBvL0X2iW8YD5RM2SxfiU2vuQC22jw0TcPVhSabnkfsv2s2RzgdwnwAhmojMcw1ILa5aLvZ9aBiz0QIOMJw_JI_wI4mxtmN_p7LANlS7RSlTy-Sy6Cwp9lQLW8G4A%3D%3D)**

clean_body: | | | Peter, This is Josh Hawley, and I have an URGENT call to action for my top patriots. Democrats and RINOS want to spend BILLIONS more on the foreign war in Ukraine while American families are struggling here at home. Career politicians are leaving our country behind and putting future generations in TRILLIONS of debt - all for a foreign war thousands of miles away! I’m sounding the alarm on out-of-control foreign spending: enough is enough. It’s simple: you don’t spend money you don’t have, and right now, we’re in more debt than e ver in American history. Bidenomics has hit our country hard enough - the last thing we need is more, unlimited foreign spending. America’s debt is the elephant in the room that DC insiders want to ignore. But our families can’t ignore the DEVASTATING affect it’s having on our economy. I’ll always fight to build America stronger for the next generation. But we can’t continue to thrive as a nation if we’re being crushed by our debt. I can’t win the fight for financial sanity alone. I’m counting on you step up in this critical moment to put pressure on the establishment to STOP spending your hard-earned money on wars thousands of miles away. Thank you, Josh Hawley | | Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee | |
