Peter, I’m the proud son of a Navy Quartermaster who served our country in World War II. My father returned from combat to a nation eager and ready to help our veterans. He attended college on the GI Bill.
Unfortunately, these deserved benefits are no longer available. Congress has fallen short in funding veteran programs, while people like Donald Trump disparage them.
In Congress, I’ve fought tooth and nail to support our veterans. My FASTER Presumptions Act was a key part of the PACT Act, which provided care for veterans exposed to burn pits and other toxic substances while serving.
As Senator, I will continue to be a champion for those who stand on the frontlines in defense of our country.
**[Will you join me by taking a moment to sign our petition in support of our veterans?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71170250/431361975/267349744?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YTU0ODc2My00YzY1LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0vlx6SG_s2zmGz-mhHIm30drdrYEdA8ZpJVdS83Mbws=&emci=bec66050-9464-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=9a548763-4c65-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=25681160)**

clean_body: | “Suckers” and “losers.” That’s what Trump had to say about our service members, veterans, and fallen troops – confirmed by his former Chief of Staff and General, John Kelly. Every American has a right to be outraged by the blatant disrespect Trump has shown for our military. These insults are personal to me, and I’ll tell you why. | Peter, I’m the proud son of a Navy Quartermaster who served our country in World War II. My father returned from combat to a nation eager and ready to help our veterans. He attended college on the GI Bill. Unfortunately, these deserved benefits are no longer available. Congress has fallen short in funding veteran programs, while people like Donald Trump disparage them. In Congress, I’ve fought tooth and nail to support our veterans. My FASTER Presumptions Act was a key part of the PACT Act, which provided care for veterans exposed to burn pits and other toxic substances while serving. As Senator, I will continue to be a champion for those who stand on the frontlines in defense of our country. Thank you, – David Mitch McConnell's super PAC is preparing to spend hundreds of millions to flip the Senate in 2024, and we need to be ready to fight back with everything we've got. David Trone knows that the path to holding our Democratic Senate majority runs right through Maryland – that's why he needs our support. | David Trone for Maryland P.O. Box 83998 Gaithersburg, MD 20883-3998 United States | mailto:info@davidtrone.com Paid for by David Trone for Maryland.

subject: US Senator Ron Johnson at MIGOP Fall Fest
body:
Join US Senator Ron Johnson, Rep. Neil Friske, and Chairwoman Kristina Karamo in the fight for medical freedom, at Friske Farm Market! | | |
---
| |
---
| |
# Party of the Constitution
---
| [PURCHASE MIGOP FALL FEST TICKETS HERE](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=3160b3c14a&e=a2af77507c)
---
Tickets are on sale now for the biggest Freedom Event of the Fall - We must stand for Medical Freedom! - a cause close to the heart of the Michigan Republican Party. Let's make our stand against aspiring tyrants like Gov. Whitmer and President Biden resoundingly clear: WE WILL NOT COMPLY!
We must take action as we hear from US Senator Ron Johnson from Wisconsin to FRISKE FARMS IN ELLSWORTH on SATURDAY, OCT 21, 2023.
We’re sending a message to any potential tyrant who wants to control our health care choices, or prevent the public from hearing truth regarding medical treatment. Senator Johnson has consistently advocated for Medical Freedom and the right to know what’s in medical treatment. He has been a staunch opponent of vaccine mandates and supports the freedom to make our own decisions.
This event promises to be unforgettable! Bring the whole family!
Tickets start at $10! VIP tickets start at $50!
Activists and liberty groups can participate in the event as sponsors, starting at $300. Let’s organize, activate, and save our state!
October 21, 2023, for a day of empowerment a nd unity at Friske Farms. Come with your loved ones and experience awelcoming atmosphere for kids and the amazing event.
Medical Freedom is a God-given unalienable rights!

| [PURCHASE MIGOP FALL FEST TICKETS HERE](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=e06f41884f&e=a2af77507c)
---
### PRESERVE, PROTECT and DEFEND the Constitution of the United States,
### SO HELP ME GOD.
| | | | | | [](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=2fc4ed8e17&e=a2af77507c)| [](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=560b5fa345&e=a2af77507c)| [](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=3b77c935e7&e=a2af77507c)| [](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=f43c6b7813&e=a2af77507c)| [](mailto:communication@migop.org)

name: Contest Every Race
subject: Democracies don’t ban books
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rapid Resist Action
body:
Now, they’re getting classics like Beloved or The Handmaid’s Tale tossed out too.
| | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/71170779/431363901/855222454?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTVAvMS85MjA2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZjA1MzRiZS00ZjY1LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LBzRjCo0V7k-aE1HtMTIFoTMsSQHmMs5HGoSV4eoqRQ=&emci=e4057eff-8064-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=1f0534be-4f65-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=5534179)
---

| | It's Banned Books Week, an event that serves as an annual reminder that **books are not dangerous.** Book banning and censorship have reached epidemic levels in states across the country – and it's the folks serving in local elected offices like library boards and school boards that are the last line of defense to protect our freedom of speech. Far-right Republican groups are breaking records by banning or challenging nearly 4,000 books, not only in school libraries but now in public libraries as well. Controlling what kids read was never enough. Now, they're getting classics like Beloved or The Handmaid's Tale tossed out too. If left unchecked, this is how fascism takes hold. It's why we take our mission at Contest Every Race so seriously. [**It takes real time and resources to recruit local leaders to run for their school and library boards to stop these dangerous book bans. Help us elect an army of free speech advocates by pitching in $3, or whatever you can today.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/71170780/431363902/-327605227?refcode=2023-10-07-banned-books-week&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=1f0534be-4f65-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTVAvMS85MjA2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZjA1MzRiZS00ZjY1LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LBzRjCo0V7k-aE1HtMTIFoTMsSQHmMs5HGoSV4eoqRQ=) Our library trustees and school board members aren't letting radical groups like "Moms for Liberty" call the shots on our First Amendment rights. But, we need to recruit and elect more good folks to local offices to protect our right to read. [**We're not scared of ideas – and together, we will keep our libraries ban-free. clean_body: Now, they’re getting classics like Beloved or The Handmaid’s Tale tossed out too. | | | | It's Banned Books Week, an event that serves as an annual reminder that books are not dangerous. Book banning and censorship have reached epidemic levels in states across the country – and it's the folks serving in local elected offices like library boards and school boards that are the last line of defense to protect our freedom of speech. Far-right Republican groups are breaking records by banning or challenging nearly 4,000 books, not only in school libraries but now in public libraries as well. Controlling what kids read was never enough. Now, they're getting classics like Beloved or The Handmaid's Tale tossed out too. If left unchecked, this is how fascism takes hold. It's why we take our mission at Contest Every Race so seriously. = Our library trustees and school board members aren't letting radical groups like "Moms for Liberty" call the shots on our First Amendment rights. But, we need to recruit and elect more good folks to local offices to protect our right to read. = Onward, Contest Every Race | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | | Paid for by Rapid Resist Action. Lauren Boebert beat Adam Frisch in 2022 by just 0.17% – a difference of only 546 votes and the closest race in the entire country.

The one thing no one can ever take from you.| | | [](https://link.donaldjtrump.com/u/click?_t=c26d591425684a3289b90149d613a03c&_m=5ffe5f58d5d14b6f8a43a651d31f5260&_e=uWOjUjqbKM1uDVQHYOWevnxkkjSLhzD6Qqc_iB4rGuxckOostf26IwFX62ko8FS1-pSD006HJA35UgnRwg4x_87KSIUXeda8s74ejq-EP7fIjN_zZNwpedzSMJfwruJguT4y3I9d_3wC5ZlayPyp0h87mXG88NgTBShZeGQuh0q3xdYpPuWH-lVQDHr_6vxhmREGTmYOvbvfS4vcZXke_SzJ-QYo0j8MWS4E-nblwfxrD3oZCrHqr4gXpwNkbcnmui5Wea-B3eWeN804sJhb4MO13G7kWDHKncW00Gg6gWYi2bx-aeP8Sa5IkqAo-LKAMmRvL5YMUNqiHal6X6HY6XLc0h8D1csc7T8zNknNspW-OILwke30bIFXg-j1D8FcruVHkhR58C6qGrC5V1HlKIwPkKcFgMGnS-9uovwTKovYV0g7b5dnA3_tDICrsL_JJ_KWX57hGl0ORN904E9HZk-WqY8UIYXx2cpSGKS9yKlRxEAR-nLE1rr4tVOOVH6u)

| | Patriot,

---
It’s not much of a secret that the Left doesn’t like me very much.
---
But I think the one thing that bothers the Left the most is that they cannot break me.
---
Even after illegal indictments, arrests, impeachments, a mugshot, lawsuits, a threat of 1,000 years in prison, attempting to frame me as a traitor, a sham trial, and more trials to come, _my spirits are honestly higher than ever before._
---
The Left _wants_ to crush our hope and break our spirit. They want to rob us of our joy.
---
_But we can never let them!_
---
The truth is: hope costs you _nothing._
---
Your faith is the one thing **_no one_** can _ever_ take from you.
---
That’s why you will never see me cower. I will never blink in the face of the Left’s tyranny. _I will always stand tall and remain resolute in our mission to save America._
---
We all know America is in a very dark place – and that’s putting it nicely. It would be very easy to say that our country is doomed and all hope is lost.
---
But I will NEVER give up on America!
---
America is the greatest country in history – and I believe it’s our hardworking, innovative, compassionate, and courageous PEOPLE that make it great.
---
And on November 5, 2024, I have faith that the great American patriots who are the backbone of our country will band together to SAVE AMERICA once and for all
---
So, my question to you is: **do**** _YOU_****have faith that America can be saved?**
---

clean_body: The one thing no one can ever take from you.| | | | | Patriot, It’s not much of a secret that the Left doesn’t like me very much. But I think the one thing that bothers the Left the most is that they cannot break me. Even after illegal indictments, arrests, impeachments, a mugshot, lawsuits, a threat of 1,000 years in prison, attempting to frame me as a traitor, a sham trial, and more trials to come, my spirits are honestly higher than ever before. The Left wants to crush our hope and break our spirit. They want to rob us of our joy. But we can never let them! The truth is: hope costs you nothing. Your faith is the one thing no one can ever take from you. That’s why you will never see me cower. I will never blink in the face of the Left’s tyranny. I will always stand tall and remain resolute in our mission to save America. We all know America is in a very dark place – and that’s putting it nicely. It would be very easy to say that our country is doomed and all hope is lost. But I will NEVER give up on America! America is the greatest country in history – and I believe it’s our hardworking, innovative, compassionate, and courageous PEOPLE that make it great. And on November 5, 2024, I have faith that the great American patriots who are the backbone of our country will band together to SAVE AMERICA once and for all So, my question to you is: do YOUhave faith that America can be saved? (Of course, if you are doing poorly right now due to the crook in the White House, then don’t even think about donating. But promise me this – you will NEVER give up hope on America!) | | | | Thank you, Donald J. Trump45th President of the United States | | Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. | Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J. name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature Is Needed: Stop brutal trophy hunters from murdering wolf pups and bear cubs
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2038247?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | **URGENT ACTION NEEDED: Demand stronger Endangered Species Act Protections for gray wolves and grizzly bears before ruthless trophy hunters wipe them out! [_Take urgent action now! >>_](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2038248?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)** The fate of two of North America’s most treasured species — gray wolves and grizzly bears — is in **DANGER.** Brutal trophy hunters are _**MASSACRING**_ these precious animals using some of the most horrific and inhumane killing methods, from choking snares and steel leg traps to blowing up nursing bear cubs and wolf pups asleep in their dens. **__And in several states, these VIOLENT MURDERS are 100% LEGAL.__ ** Now, corrupt and extremist lawmakers are getting even more aggressive with their **anti-bear and anti-wolf agenda.** They are teaming up with the hunting lobby and other Big Polluters to roll back life-saving Endangered Species Act (ESA) Protections for harmless gray wolves and grizzly bears even further. If that happens, these beloved animals could soon be _**COMPLETELY ANNIHILATED**_ by merciless trophy hunters out for blood. [_**Innocent gray wolves and grizzly bears desperately need you to be their voice today, Friend. Can these helpless animals count on you to step up and take action to protect them? Sign now >>**_ ](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2038249?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2038250?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
No living creature or animal deserves to suffer **_merciless and gruesome murders_** at the hands of cruel trophy hunters, especially two native species as iconic as gray wolves and grizzly bears.
The _**EXTINCTION**_ of these two _**keystone species**_ wouldn’t just be devastating for biodiversity efforts. But losing both gray wolves and grizzlies would have harmful effects on our ecosystems as both animals play their own vital roles in maintaining the balance of our public lands.
This year marks the 50th Anniversary of the Endangered Species Act, and sadly today, the policy is facing some of the worst assaults yet. **Friend, we cannot let dirty politicians and dark special interests succeed in weakening the ESA for the sake of profit and power.[_Your signature right now could determine the fate of the ESA and the vulnerable species it helps save — like innocent wolf pups and bear cubs. Add your name now to DEFEND the Endangered Species Act from extremist attacks! >>_](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2038251?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)**
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2038252?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Thanks for being a voice for vulnerable species,
Friends of the Earth **
|

| | Patriot,

---
This week, while the Radical Democrats forced me to stand trial as an innocent man to defend my livelihood, my family, and my properties from what many are calling the _“corporate death penalty,”_ our RINO opponents continued to dishonestly attack yours truly.
---
_Crooked Joe and his accomplices are using every dirty trick imaginable to_ __INTERFERE__ _in this election and keep me off the campaign trail, and what do the RINOs see?_
---
A pipe dream of an opportunity to benefit their own political ambitions.
---
**_Just think of it... We’re LEADING the Republican field by 62 points and are up on Crooked Joe by 10 points!_**
---
These RINOs will _NEVER_ stop us because the _PEOPLE_ are behind us.
---
**_But rather than spend their time, energy, and combined resources going after Crooked Joe when he forces me off the campaign trail, they instead decide to attack the_** _**_ONLY_**_** _movement that can and will DEFEAT Biden in 2024!_**
---
Patriot, this is exactly why I promised you that we’d WRAP UP the primary as quickly as humanly possible.
---
And just as I always have, I will make good on my promise.
---
TOMORROW marks just **100 days out** from the _FIRST_ contest of the primary in the great state of Iowa.
---
_So, let’s show these disloyal RINOs just how much LARGER our lead can still grow with an ambitious NEW goal of_** _100,000 grassroots donations of ANY amount_** _over this final stretch._

clean_body: While I was forced to stand trial as an innocent man, these “Republicans”...| | | | | Patriot, This week, while the Radical Democrats forced me to stand trial as an innocent man to defend my livelihood, my family, and my properties from what many are calling the “corporate death penalty,” our RINO opponents continued to dishonestly attack yours truly. Crooked Joe and his accomplices are using every dirty trick imaginable to INTERFERE in this election and keep me off the campaign trail, and what do the RINOs see? A pipe dream of an opportunity to benefit their own political ambitions. Just think of it... We’re LEADING the Republican field by 62 points and are up on Crooked Joe by 10 points! These RINOs will NEVER stop us because the PEOPLE are behind us. But rather than spend their time, energy, and combined resources going after Crooked Joe when he forces me off the campaign trail, they instead decide to attack the ONLY movement that can and will DEFEAT Biden in 2024! Patriot, this is exactly why I promised you that we’d WRAP UP the primary as quickly as humanly possible. And just as I always have, I will make good on my promise. TOMORROW marks just 100 days out from the FIRST contest of the primary in the great state of Iowa. So, let’s show these disloyal RINOs just how much LARGER our lead can still grow with an ambitious NEW goal of 100,000 grassroots donations of ANY amount over this final stretch. | | Thank you, Donald J. name: Replace Sinema
subject: Kari Lake flags down Ruben Gallego at the airport
body:
The 2024 AZ senate race has already become contentious. | | | Peter – If you didn’t see, Kari Lake confronted Ruben Gallego at the Sky Harbor airport on Friday. Lake tried to create a gotcha moment, with her staffer already set up to record the interaction. And she admitted publicly for the first time that she’s running — saying “It’s going to be a knockdown, dragout.” [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zsng2fmBnxIF8wp8I8JDILFuUoRbEasGOL6F8vVeAu_TJFh1lJCBttQBDY1sbSdit4uq3YS82BjD8RuQWVSEQ52XFWiSa_0GWW_Djo6ViE9UQfsfsCOgjX_He4W6gIQwN9_P4f0h1JzXvU0GXDTuVYqnoSGyCKf1IUc7RED8i-0fTGhkUnUiOf9LYZCpnAbA55goR0pR6i1TndsvkmkNQ5F5vsMp1UuWr8P4Uojq29Z078AgpFJ3cByKmdymWVFVKbjlJMvLYLNHtTKW-lbWFczGY2Oo69f80ZeKKdxH_1cYke8_nJ9yAUvmuWVB6X0rt7TEmpO9iBtuW_ibN2hZyZ/408/neS5b5KaQbe0im__kPsTng/h0/xJhpmFiUXOUa6fFliNTpI4fbZDG_0279gyMqbZI0oIs) In response, Ruben was cool, calm and collected — exactly what we’ve come to expect from a former Marine who has served our country and Arizona so proudly. Meanwhile, Kyrsten Sinema released her FEC numbers on Friday night, confirming a war chest of $10.8 million. Of course, most of that came from private equity, Wall Street fat cats, and special interests including Big Pharma and Big Oil.
Sinema hasn’t announced her candidacy yet, but her leaked “Path to Victory” memo makes clear that she’s in the race.
Here’s the thing: **Republicans WANT Sinema to run.** They like their odds better in a three-way race than if Lake had to face Gallego one-on-one. **They’re betting on Sinema taking too many votes from Gallego, letting Kari Lake sneak by–and it could work for them.**
That’s why we’re going to keep doing everything we can, right now, to keep educating voters about Sinema’s *real* record of corruption and obstruction, while also explaining **the danger that Kari Lake poses**.
**This is going to be a very tight, VERY expensive race. Election experts have called it a tossup from the jump–it’s going to take a lot of time and resources to defeat Kari Lake AND keep Sinema from spoiling the race.****[Please help us do everything we can to help Ruben Gallego win this seat, chip in now>>](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zsng2fmBnxIF8wp8I8JDILTU2RX0XiLFRuTAFsA3JegbV1OTPHDM64AkJeKNC1ulq3h-AdE2xpfpISMdQjAiXQSeyTCxRcgPJ7FMSMQm6kW5PZlJJQ1BSSwJNdXhHYjzPhjk-k0gG87iu3ZZYoDheV_Vs9DGgLdYXBjz0eXRXyQ67iAbIUFGSBO_egY5Twatz0bxh3azo0-GmcnU0D-vggGhQyf6TvuhJijd5bhj8YrCZ2spfQdptrIS5I13TSmIyyW09_x-H30V2LZKNt5NfVhv5TAIZUKrEc-NbhDvWv1-eBwxOcn9xA3p2FBElEWWKWoimoKWAkEjczsdC5tU41/408/neS5b5KaQbe0im__kPsTng/h8/h82IbMXyMiWM61XPVwMqa-0ZVoTZENa5iQaxPpXb2c4) **
Thanks for all your help,
-Replace Sinema Project & Change for Arizona 2024

**IF** we expose the sham impeachment inquiry for what it is – _a partisan witch hunt with no basis in reality_ – then we can stop it in its tracks!

name: Team Joe
subject: [TRAINING INVITE] Organizing with Content on Reach
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
Join us for a training on organizing the people in our lives and how to share key campaign messaging & content! | | |
---
Hi Peter -- For nearly the past two years, social ambassadors have been sharing content and organizing online, engaging their communities in meaningful conversations and getting out the word on Democratic wins, holding Republicans accountable, and amplifying the wins of the Biden-Harris administration. In 2022, volunteers shared content that gained more than 25 million impressions and helped sway some key seats in our favor during the midterm elections -- helping keep the gap close between Democrats and Republicans in the House, gain a 51-49 advantage in the Senate by flipping Pennsylvania, and pick up Democratic governors’ seats in Arizona, Maryland, and Massachusetts. Wins like these are proof that when you talk online and share your perspectives, the people connected to you are listening because you are a trusted source to those in your life. [**Now, we’re just weeks away from key 2023 elections, including in Virginia, Mississippi, Kentucky, and Louisiana. And we are so excited to announce the launch of some new content sharing features in our organizing tool, Reach. clean_body: Join us for a training on organizing the people in our lives and how to share key campaign messaging & content! | | | Hi Peter -- For nearly the past two years, social ambassadors have been sharing content and organizing online, engaging their communities in meaningful conversations and getting out the word on Democratic wins, holding Republicans accountable, and amplifying the wins of the Biden-Harris administration. In 2022, volunteers shared content that gained more than 25 million impressions and helped sway some key seats in our favor during the midterm elections -- helping keep the gap close between Democrats and Republicans in the House, gain a 51-49 advantage in the Senate by flipping Pennsylvania, and pick up Democratic governors’ seats in Arizona, Maryland, and Massachusetts. Wins like these are proof that when you talk online and share your perspectives, the people connected to you are listening because you are a trusted source to those in your life. | | | See you there and thank you for all you do! \-- Team Joe

body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

INSIDER NEWS FROM THE FRONTLINES OF THE POLITICAL REVOLUTION

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

HEADLINES: Barbara Lee Speaks Truth to Power | 2023 Election Guide: Build
Local Power | Progressives on the Ballot! | Sub-Minimum Wage in Chicago |
UAW Solidarity Actions | & MORE!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9838?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20231007_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1011&akid=4759%2E5885482%2E6KOXFj ][IMG]

As the country’s largest grassroots progressive action organization, we
count on the recurring small-dollar donations of our members and
supporters to power the work behind our inside-outside strategy for
change.

The more of us that are organized together with our talents and resources,
the more powerful we become to make democracy work for all of us.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9838?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20231007_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1012&akid=4759%2E5885482%2E6KOXFj ]Please chip into our Progressive Power Fund to make sure progressives
win 2023 elections and hit the ground running in 2024!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9845?t=1013&akid=4759%2E5885482%2E6KOXFj ][IMG]

“The reason Gavin Newsom didn’t appoint Barbara Lee is the reason she
should be a senator,” wrote John Nichols in [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9982?t=1014&akid=4759%2E5885482%2E6KOXFj ]The Nation.

Barbara Lee has a “tradition of speaking truth to power” — and she’s the
most progressive, most experienced candidate in the race. Newsom promised
to choose a black woman to fill the vacancy, but he passed over Barbara
Lee for a corporate Democratic insider who has lobbied for Airbnb and
Uber.

The political establishment is clearly threatened by Barbara Lee and don’t
want to see her team up with Bernie Sanders in the Senate. That’s why
grassroots and progressive leaders like Ro Khanna, Cori Bush, Pramila
Jayapal, and others are rallying behind Barbara.

Barbara Lee has been in the trenches from Day 1 for workers, climate,
peace, Medicare for All, and more — and she can win this election on the
merits.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9845?t=1015&akid=4759%2E5885482%2E6KOXFj ]Use this handy tool to share on social media and encourage other
progressives to Pledge Support for Barbara Lee for Senate!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/barbaralee_orgteam_2309?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231007_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1016&akid=4759%2E5885482%2E6KOXFj ][IMG]

Our Revolution is “swinging its network of grassroots activists and a list
of more than 1.1 million California supporters behind the campaign that
the Congresswoman identifies as ‘a march for justice for all,’” Nichols
wrote in [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9983?t=1017&akid=4759%2E5885482%2E6KOXFj ]The Nation.

You can help elect Barbara Lee to the Senate from anywhere in the country
— making calls, sharing out on social media, and more. If you're in
California, you can help by knocking on doors or reaching out to friends -
even hosting or attending a house party!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/barbaralee_orgteam_2309?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231007_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1018&akid=4759%2E5885482%2E6KOXFj ]We invite you to join Our Revolution’s Progressives for Barbara Lee's
organizing team. Let's make this a people-powered campaign and send
Barbara Lee to the Senate.

And, be sure to sign up now for our upcoming LIVE virtual events with
Barbara Lee! She will join Our Revolution and Ro Khanna for our [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/OR_townhall_leekhanna_2310/?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231007_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1019&akid=4759%2E5885482%2E6KOXFj ]Beyond
Fossil Fuels Town Hall on Oct. 17th. Then Rep. Lee will join Ro Khanna and
Pramila Jayapal for a [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/OR_Healthcare_TH_2310/?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231007_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1020&akid=4759%2E5885482%2E6KOXFj ]Healthcare for All Town Hall on Oct. 24th.

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9759?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20231007_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1021&akid=4759%2E5885482%2E6KOXFj ][IMG]

★ ★ ★

2023 ELECTION GUIDE

The 2023 General Election is exactly one month out, and Our Revolution has
endorsed inspiring progressive champions in cities and states nationwide!

Meet our candidates below, and be sure to get out to vote on November 7th!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8480?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20231007_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1022&akid=4759%2E5885482%2E6KOXFj ][IMG]

Our Revolution-backed Sara Innamorato beat big money to win the primary in
May, and now she’s on the ballot on 11/7 to become the next Allegheny
County Executive.

If she wins, she will be part of a progressive trifecta in Pittsburgh that
includes Mayor Ed Gainey and U.S. Rep Summer Lee!

We supported Sara in her successful run for PA House back in 2018
alongside then-candidate Summer Lee, and we will be proud to see her take
the helm of the second-largest county in Pennsylvania!

As County Exec, Sara will have the power to directly affect people’s lives
— from county-wide housing to addressing human rights violations in the
county jail to protecting abortion care.

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8480?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20231007_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1023&akid=4759%2E5885482%2E6KOXFj ][IMG]

Our Revolution Twin Cities has a powerhouse slate of progressives in
Minnesota — and we are working to get out the vote to make sure each of
these champions wins re-election!

These candidates include Minneapolis City Council members Jeremiah Ellison
(Ward 5), Elliot Payne (Ward 1), and Robin Wonsley (Ward 2). And, in St.
Paul, we are backing City Council members Mitra Jalali (Ward 4) and Nelsie
Yang (Ward 6).

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8480?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20231007_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1024&akid=4759%2E5885482%2E6KOXFj ][IMG]

Also in Minnesota, Our Revolution members weighed in and we are endorsing
an exciting slate of progressive champions to win a majority on the city
council in Duluth!

We’re organizing to elect these three amazing women: Miranda Pacheco and
Jenna Yeakle for City Council At-Large and Wendy Durrwachter for City
Council District 1.

These candidates have a real shot at winning and building a strong
progressive bloc of local power, and we can’t let an opportunity like this
pass us by!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8480?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20231007_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1025&akid=4759%2E5885482%2E6KOXFj ][IMG]

As corporations broaden their dark money fundraising networks into city
council and school board races, we need working-class champions ready to
confront them head-on, everywhere. That’s why we’re endorsing this slate
of progressive candidates in Washington!

Our slate includes Leah Perkel for Vancouver City Council, Charles Adkins
for Everett School Board (Position 5), Tammy Morales for Seattle City
Council (District 2), Teresa Mosqueda for King County Council (District
8), Jorge Baron King for King County Council (District 4).

Leah is an Our Revolution member and a former Bernie delegate. She has
firsthand experience with medical debt resulting from our lousy private
health insurance system, and she wants to be an agent of change to help
create healthier people and communities.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9838?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20231007_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1026&akid=4759%2E5885482%2E6KOXFj ]We have just ONE MONTH until all of these elections. Pitch in today to
help elect progressives to make a difference in these critical state and
local offices!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8480?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20231007_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1027&akid=4759%2E5885482%2E6KOXFj ][IMG]

Our Revolution stands with Izola Shaw in her run for Rockville City
Council At-Large and Martin Mitchell who is vying for Mayor of the City of
Laurel.

Izola Shaw was chair of the Montgomery County Racial Equity and Social
Justice Advisory Committee, helped found the County’s Racial Equity
Network (MORE), and helped pass the Racial Equity and Social Justice Act.

She has worked with the County Executive on public works, policing, rent
stabilization, and environmental protection through the Rockville City
Academy.

Laurel City Councilmember Martin Mitchell was a 2020 Bernie delegate and a
founding member of Maryland for Bernie Sanders. He has been a leader in
the fight for rent stabilization, marijuana decriminalization, and
collective bargaining for municipal employees.

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8480?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20231007_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1028&akid=4759%2E5885482%2E6KOXFj ][IMG]

Jorge DeFendini (Ward 4) and Phoebe Brown (Ward 2) are both seeking
re-election to the Ithaca Common Council, and Kayla Matos is a challenger
who would grow our progressive bloc on the council.

These are the races that determine the direction of cities and help us
build progressive power at the local level, where we can directly improve
people’s lives.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8480?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20231007_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1029&akid=4759%2E5885482%2E6KOXFj ][IMG]

City Council since 2019.

Now, Our Revolution is proud to endorse Juan to lead the city in a
progressive direction as Mayor. We know he will champion education,

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9759?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20231007_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1032&akid=4759%2E5885482%2E6KOXFj ][IMG]

VICTORY! Our Revolution helped elect Chicago Mayor Brandon Johnson earlier
this year, and this week he officially delivered on his campaign promise
to eliminate the “subminimum wage” for tipped workers!

Together with One Fair Wage, we fought for this new law which calls for
tipped workers — currently paid 60% of Chicago’s minimum wage — to receive
8% annual increases beginning next July until they reach 100% parity in
2028, the [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9984?t=1036&akid=4759%2E5885482%2E6KOXFj ]Chicago Sun-Times reported.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8480?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20231007_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1037&akid=4759%2E5885482%2E6KOXFj ][IMG]

In July, Mayor Brandon Johnson joined us to serve up food to restaurant
workers and raise awareness in this fight. Our own members submitted
testimony directly, and we just won!

Stay tuned! In Ohio and Arizona, Our Revolution has teams canvassing for
signatures for petition drives that will put a $20+ MINIMUM WAGE directly
on the ballot in 2024.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9721?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20231007_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1038&akid=4759%2E5885482%2E6KOXFj ]Our movement is critical to advancing policies to address the many
crises facing our country. If you’re not already a monthly member of Our
Revolution, sign up today!

★ ★ ★

STUDENT DEBT

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8480?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20231007_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1039&akid=4759%2E5885482%2E6KOXFj ][IMG]

Student debt payments are resuming “after the Supreme Court’s conservative
majority turned its back on Americans in need,” US Rep. Ro Khanna wrote in
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9985?t=1040&akid=4759%2E5885482%2E6KOXFj ]The Messenger.

Ro’s op-ed features the lived experience of Our Revolution member and
student debt activist Vanessa Torres, who grew up with a single mother and
knew that higher education was her only ticket out of poverty.

Vanessa still owes $186,000, and like so many of us, doesn’t know how she
will make ends meet now with payments resuming during an affordability
crisis.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9986?t=1041&akid=4759%2E5885482%2E6KOXFj ]Watch this clip of Ro and Vanessa discussing the topic of student debt
HERE.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9986?t=1042&akid=4759%2E5885482%2E6KOXFj ][IMG]

This week, the Biden Administration canceled $9 billion worth of student
debt for borrowers who have worked in public service for a decade, those
who have made income-based payments for 20 years, and borrowers with
permanent disabilities.

We’re not giving up. Our Revolution and our student debt activists will
keep organizing and pushing the President to go all the way and fulfill
his promise to eliminate $50k for every student borrower in the country
through executive order using the Higher Education Act.

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/OR_Big3_canvass/?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231007_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1043&akid=4759%2E5885482%2E6KOXFj ][IMG]

ACTION: Our Revolution is calling on our activists to Stand with Striking
UAW Autoworkers at the Big Three!

We’re asking you to organize a dealership canvass and leaflet members in
your community about the UAW’s Stand-Up Strike and how Ford, General
Motors, and Stellantis are refusing to settle fair contracts with 150,000
workers after making $250 Billion in profits.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/OR_Big3_canvass/?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231007_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1044&akid=4759%2E5885482%2E6KOXFj ]Join or organize an event here and be sure to read instructions for
canvassing and leafleting dealerships.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8480?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20231007_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1045&akid=4759%2E5885482%2E6KOXFj ][IMG]

Our Revolution members have been joining UAW workers on the picket lines
around the country — in Maryland, West Virginia, Virginia, and beyond!

Last week, President Biden joined the picket line with UAW, seeming to
take the advice from Our Revolution Executive Director Joseph Geevarghese
in the [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9768?t=1046&akid=4759%2E5885482%2E6KOXFj ]The Hill: “This strike is an opportunity for the President to
say to the Big Three, ‘You’re incredibly profitable, but the return on
investment we need to see is for working-class Americans.’”

Joseph also represented Our Revolution by speaking at the [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9769?t=1047&akid=4759%2E5885482%2E6KOXFj ]LIVE
Solidarity Summer Rally with UAW with UAW President Sean Fain and a
powerful coalition of progressive organizations supporting the striking
workers.

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8480?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20231007_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1048&akid=4759%2E5885482%2E6KOXFj ][IMG]

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8480?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20231007_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1049&akid=4759%2E5885482%2E6KOXFj ][IMG]

VICTORY! Our progressive coalition beat back a power grab by establishment
Democrats that would have disenfranchised thousands of grassroots party
members.

Virginia Democrats rejected a change to state party rules that would have
altered how the commonwealth’s DNC delegates are elected, [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9987?t=1050&akid=4759%2E5885482%2E6KOXFj ]TYT reports.

This is a major win for progressives! Our Revolution Northern Virginia’s
Sandra Klassen (who is also a State Central Committee Member of the VA Dem
Party) was thrilled that “all of our work and our allies paid off!”.

ARE YOU RUNNING TO BE A DELEGATE TO THE DNC NEXT YEAR? If so, we want to
hear from you. Please reach out to political@ourrevolution.com.

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8480?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20231007_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1051&akid=4759%2E5885482%2E6KOXFj ][IMG]

From boots on the ground to the halls of Congress — it’s going to take an
organized movement fighting on every terrain to take power back for the
people.

If you’re already a member of Our Revolution, thank you! Please consider
chipping in an extra donation to fund our work leading up to the big
elections in November and beyond. If you’re not yet an official member,
please consider signing up today!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8480?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20231007_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1052&akid=4759%2E5885482%2E6KOXFj ]PLEASE SUPPORT OUR REVOLUTION

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/OR_townhall_leekhanna_2310/?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231007_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1053&akid=4759%2E5885482%2E6KOXFj ][IMG]

Barbara Lee will be joined by Ro Khanna at Our Revolution’s LIVE Beyond
Fossil Fuels Town Hall on Oct. 17th. Reps. Lee and Khanna have worked

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/OR_townhall_leekhanna_2310/?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231007_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1054&akid=4759%2E5885482%2E6KOXFj ]RSVP

Medicare for All, ending medical debt, lowering drug prices — Barbara Lee
and our progressive movement are fighting on many fronts for healthcare

Join Our Revolution’s LIVE Healthcare for All Town Hall with US Reps.
Barbara Lee, Pramila Jayapal, and Ro Khanna, and CA Assemblyman Ash Kalra.

The more of us that are organized together with our talents and resources, the more powerful we become to make democracy work for all of us. [ ]Please chip into our Progressive Power Fund to make sure progressives win 2023 elections and hit the ground running in 2024! ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] “The reason Gavin Newsom didn’t appoint Barbara Lee is the reason she should be a senator,” wrote John Nichols in [ ]The Nation. Barbara Lee has a “tradition of speaking truth to power” — and she’s the most progressive, most experienced candidate in the race. Newsom promised to choose a black woman to fill the vacancy, but he passed over Barbara Lee for a corporate Democratic insider who has lobbied for Airbnb and Uber. The political establishment is clearly threatened by Barbara Lee and don’t want to see her team up with Bernie Sanders in the Senate. That’s why grassroots and progressive leaders like Ro Khanna, Cori Bush, Pramila Jayapal, and others are rallying behind Barbara. Barbara Lee has been in the trenches from Day 1 for workers, climate, peace, Medicare for All, and more — and she can win this election on the merits. [ ]Use this handy tool to share on social media and encourage other progressives to Pledge Support for Barbara Lee for Senate! ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Our Revolution is “swinging its network of grassroots activists and a list of more than 1.1 million California supporters behind the campaign that the Congresswoman identifies as ‘a march for justice for all,’” Nichols wrote in [ ]The Nation. You can help elect Barbara Lee to the Senate from anywhere in the country — making calls, sharing out on social media, and more. If you're in California, you can help by knocking on doors or reaching out to friends - even hosting or attending a house party! [ ]We invite you to join Our Revolution’s Progressives for Barbara Lee's organizing team. Let's make this a people-powered campaign and send Barbara Lee to the Senate. And, be sure to sign up now for our upcoming LIVE virtual events with Barbara Lee! She will join Our Revolution and Ro Khanna for our [ ]Beyond Fossil Fuels Town Hall on Oct. 17th. Then Rep. Lee will join Ro Khanna and Pramila Jayapal for a [ ]Healthcare for All Town Hall on Oct. 24th. ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] ★ ★ ★ 2023 ELECTION GUIDE The 2023 General Election is exactly one month out, and Our Revolution has endorsed inspiring progressive champions in cities and states nationwide! Meet our candidates below, and be sure to get out to vote on November 7th! ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Our Revolution-backed Sara Innamorato beat big money to win the primary in May, and now she’s on the ballot on 11/7 to become the next Allegheny County Executive. If she wins, she will be part of a progressive trifecta in Pittsburgh that includes Mayor Ed Gainey and U.S. Rep Summer Lee! We supported Sara in her successful run for PA House back in 2018 alongside then-candidate Summer Lee, and we will be proud to see her take the helm of the second-largest county in Pennsylvania! As County Exec, Sara will have the power to directly affect people’s lives — from county-wide housing to addressing human rights violations in the county jail to protecting abortion care. ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Our Revolution Twin Cities has a powerhouse slate of progressives in Minnesota — and we are working to get out the vote to make sure each of these champions wins re-election! These candidates include Minneapolis City Council members Jeremiah Ellison (Ward 5), Elliot Payne (Ward 1), and Robin Wonsley (Ward 2). And, in St. Paul, we are backing City Council members Mitra Jalali (Ward 4) and Nelsie Yang (Ward 6). ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Also in Minnesota, Our Revolution members weighed in and we are endorsing an exciting slate of progressive champions to win a majority on the city council in Duluth! We’re organizing to elect these three amazing women: Miranda Pacheco and Jenna Yeakle for City Council At-Large and Wendy Durrwachter for City Council District 1. These candidates have a real shot at winning and building a strong progressive bloc of local power, and we can’t let an opportunity like this pass us by! ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] As corporations broaden their dark money fundraising networks into city council and school board races, we need working-class champions ready to confront them head-on, everywhere. Our slate includes Leah Perkel for Vancouver City Council, Charles Adkins for Everett School Board (Position 5), Tammy Morales for Seattle City Council (District 2), Teresa Mosqueda for King County Council (District 8), Jorge Baron King for King County Council (District 4). Leah is an Our Revolution member and a former Bernie delegate. She has firsthand experience with medical debt resulting from our lousy private health insurance system, and she wants to be an agent of change to help create healthier people and communities. [ ]We have just ONE MONTH until all of these elections. Pitch in today to help elect progressives to make a difference in these critical state and local offices! ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Our Revolution stands with Izola Shaw in her run for Rockville City Council At-Large and Martin Mitchell who is vying for Mayor of the City of Laurel. Izola Shaw was chair of the Montgomery County Racial Equity and Social Justice Advisory Committee, helped found the County’s Racial Equity Network (MORE), and helped pass the Racial Equity and Social Justice Act. She has worked with the County Executive on public works, policing, rent stabilization, and environmental protection through the Rockville City Academy. Laurel City Councilmember Martin Mitchell was a 2020 Bernie delegate and a founding member of Maryland for Bernie Sanders. He has been a leader in the fight for rent stabilization, marijuana decriminalization, and collective bargaining for municipal employees. ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Our Revolution is endorsing the Ithaca Solidarity Slate in New York! Jorge DeFendini (Ward 4) and Phoebe Brown (Ward 2) are both seeking re-election to the Ithaca Common Council, and Kayla Matos is a challenger who would grow our progressive bloc on the council. Now, Our Revolution is proud to endorse Juan to lead the city in a progressive direction as Mayor. We know he will champion education, affordable housing, and economic and social justice at the helm. ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Greater Worcester Our Revolution is supporting Robert Billota for City Council (District 2) in Worcester, MA. Robert is running for this seat because he believes Worcester should be a place where everyone can build a prosperous future. He is committed to environmental sustainability, fighting climate change, and economic security. Our Revolution helped elect Chicago Mayor Brandon Johnson earlier this year, and this week he officially delivered on his campaign promise to eliminate the “subminimum wage” for tipped workers! Together with One Fair Wage, we fought for this new law which calls for tipped workers — currently paid 60% of Chicago’s minimum wage — to receive 8% annual increases beginning next July until they reach 100% parity in 2028, the [ ]Chicago Sun-Times reported. [ ][IMG] In July, Mayor Brandon Johnson joined us to serve up food to restaurant workers and raise awareness in this fight. Our own members submitted testimony directly, and we just won! Stay tuned! In Ohio and Arizona, Our Revolution has teams canvassing for signatures for petition drives that will put a $20+ MINIMUM WAGE directly on the ballot in 2024. [ ]Our movement is critical to advancing policies to address the many crises facing our country. If you’re not already a monthly member of Our Revolution, sign up today! ★ ★ ★ STUDENT DEBT [ ][IMG] Student debt payments are resuming “after the Supreme Court’s conservative majority turned its back on Americans in need,” US Rep. Ro Khanna wrote in [ ]The Messenger. Ro’s op-ed features the lived experience of Our Revolution member and student debt activist Vanessa Torres, who grew up with a single mother and knew that higher education was her only ticket out of poverty. Vanessa still owes $186,000, and like so many of us, doesn’t know how she will make ends meet now with payments resuming during an affordability crisis. [ ]Watch this clip of Ro and Vanessa discussing the topic of student debt HERE. [ ][IMG] This week, the Biden Administration canceled $9 billion worth of student debt for borrowers who have worked in public service for a decade, those who have made income-based payments for 20 years, and borrowers with permanent disabilities. We’re not giving up. Our Revolution and our student debt activists will keep organizing and pushing the President to go all the way and fulfill his promise to eliminate $50k for every student borrower in the country through executive order using the Higher Education Act. ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] ACTION: Our Revolution is calling on our activists to Stand with Striking UAW Autoworkers at the Big Three! We’re asking you to organize a dealership canvass and leaflet members in your community about the UAW’s Stand-Up Strike and how Ford, General Motors, and Stellantis are refusing to settle fair contracts with 150,000 workers after making $250 Billion in profits. [ ]Join or organize an event here and be sure to read instructions for canvassing and leafleting dealerships. [ ][IMG] Our Revolution members have been joining UAW workers on the picket lines around the country — in Maryland, West Virginia, Virginia, and beyond! Last week, President Biden joined the picket line with UAW, seeming to take the advice from Our Revolution Executive Director Joseph Geevarghese in the [ ]The Hill: “This strike is an opportunity for the President to say to the Big Three, ‘You’re incredibly profitable, but the return on investment we need to see is for working-class Americans.’” Joseph also represented Our Revolution by speaking at the [ ]LIVE Solidarity Summer Rally with UAW with UAW President Sean Fain and a powerful coalition of progressive organizations supporting the striking workers. ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] VICTORY! Our progressive coalition beat back a power grab by establishment Democrats that would have disenfranchised thousands of grassroots party members. Virginia Democrats rejected a change to state party rules that would have altered how the commonwealth’s DNC delegates are elected, [ ]TYT reports. This is a major win for progressives! Our Revolution Northern Virginia’s Sandra Klassen (who is also a State Central Committee Member of the VA Dem Party) was thrilled that “all of our work and our allies paid off!”. ARE YOU RUNNING TO BE A DELEGATE TO THE DNC NEXT YEAR? If so, we want to hear from you. Please reach out to political@ourrevolution.com. ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] From boots on the ground to the halls of Congress — it’s going to take an organized movement fighting on every terrain to take power back for the people. If you’re already a member of Our Revolution, thank you! Please consider chipping in an extra donation to fund our work leading up to the big elections in November and beyond. If you’re not yet an official member, please consider signing up today! [ ]PLEASE SUPPORT OUR REVOLUTION ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Barbara Lee will be joined by Ro Khanna at Our Revolution’s LIVE Beyond Fossil Fuels Town Hall on Oct. 17th. Reps. Lee and Khanna have worked together to fight for climate action, and now they’re working to keep oil drilling out of backyards of schools, hospitals, nursing homes and more. [ ]RSVP ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Medicare for All, ending medical debt, lowering drug prices — Barbara Lee and our progressive movement are fighting on many fronts for healthcare justice. Join Our Revolution’s LIVE Healthcare for All Town Hall with US Reps. Barbara Lee, Pramila Jayapal, and Ro Khanna, and CA Assemblyman Ash Kalra. [ ]RSVP ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] [ ]WHEN WE ORGANIZE, WE WIN! ★ ★ ★ [ ]Facebook | [ ]Twitter | [ ]Instagram | [ ]Youtube | [ ]Website | [ ]Sign Up [ ]Our membership swag Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive group in America. [ ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the establishment by committing to a recurring donation of just $5 or more a month! [ ]GIVE MONTHLY [ ]GIVE ONCE You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION PO Box 66208 WASHINGTON, DC, 20035 Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a 501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are made to support Our Revolution’s general mission and are not designated for any specific activity.

name: James Carville
subject: It's official now
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
I had to reach out.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231007-1?refcode=em20231007-1&refcode2=849_552475_z4JpS8&akid=849%2E552475%2Ez4JpS8)
It's official now, Peter.
Mitch McConnell and his GOP cronies got what they wanted: Dave McCormick — a mega-millionaire hedge fund guy who can spend HUGE sums of his own money and self-fund this race — jumped in the race to beat Bob Casey + flip PA's Senate seat red.
The biggest mistake grassroots Democrats can make right now is to sit by and think that Pennsylvania is a safe blue state. Personally, I sure can't forget that Donald Trump won the Commonwealth on Election Night in 2016.
**National Republicans are getting ready to spend potentially more than EVER before to flip Pennsylvania red in 2024.**
As someone who's spent nearly half a century electing Democrats and winning tough elections across the country, including in the Keystone State, let me assure you: _Pennsylvania is as competitive a battleground as it ever was._
**[I'm urgently asking folks today: Will you chip in $5 or more to Bob Casey? With millions set to pour in against Democrats, we CANNOT take Pennsylvania's Senate seat for granted!](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231007-1?refcode=em20231007-1&refcode2=849_552475_z4JpS8&akid=849%2E552475%2Ez4JpS8)**
**[Donate Now ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231007-1?refcode=em20231007-1&refcode2=849_552475_z4JpS8&akid=849%2E552475%2Ez4JpS8)**
Seriously — I'm worried folks don't realize just how bad we need to gin up major grassroots resources to fight back tooth and nail in Pennsylvania.
Mitch McConnell and his cronies are already promising to spend whatever it takes to defeat Bob Casey. The fact is, Peter, if we don't rally for Bob RIGHT NOW, we're toast. And truthfully, I think we need to see a LOT more grassroots donations than we have since McCormick launched his campaign.
**[So I'll ask one more time: Will you ensure we don't take Pennsylvania for granted and chip in $5 or any amount to defend Bob Casey and our blue Senate majority?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231007-1?refcode=em20231007-1&refcode2=849_552475_z4JpS8&akid=849%2E552475%2Ez4JpS8)**
**[Donate Now ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231007-1?refcode=em20231007-1&refcode2=849_552475_z4JpS8&akid=849%2E552475%2Ez4JpS8)**
Thanks for hearing me out,
James Carville

* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=1&akid=849%2E552475%2Ez4JpS8)
* [Update Your Information](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://go.bobcasey.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=849%2E552475%2Ez4JpS8)

To give by check:
Bob Casey for Senate
PO Box 58746
Philadelphia, PA 19102
Email us: [info@bobcasey.com](mailto:info@bobcasey.com)
PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC.

1. **Kari supports dangerous abortion bans with no exception** , even saying that abortion isn’t a “medical choice that someone gets to make.”
2. **Kari STILL refuses to accept the 2020 election results** — and a position in the Senate would clear the pathway for Donald Trump to become President _by any means necessary._
3. **Kari is trying to make your vote public.** She and the election deniers within the GOP are putting together an unprecedented request to make all Maricopa County early ballot envelopes public — including voters’ names, addresses, phone numbers, and signatures.
4. **Everyone’s calling it** — Our Senate race will be a frontline seat, and has been called “the most interesting Senate race in the U.S.”

name: Debbie Mucarsel-Powell
subject: I'll never hide from my record
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Debbie for Florida
body:
I'm incredibly proud of the work that I've done to uplift and protect my community.
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71172639/431370505/-1832279535?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk171-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzUxYjc5ZjMtNjU2NS1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=LiI2DjLfYUedBnrwJEMUURyuM_fLL2bi06vQOYF5b0E=)
Hi friend, thank you for being a part of this grassroots team to flip Florida blue. Your support truly means so much to me.
**Now that our campaign is underway, I want to take a moment to tell you a bit about my record and why I'm in this race.[(Polling data shows that this race is tied, so if you're already all in to flip Florida blue, you can make a gift here.)](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71172640/431370506/-1832279535?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk171-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzUxYjc5ZjMtNjU2NS1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=LiI2DjLfYUedBnrwJEMUURyuM_fLL2bi06vQOYF5b0E=)**
My mother brought my sisters and me to America when I was 14 to give us a chance at a better life. It took long hours, hard work, and a whole lot of hope, but we were able to win our American Dream. **That's why I made the decision to spend my career giving back to this incredible country and the state that gave me so much.**
I worked at several nonprofit organizations across Florida, helping to **protect our wildlife and preserve our coral reefs**. During my time working at Florida International University, I helped lead a new program to **improve access to affordable health care for** more Floridians.
In 2018, I decided to take these fights to Washington. I ran for Congress in a tough battleground district — and I won. In the House, **I wrote the bill to expand seniors’ Medicare Advantage coverage,** to ensure that more Americans could get the vital care they deserve. I also worked with Republicans to provide **economic relief to families and small businesses** and secured $200 million for **Everglades restoration. **
Throughout my time in Congress, **I fought tirelessly for commonsense gun safety reforms** , serving as the vice chair of the Gun Violence Prevention Task Force. This issue is deeply personal to me: When I was 24, my father died from gun violence. After leaving Congress, I joined Gabby Giffords' advocacy group as a senior advisor and continued to fight for safer communities and an end to the gun lobby's grip on Washington.
I'm incredibly proud of the work that I've done to uplift and protect my community. I'll never hide from my record. But I don't think that my opponent can say the same. **Rick Scott has spent his time in power writing the plan to cut Social Security and Medicare, attempting to undermine our elections, attacking our rights, and making it harder for working families to get ahead**. It's no wonder his approval ratings are underwater.

clean_body: I'm incredibly proud of the work that I've done to uplift and protect my community. | | | = Hi friend, thank you for being a part of this grassroots team to flip Florida blue. Your support truly means so much to me. Now that our campaign is underway, I want to take a moment to tell you a bit about my record and why I'm in this race.= My mother brought my sisters and me to America when I was 14 to give us a chance at a better life. It took long hours, hard work, and a whole lot of hope, but we were able to win our American Dream. That's why I made the decision to spend my career giving back to this incredible country and the state that gave me so much. I worked at several nonprofit organizations across Florida, helping to protect our wildlife and preserve our coral reefs. During my time working at Florida International University, I helped lead a new program to improve access to affordable health care for more Floridians. In 2018, I decided to take these fights to Washington. I ran for Congress in a tough battleground district — and I won. In the House, I wrote the bill to expand seniors’ Medicare Advantage coverage, to ensure that more Americans could get the vital care they deserve. I also worked with Republicans to provide economic relief to families and small businesses and secured $200 million for Everglades restoration. Throughout my time in Congress, I fought tirelessly for commonsense gun safety reforms , serving as the vice chair of the Gun Violence Prevention Task Force. This issue is deeply personal to me: When I was 24, my father died from gun violence. After leaving Congress, I joined Gabby Giffords' advocacy group as a senior advisor and continued to fight for safer communities and an end to the gun lobby's grip on Washington. I'm incredibly proud of the work that I've done to uplift and protect my community. I'll never hide from my record. But I don't think that my opponent can say the same. Rick Scott has spent his time in power writing the plan to cut Social Security and Medicare, attempting to undermine our elections, attacking our rights, and making it harder for working families to get ahead. It's no wonder his approval ratings are underwater. My opponent is ranked as one of the most vulnerable senators on the ballot in 2024, but I can only defeat him with strong, early grassroots support.= If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you, Debbie Mucarsel-Powell | * | | | = Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is a Floridian, South American immigrant, mother, and former Congresswoman. subject: Trying to figure out a way to convince you

body:
When Kari Lake announces, she will have the support of this guy:
#

We've been racking our brains to figure out if there's any way we can convince you to make your first contribution to Ruben Gallego's campaign before Kari Lake announces on Tuesday.
Let's try this.
When Kari Lake announces, she will have the support of this guy:
[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-oct23.kRA6ky&refcode=em231007-1-30&t=1&akid=1312%2E734936%2E05-8hb)

[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-oct23.kRA6ky&refcode=em231007-1-30&t=2&akid=1312%2E734936%2E05-8hb)

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71172833/431371225/1310200878?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=gfs_footer&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOWQzNGQyMi02YTY1LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LSm_bimUZ71JcNb7nSQGTRyyLgLMr8jcjIEv-K2j4W0=) A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 — and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, experts at FiveThirtyEight are saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. | | Patriot,

This week, as you watched yours truly stand trial as a completely innocent man, you’ve seen exactly what the Radical Democrats' endgame really is...
---
A pursuit of _absolute_ power at the expense of our free Republic, our Constitution, and not just my civil liberties, but _YOUR_ _freedom_ as well.

clean_body: Before we close out the week... | | | Patriot – despite the Radical Democrats forcing President Trump to stand trial as an innocent man this week, in the end, NOTHING can slow down your favorite president! That’s why today, he’s out on the campaign trail in the great state of Iowa with only 100 days to go until the FIRST contest of the primary. But before we close out the week, we had to be sure you saw the President’s powerful reaction to all that’s transpired these past few days... See below for President Trump’s forwarded message – and after you’ve finished reading, Thank you, Team Trump \---------- Forwarded message ---------From: Donald J. Trump Date: Thu, October 5, 2023 Subject: After all you’ve witnessed this weekTo: <dpwillis67@gmail.com> | | Patriot, This week, as you watched yours truly stand trial as a completely innocent man, you’ve seen exactly what the Radical Democrats' endgame really is... A pursuit of absolute power at the expense of our free Republic, our Constitution, and not just my civil liberties, but YOUR freedom as well. The power-drunk Democrats, TERRIFIED by the latest polls that show us LEADING Crooked Joe by 10 POINTS, will do anything – truly, anything – to destroy the one man who can and will defeat Biden in 2024. They wrongfully impeach me and raid my home. They indict me, unlawfully arrest me, and even force me to take a mugshot. They’re attempting to strip me of my livelihood and take away my incredible business. They want to harass my family and take away my home, Trump Tower. And now, they’re trying to GAG me for the rest of the election to prevent me from even criticizing Crooked Joe. ... All of this to CANCEL OUT YOUR VOTE! Our Founding Fathers would be rolling in their graves if they could see what is happening to the America they left us – once the freest country in the world. But these Deep State thugs truly are monsters... They would trade our Republic for a tin-pot dictatorship in a heartbeat if it meant an everlasting grip on power. And mark my words, if they succeed at INTERFERING in this election, in the FINAL BATTLE for our country, America will never be the same. But I promise you this: The one thing these crooks, thugs, and fools can NEVERcontend with is a movement of more than 74 MILLION patriots peacefully declaring that they willNEVER,EVERSURRENDERour country to Third World Marxist tyranny! If you’re struggling right now due to Biden’s disastrous policies, believe me, I completely understand. In that case, please don’t even think about donating. I mean it! But if you can contribute even just $1 alongside your fellow patriots to show that you too will NEVER SURRENDER, then God knows our country needs YOU now more than ever. | | Thank you and God bless you, Donald J.
